subject: Let’s Make This Official
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN
body:
Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. I am announcing today that I have just come from officially filing my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=49bc69f91304409f90f4b550ff2fe6af&_e=XvVGnMLWgVYiL0JJCS1WkeB8xebz7Or3dpwoUcFhmnSX-SLxloJabYmTEE9TFUoSRGakj0kg_XDzIsYoFerxhVMkchF0YN17FCBzosW7X7ATPsJfLx9smSJVhWr5LVsa03QzplsShj9-Be9liMy1B__76FEn8VGxVbmXKZ82oyhLWnYTKY-kughGLMjz0hxMThJ6CKKjtgOZRPMObKVdQLHIrCELWln_zNDrLWLYMNIPrzmu8k8Rd-ihDZABYnlL_TED8g2v7YAqlVAMNvkdUdYEevgGVXNCxmGkC6YsTZJ_vqc55YdSztCVk_jh7TBwt_hVNY7PRtaShDC0JVvsTS2FLi49LBbYg_jmKBnhBUzu2QXK9DjRSaLTrbJ_XWOJ_2n4ZRQNQlKANi0nD6wALw%3D%3D)

Peter,

We have been working hard for several months to reach the voters of Texas with my winning message of strong, effective conservative leadership for our state. Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=49bc69f91304409f90f4b550ff2fe6af&_e=XvVGnMLWgVYiL0JJCS1WkeB8xebz7Or3dpwoUcFhmnSX-SLxloJabYmTEE9TFUoSRGakj0kg_XDzIsYoFerxhVMkchF0YN17FCBzosW7X7ATPsJfLx9smSJVhWr5LVsa03QzplsShj9-Be9liMy1B__76FEn8VGxVbmXKZ82oyhLWnYTKY-kughGLMjz0hxMApkSpNTjY6Kg5SUL58DtbyKBTEKIUMUSEHQlE99KM1h0FXUcpcusS3SA1KcXgYv88aaoZ1f4ya30HbjrPsy__m_EBIPTtYs4QCwOon9eC8GpAjOZO2kc1qgXBvIyhvixD-1VjlNODQovbtk0TNvRr76tqIT-fBjVd49a6GyaXhVLlFzvjDS5ENIHHYvIIsRlJs3f4DfYzDqd1AjNn4269w%3D%3D)
So, it is time to really shift this campaign into top gear and utilize the time we have to make our case to Texas Republicans that the future of our state - and this great country - are on the line in the next few months.

That is why I hope you will also take action today - join me on the ramparts of freedom - and support my campaign for Governor of Texas!

There are many ways you can do that, Peter - you can pray, which costs nothing but time. You can share our campaign content online and speak to friends and family about what is at stake. You can volunteer and make a difference in person.

[**And, you can make your own endorsement of my campaign - and empower us with the resources we need to build a successful foundation for the tough race ahead with a 2022 Allen West for Governor - with a generous grassroots contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or whatever you can afford right now.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=49bc69f91304409f90f4b550ff2fe6af&_e=XvVGnMLWgVYiL0JJCS1WkeB8xebz7Or3dpwoUcFhmnSX-SLxloJabYmTEE9TFUoSRGakj0kg_XDzIsYoFerxhVMkchF0YN17FCBzosW7X7ATPsJfLx9smSJVhWr5LVsa03QzplsShj9-Be9liMy1B__76FEn8VGxVbmXKZ82oyhLWnYTKY-kughGLMjz0hxMecbjvGp0wbwD3ZzIGzigtXAXOqMp8a8_MGROjiz3cpJnB3zO9I7-MNUvYwco_fGF9Zb3EeWXiLo-fpU8HPQPUYEw1utjrGhzoOJc0iMEBWpoIdtemKXt86WXrCiIpA0phGUUNZNnBsADe9ZLQNCGefMmx-P5zo1nVwQgNSNGdwjPy7MRt1WAuEuhHdrbQsLzjI7cHKGiS_3p9FKq2bd6BQ%3D%3D)

[**Peter, we must turn away from the path of least resistance and complacency at the many challenges threatening our freedom and prosperity. I am prepared to lead us in a new direction, but I must have your support to succeed.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=49bc69f91304409f90f4b550ff2fe6af&_e=XvVGnMLWgVYiL0JJCS1WkeB8xebz7Or3dpwoUcFhmnSX-SLxloJabYmTEE9TFUoSRGakj0kg_XDzIsYoFerxhVMkchF0YN17FCBzosW7X7ATPsJfLx9smSJVhWr5LVsa03QzplsShj9-Be9liMy1B__76FEn8VGxVbmXKZ82oyhLWnYTKY-kughGLMjz0hxM75LB1PqjBMU7MjE1QpRqxF-X2aJs8vOeoMTS8htJWegZvcUrwVcwKFX8kdsqXfLJMrx0uHK8KYagWXlmSJrnIG6pkGGKWSOMHvlQoNzlunMgwnwmzr621jOalWWVKp0LH-dWmSHxl5XI1W7Wb69BCUyDuyZqZLnXbJiaTN0ESLnKYuhQIml4VJWZ4hK5u1pdjVlvpsnigcAXUjtz8opQOA%3D%3D)

Can I count on your endorsement today?

[**Thank you, Peter - I hope to hear from you soon.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=49bc69f91304409f90f4b550ff2fe6af&_e=XvVGnMLWgVYiL0JJCS1WkeB8xebz7Or3dpwoUcFhmnSX-SLxloJabYmTEE9TFUoSRGakj0kg_XDzIsYoFerxhVMkchF0YN17FCBzosW7X7ATPsJfLx9smSJVhWr5LVsa03QzplsShj9-Be9liMy1B__76FEn8VGxVbmXKZ82oyhLWnYTKY-kughGLMjz0hxMaOeOs2-edV6mmaxK48Q5iwJEn7vCeVO0HNHvQBbdyiKJ46i74SMDzbg6B_-5l3qHejGpc5TBN6K-q3Ji8LEFBEWtpytlEtIKSKeVyk3a3iN4EFX1NW4bWX-2YO8L99e1Cup3WxzF67U9WQn7fbCqaLOsqJP6JTI1BSNMovqQYUaR5XyDP6z5vwrMvblQ00Gy54aPvU4efEjt2NRaNdDYcQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. I am announcing today that I have just come from officially filing my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. | Peter, We have been working hard for several months to reach the voters of Texas with my winning message of strong, effective conservative leadership for our state. Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. So, it is time to really shift this campaign into top gear and utilize the time we have to make our case to Texas Republicans that the future of our state - and this great country - are on the line in the next few months. That is why I hope you will also take action today - join me on the ramparts of freedom - and support my campaign for Governor of Texas! There are many ways you can do that, Peter - you can pray, which costs nothing but time. You can share our campaign content online and speak to friends and family about what is at stake. You can volunteer and make a difference in person. Can I count on your endorsement today? Steadfast and Loyal, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN The election laws in Texas allow for unlimited donation amounts as long as the funds are not from an incorporated entity. Make checks payable: Allen West Campaign PO Box 740846 Dallas, TX 75374 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Allen West
subject: Let’s Make This Official
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN
body:
Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. I am announcing today that I have just come from officially filing my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7bb8d6fe2f4b4420a44d1a42cb0aae05&_e=1jr83dJfJaLPXNNjgAZgNnogmoqTxmN7QLodNhQlmoh6fItDiEa4rHcsO8P7YrkFfvxrZLL37aOCJJ_url-XZgxk_gpdwWWQ6evtuLLH3zf1oygoCAzXJi0k8v1zK-Gc_LjIAfxWjZxlLpnVRbOpD0-uhxq0NTzT3rkMBno0xTxhu1TyCu0v3R-4N_uDWiYA-AKD-hwWxu17NGoGjURN1nP6iyygQwmXVl5tWI29EAT0fOMU_kV2uzo8TvPrgGk4Dl_eRk__6AUpv5Uw1Gr03vIJ9kZn2DMaHOr_NrupYjIye_-jEbp69IIgugpdv0K9StUu7lpoi0SqicPmS8LwG2Bgs7Gm5oPW1qSF-b7ZTeX63vrzTeb0_V-E_3duJ5zU)
---
Fellow American,

We have been working hard for several months to reach the voters of Texas with my winning message of strong, effective conservative leadership for our state. Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7bb8d6fe2f4b4420a44d1a42cb0aae05&_e=1jr83dJfJaLPXNNjgAZgNnogmoqTxmN7QLodNhQlmoh6fItDiEa4rHcsO8P7YrkFfvxrZLL37aOCJJ_url-XZgxk_gpdwWWQ6evtuLLH3zf1oygoCAzXJi0k8v1zK-Gc_LjIAfxWjZxlLpnVRbOpD0-uhxq0NTzT3rkMBno0xTzOtPah1eZBbsjiLcaTJ_wBHlie1xpuA0En_ecslepgfs4TiSgO_921mn3Aqiu-19sljCgNkLztctUB6vdT6X-3TvvkCKbfzsSkNGIl_NvfMxJzIexUGZUSXC-90Bh8vj7QsywFPdd0YFj3ympblDhb0gaR-AIBIWSI8SsRS2R_FKabCc311tFt277dZy3hxwER5xeUaePsLQE48zR4FIFg)
So, it is time to really shift this campaign into top gear and utilize the time we have to make our case to Texas Republicans that the future of our state - and this great country - are on the line in the next few months.

That is why I hope you will also take action today - join me on the ramparts of freedom - and support my campaign for Governor of Texas!

There are many ways you can do that, Fellow American - you can pray, which costs nothing but time. You can share our campaign content online and speak to friends and family about what is at stake. You can volunteer and make a difference in person.

[**And, you can make your own endorsement of my campaign - and empower us with the resources we need to build a successful foundation for the tough race ahead with a 2022 Allen West for Governor - with a generous grassroots contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or whatever you can afford right now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7bb8d6fe2f4b4420a44d1a42cb0aae05&_e=1jr83dJfJaLPXNNjgAZgNnogmoqTxmN7QLodNhQlmoh6fItDiEa4rHcsO8P7YrkFfvxrZLL37aOCJJ_url-XZgxk_gpdwWWQ6evtuLLH3zf1oygoCAzXJi0k8v1zK-Gc_LjIAfxWjZxlLpnVRbOpD0-uhxq0NTzT3rkMBno0xTxLZPW2uO778eak1qfccH1Izm6Jd19J_7QJQAf_5CRQTuhc7mOL8KkWjLI9vqJ-9HA_9I3LtBLn5MFSf9c0w66AGY6K9bwGz4iZXul12ivb2CjJmBSIt34mjgoHAyEtSGSPWG2rGTg8HaqqxYKqD0QstJ96RtCDVxSmA7miIY781gEBEC8OSDCsTxUTeW5E_qOPCVe7C5ifOBFx2AFL72FN)

[**Fellow American, we must turn away from the path of least resistance and complacency at the many challenges threatening our freedom and prosperity. clean_body: Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. I am announcing today that I have just come from officially filing my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. | Fellow American, We have been working hard for several months to reach the voters of Texas with my winning message of strong, effective conservative leadership for our state. Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. So, it is time to really shift this campaign into top gear and utilize the time we have to make our case to Texas Republicans that the future of our state - and this great country - are on the line in the next few months. That is why I hope you will also take action today - join me on the ramparts of freedom - and support my campaign for Governor of Texas! There are many ways you can do that, Fellow American - you can pray, which costs nothing but time. You can share our campaign content online and speak to friends and family about what is at stake. You can volunteer and make a difference in person. Can I count on your endorsement today? Steadfast and Loyal, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN The election laws in Texas allow for unlimited donation amounts as long as the funds are not from an incorporated entity. As Merchandise Coordinator for Team Tina, it is my job to bring the best new products that _represent not only our district’s feelings but the NATION’S_.

So when I came up with these designs and presented them to Tina, she said, “ _Don’t ask me, ask Friend. They always know best._ ”

Now I am coming to YOU! Which design do you think best represents our campaign?
_I am only asking Tina’s TOP supporters. Your opinion will represent the rest of the district._

Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Here's How We Pass the Never Again Bill
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=commit_to_caucus_1_0&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Lisa Hanson will be sitting in jail on Christmas morning instead of opening presents with her grandchildren. While violent criminals run free in Minneapolis creating the largest spike in crime in decades, our government has imprisoned a business owner for opening her doors to the public.
## And here's the scary thing...Governor Walz still has the power to do it all over again.
This is exactly why we MUST PASS the Never Again Bill which means:
1. Governors cannot unilaterally declare an emergency
2. Governor’s orders will not be treated as law
3. The governor is fined or imprisoned for violating the law
4. Your rights protected by a Citizens’ Bill of Rights

But the Political Class in St Paul doesn't want to pass this important piece of legislation because it removes power from them, and gives it back to you and me. Fortunately for us, they also need our votes in order to get re-elected, so it's time we make them EARN THOSE VOTES! It's been said: the day goes to those who show up. That's 100% true. **_Which is why I need you to commit to going to your precinct caucus on February 1st._** We also MUST pass Stop Vaccine Mandate legislation to save our jobs and our way of life from these authoritarians. Politicians need to see that there are consequences for attacking our health freedoms. These important issues can quickly be catapulted to the top of politics in this state but ONLY if you attend your precinct caucus on February 1st.
## Can I count on you to step up?
You see, the political process in 2022 starts on caucus night and it's completely open to the public! If you, me and the other hundred thousand Action 4 Liberty supporters show up on February 1st, politicians will be FORCED to make the Never Again Bill and Stopping Vaccine mandates a priority! But only if we show up! The politicians like to stack the caucus with lobbyists, cronies and swamp dwellers. We can displace them, so WE are in the driver's seat. But only if we show up! What I'm asking of you is to commit to **attend your precinct caucus** and **submit either the Never Again Resolution** , the **Stop Vaccine Mandates Resolution** , or both. The caucus meeting will last only about an hour, it will likely be held in a church or school near you and the room will be filled with your neighbors. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/commit_to_caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=commit_to_caucus_1_0&n=2 "Commit to Caucus") [Commit to Caucus](https://www.action4liberty.com/commit_to_caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=commit_to_caucus_1_0&n=2)
---
_If you attended our Christmas event last week, you know that our priorities for 2022 are Stopping Vaccine Mandates and the Never Again Bill. We want to save the jobs of nurses, like the ones on our panel._
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=commit_to_caucus_1_0&n=3)
**Politicians have a thirst for more power and control. We're up against tremendous odds. But if we all show up in force, we can change the political landscape rapidly.**
Please join us in [committing to attend caucus](https://www.action4liberty.com/commit_to_caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=commit_to_caucus_1_0&n=4).
In the coming weeks, we'll be pushing out more specific information about caucusing - stay tuned.
When Patriots like you stand up and take action like going to caucus, the Political Class has NO CHOICE but to heed that or risk political death.
We need to send a very strong message that failing to protect our liberties and expand freedom is unacceptable.
If **you would like to help more** , we need to get our message out to more Minnesotans who share our view on Ending Emergency Powers or Stopping Vaccine Mandates. Please donate.
[**Make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 to equip us with the resources to expand our message and reach tens of thousands of more Minnesotans!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=commit_to_caucus_1_0&n=5)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=commit_to_caucus_1_0&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=commit_to_caucus_1_0&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=commit_to_caucus_1_0&n=8), software for leaders.

There is no better way to show off your patriotism and love for Wyoming than driving through our state with one of these beautiful magnets. We are done with Liz Cheney. What better way to welcome her back to Wyoming for one of her rare appearances than by flooding our streets with cars telling her exactly what we think??!!! Get your official Defeat Cheney Car Magnet here! >>> Together we are going to take our state and country back. Thank you, Harriet Hageman | | | |

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WE WANT TRUMP
body:
Coal. Yes, Coal. That's what the Democrats deserve this Christmas, and that's exactly what I intend to deliver, you want to help? |
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f064ea3ad95b424689e6e07476e271a0&_e=18hXjf5ssZDjS6pFEZxj_8-LOe7h6MV4zBer5bkWIK1xHKPKQJwtH-E0tK2z0SzvYTyj9267HyRmMfu1jIHQnM5tna8Bd4aP2dmwv6LqOV5koxy96unS2VLjyspEuNjYK8VsV7PoG3L-awOipqrHv9RJzlV8A0qfjdMBliMAxpcwy3vK5XlmjQ1PHHeGrRESMrUUWOiYfzn7aF_VdsqrV70KpbVvP-0U8q24jcwbWwGyrWmVnio3JfvnJ63FyGPsSFFuZjgxF-qNrd_kZyUMNMQbU-cDnbzUewUXs-mnPdqoJg4v8ws_bNbCikfD-d02iLzsrS4yvriCSlrlTgFhz-rb6kw2sG5VLkW5KmtBwToiUd4XzS-p0Kq05t5LukwUCGCS56LLpWM9nLLh054bE3zasnOiHePoD21gTkRbQpw%3D)
**Fellow American- Democrats deserve coal for Christmas, and I’m going to give it to them.** _**Let me be clear, this is not a joke.**_ I’m very serious about sending coal to the very Democrats who openly discuss barring us from our loved ones during the most important holiday in our nation.

They want to take away jobs if you refuse to get the vaccine, to destroy businesses if they don’t enforce vaccine mandates, and they want to continue dictating every aspect of our lives.

They want us to be afraid and to fight each other. _**No more.**_ These Democrats have done nothing good for our nation except waste our tax dollars, censor our speech, and threaten American’s for not obeying their mandates.

**Democrats don’t understand anything except action, and that’s why with your help, I’m going to give them coal from the American people so they can see what we really think of them.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f064ea3ad95b424689e6e07476e271a0&_e=18hXjf5ssZDjS6pFEZxj_8-LOe7h6MV4zBer5bkWIK1xHKPKQJwtH-E0tK2z0SzvYTyj9267HyRmMfu1jIHQnM5tna8Bd4aP2dmwv6LqOV5koxy96unS2VLjyspEuNjYK8VsV7PoG3L-awOipqrHv9RJzlV8A0qfjdMBliMAxpcwy3vK5XlmjQ1PHHeGrRESMrUUWOiYfzn7aF_VdsqrV4gMrlT3SeZFXL1BJAtmxMuz7LHdLE70n8K3LqexsD5SOVYRBNhghFHraj5TM-mxr883iCzQt6uqSGFnEtRbH08TWdIRZYJTz3-5Z-2I7N-09_y9NpVXllrGMYifmaF_bAEu1IBr-TCWOhujnVbjruwoMFRnpK_1BHGlmMROOID72hOS5utAuYzyWW921t0BR9KTNwL_75AfZpYG2USpyI0%3D)
[** ****HELP ME SEND COAL TO THE DEMOCRATS WHO WANT TO CANCEL CHRISTMAS **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f064ea3ad95b424689e6e07476e271a0&_e=18hXjf5ssZDjS6pFEZxj_8-LOe7h6MV4zBer5bkWIK1xHKPKQJwtH-E0tK2z0SzvYTyj9267HyRmMfu1jIHQnM5tna8Bd4aP2dmwv6LqOV5koxy96unS2VLjyspEuNjYK8VsV7PoG3L-awOipqrHv9RJzlV8A0qfjdMBliMAxpcwy3vK5XlmjQ1PHHeGrRESMrUUWOiYfzn7aF_VdsqrV2Ny4N2wCa4BIus4pzJZHCfNi8UoHKMrvx23xP5TtrcZrPqarmIBWOje3tEj7XDMiyz-E_BofZFirHvc1DOexxYwC2L1Bjf-Sfzn_RPLM4LdBJQI7N7Jd5sHfNHdwIUoCkmyCOIzgo29C0rN6etzYnTLbc4HtHvkXJd34vqqhwNKJuTaFe8aRL36uYt8u6AegjODT0RSbANqCEovNMJM9BE%3D)
_**United we stand.**_ That’s what a mountain of coal in front of their offices from the American people stands for, and I’m asking you to join me to be the voice for the American people who are sick of being treated like second class citizens.

Democrats give more priority to illegal immigrants, filthy rich celebrities, and liberals who bash you for not wearing a mask one minute, then take theirs off when the cameras aren’t rolling.

America is done with these radical liberals who hate the police, hate your desire for freedom, and treat our traditional values like a joke. If you’re sick and tired of it, then show them we’re not going away. [**Pitch in $9 and help me send coal to them for Christmas, because that’s all they deserve for what they’ve done for our country.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f064ea3ad95b424689e6e07476e271a0&_e=18hXjf5ssZDjS6pFEZxj_8-LOe7h6MV4zBer5bkWIK1xHKPKQJwtH-E0tK2z0SzvYTyj9267HyRmMfu1jIHQnM5tna8Bd4aP2dmwv6LqOV5koxy96unS2VLjyspEuNjYK8VsV7PoG3L-awOipqrHv9RJzlV8A0qfjdMBliMAxpcwy3vK5XlmjQ1PHHeGrRESMrUUWOiYfzn7aF_VdsqrV0xeyQVKKtdHkkiFBW7lWVL0gashJ8BUC5Zs9p1ppnuWDKJ75QAgUBEgn-176IiGiyE_VfXN8nWpja6LW16YBmK2truVcF2YSUCO_i3sZLOOhuoLzdN_SxBEsg8O_SyNALFrWL72I1fSGFOwz6Jo5N8pzWAYJRVG1Y9FWVn4_K4gNIxUCyjv2jc5UaxdlgTZmkW3G6p5DzzXtHnPTLZ-PuU%3D)

Joe Biden's weakness, projected across the globe, is making the world a more dangerous place. Bad actors, like Russia and China, are doing what bad actors do - acting badly. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdujijt-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdujijt-kujkulhluu-k/)

### [A Truly Awful Bill](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdujijt-kujkulhluu-n/)
Perhaps the most irresponsible bill in the history of our nation passed the House last week. If it actually becomes law, hold onto your wallets. Wasteful spending will skyrocket. Taxes will spike. The National Debt will go up trillions. And inflation will get even worse. You can read about it in this week's blog. | | | I don't have a second to spare.

My FINAL Mid Month Deadline of the year is just 120 minutes away -- and I'm still alarmingly short of my must-hit goal.

At this make-or-break moment, I'm asking you to make a crucial choice:

_Will you watch helplessly while Republicans continue to shatter fundraising records and attempt to buy their way back into the Majority?_

**Or will you rise up before my deadline to hand Republicans a stunning defeat and protect my House Democrats once and for all?**

subject: Let's change America together!
body:
Hello friends, Eric Jones here... I have set out to run a campaign for two reasons. ********** 1. I want to make policy that helps to give t
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/1fNryIc_s/c?w=cNhSVGsXilPiQ3oPON9F3eOqlHt9anGxQIE2rWu7nnI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzFmTnJ5SWNfcz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjU1ZGJmM2RlLTQ3MjgtNDQwYy05ZjZjLWI3ZTcxZTZjZTEyMCJ9)_**

| | |
---
| | Let's change America together!
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Hello friends, Eric Jones here...I have set out to run a campaign for two reasons. **********1\. I want to make policy that helps to give the working class the breathing room it so desperately needs. Articles have suggested that nearly half of Americans are unable to afford a $400 emergency without taking on debt. I have several plans that will help the American people to better deal with the burden. From workers getting a well-deserved tax cut, students' debt becoming interest free, and helping struggling seniors by keeping the tax collector away from their social security benefits. 2\. Because I was tired of the dysfunction and tribalism in Washington Career politicians have benefitted more from keeping problems around instead of fixing them. They earn political points by dividing Americans. Helping their own voters is seen as a bad thing by many if the solution came from someone on the other side. I have plans to help fix these as well. Recently I signed a pledge that I would help help vote for term limits on the House and Senate. Career politicians are more worried about political glamour and scoring punches for the cameras than with governing responsibly. This is why they have to go. ********** Our movement grows every day, but we're a grassroots movement. My opponent, Bill Johnson, has big-money donors on his side. I am proud to say that all of my donations have been from individuals just like you. But that also means we're going to need your help if we're going to raise awareness of middle-class focused solutions. If you want to make this future a reality, help out by clicking the button below and making a donation.

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: We Need Lower Energy Costs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, the Biden administration has failed to keep energy prices in check. Will you stand with me and call for pro-energy policies that will lower our costs?
Hi Peter, **It shouldn 't come as a surprise to anyone that we need lower energy costs. With the coldest of winter still to come, the rising costs will have a real impact on families' budgets. **We need to put in place policies that lower energy costs so we can afford to heat our homes and fuel our cars. **We need to pursue pro-energy and pro-growth policies that make Americans more prosperous. We shouldn 't have to rely on unstable foreign countries for our energy needs. **The Democrats won't fix this, their policies have led to the rising prices that we are seeing today. We want to lower energy costs for all Americans, but we cannot do it without your help.[**Please consider donating today so we can continue our Red Wave momentum into 2022 and take back the House. We need to end the Democrats ' monopoly rule in Washington.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjihyjk-idtjvlhlh-r/)Thank you,Bryan
**--
Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjihyjk-idtjvlhlh-y/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjihyjk-idtjvlhlh-j/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjihyjk-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjihyjk-idtjvlhlh-i/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zjihyjk-l-h) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

Marco Rubio

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8294%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=SE7mKcQj%2ftdd%2b9OS2CScqg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10899%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FNH2IgP57Xt0Tn9M6lqrVg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10890%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bQue2NMLFqjbZYEUd%2f5toQ&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10891%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OlZliFzXTP3q0cF%2fU7bu%2fQ&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8294%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=SE7mKcQj%2ftdd%2b9OS2CScqg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8294%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=SE7mKcQj%2ftdd%2b9OS2CScqg&sysid=1)

body:
|
| | | I'm reaching out because we have a pivotal fundraising deadline tonight. We're hours away and we still need 100 patriots to step up with House Republicans today.

---
| | | **MID-MONTH FUNDRAISING DEADLINE EXTENDED**
---

Personal Link:

The consequences of missing our extended deadline are dire and will affect you and your family.

_**Thousands of abortions will happen every single day.

Our Second Amendment rights will be abolished.

Our election security will be eradicated. **_

The only way we can prevent these disasters is to elect America First Republicans to Congress. Can you be one of 100 brave patriots to commit to helping me elect more Conservatives who want to protect our country?

**[If 100 patriots donate $10 today, we will make our goal.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59029646:JsItfpEvN:m:1:3298722022:F40DA969141F185DCA078E7DAE4B5BA5:r "If 100 patriots

You are my last beacon of hope. I hate having to ask you for money, because I know you get a lot of emails about this already. But I see how dangerous Democrats are every day in Congress, and I can't sit idly by while they plot their destruction of America.

Don't be fooled. Democrats don't care what happens to Republicans. They only care about people who agree with their socialist agenda. We need to band together to stop them once and for all - are you with me?

Thank you,

Congressman Ronny Jackson (R-TX)

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump might run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. Your email address -- dpwillis67@gmail.com -- just got **chosen to receive a 10-Million Volt Pocket Stun Gun FREE.**

[You just have to click here to claim it.](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/107/56327/e3c8daa42d469c736da069cf13640d69495763aa/714aa54eb80b7bc80d37f04e9a39e17a748b0b56)

**_Here’s why you got chosen to get this Free:_**

Our friends at _Tactical USA_ had an overstock of these pocket stun guns in their warehouse... so they decided to give some of them away as a little “guerrilla marketing” campaign.

Over 132,000 other Americans have **gladly paid full price** for this... since it can turn a 260lb thug into a whimpering pile in two seconds flat.

[You can get it FREE](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/107/56327/e3c8daa42d469c736da069cf13640d69495763aa/714aa54eb80b7bc80d37f04e9a39e17a748b0b56) since your email got chosen today.

Just **one small catch** here...

You’ll need to [claim your Free Pocket Stun Guns IMMEDIATELY](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/107/56327/e3c8daa42d469c736da069cf13640d69495763aa/714aa54eb80b7bc80d37f04e9a39e17a748b0b56) if you want it.

If you don’t claim it within 4 hours...

We’ll simply take that to mean you **weren’t interested** \-- and then select another eligible winner to receive it Free.

So don’t dilly dally.

**Grab your FREE 10-Million Volt Pocket Stun Gun now** , before it’s handed off to another winner.

**Thank You**

name: American Defense News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zom5u8ae8o8038khkdvh8gtohj6f4mcf06dj92po_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdim6o32c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65slmchjradb7m8p74phme2qbcd5mcorm8t3jemqe3c7764pm2s9jmapm7crmehg6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb2pjh6iqr6ptmc9j3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfca9qg66agbb67dgab8q2bqvjv4r6fje059e7sg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdim6o32c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z891lnrjbdo7n4klpb9ojd48ehf1bkrrrojci1b8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdim6o32c5h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfkh0g15hi05e65je3ahtcc14fa00qt3vahfihjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdim6o32c5h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:

— _ Business Insider_** **[RUSH $25 TO STOP THEM](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39725939/321147110/1582314273?refcode=em_UTC_FR_GOPPlot_121621_B1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzYjIxNDdmLTc4NWUtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wSB5-GjwuUqP7wB24I075ZMQVkflN6eNvIzEH-A2mmY=)** Peter, House Republicans are ready to sabotage the Biden agenda. They’ve already drafted a post-election playbook if they take back the House, which includes:
* **Investigations into Hunter Biden’s art**
* **Multiple impeachments**
* **Regular grillings of Cabinet Secretaries**
* **Elevating Matt Gaetz, the subject of a federal sex trafficking investigation, to chair a Judiciary subcommittee**
* **Reinstating dangerous conspiracy theorists Marjorie Taylor Greene and Paul Gosar to Congressional committees**

This is not the path our country should go down. This isn’t the news we were hoping to have to share, but last night we fell over $6,000 short of our $50,000 mid-month goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue.

clean_body: Hello, This isn’t the news we were hoping to have to share, but last night we fell over $6,000 short of our $50,000 mid-month goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. This is the first time we have EVER missed a fundraising goal. So we’re emailing you now with an urgent last minute request to ask you to help us come up with the shortfall and close the gap before midnight tomorrow. Democrat Mike Franken isn’t taking money from corporate PACs or special interests like Big Pharma and the NRA like his opponent Chuck Grassley. Instead, he’s building a grassroots campaign funded by people like you. When we set goals like the one we just missed, they’re real. We can’t afford to come up even a dollar short, or we could risk losing our slim Democratic majority in the Senate. In order to be in a strong enough place to take on all of Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC money and turn Iowa blue, we need to raise the remaining $6,000 in the next 48 hours. So we have to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This campaign is fueled and funded by real people like you. Every dollar you can give today will help Mike fight back against the Super PAC lies and win next November. Thank you for being a critical part of the campaign, Team Franken Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

subject: I wish I had better news

body:
I apologize for being so blunt, but this is concerning:
| | |
---
Friend, I apologize for being so blunt, but I just read a text from my finance director with awful news: I fell just $4,510 short of my Mid Month fundraising goal.
When I miss my important goals, I risk my chance of winning in Florida – particularly since Marco Rubio and the GOP are raising millions to defeat me.
So here’s what I’m seeing, friend: Marco Rubio and the Republican establishment are going to keep raising huge sums of money. They're already attacking me, and they'll keep attacking me. **That's why I cannot lose any ground – not when Florida's last Senate race was decided by only 10,033 votes. So I asked my team to pull your supporter record, and here's what I saw:**

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39727414/321152515/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDAzNjI5Ny03YTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aqn5KU9FDiUJAFB1E84V-UEVkkNt_eGWPAaQBffjvWQ=)

| | Peter, In the last few weeks, two things have become crystal clear:
1. Western North Carolina is ground zero for Madison Cawthorn’s attempt at an extremist takeover of North Carolina.
2. Organizing will be the key to winning this election. We must replace Madison Cawthorn and Mark Meadows' toxic, divisive brand of politics with a politics of love, empathy, and doing right by our neighbors. **And I need your support to do it.**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39727415/321152516/-468352360?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211216_FR_FightToxicity_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDAzNjI5Ny03YTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aqn5KU9FDiUJAFB1E84V-UEVkkNt_eGWPAaQBffjvWQ=) [**I’m the first gay woman, Christian minister, and mom of three running in WNC to deliver real leadership guided by love, hope, and empathy to our community. Will you donate $5 towards my campaign today to help me replace Republican extremist Madison Cawthorn?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39727416/321152517/-468352360?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211216_FR_FightToxicity_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDAzNjI5Ny03YTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aqn5KU9FDiUJAFB1E84V-UEVkkNt_eGWPAaQBffjvWQ=) | | | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39727417/321152518/-468352360?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211216_FR_FightToxicity_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDAzNjI5Ny03YTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aqn5KU9FDiUJAFB1E84V-UEVkkNt_eGWPAaQBffjvWQ=)
---
Let’s start with why winning in Western North Carolina is so important. Last week, Madison Cawthorn and Donald Trump were exposed hatching a plan at Mar-a-Lago for an extremist takeover of North Carolina.
Trump and Cawthorn are playing a dangerous and cynical game of musical chairs in North Carolina. They're running multiple right-wing candidates in districts where they’ve never lived, and handpicking candidates who are willing to go along with the Big Lie that the election was stolen.
Western North Carolina is one of the most competitive and important battlegrounds in North Carolina. It could determine control of Congress. And the only way that we will win is if we do what I’ve done my whole career: Organize.
This last Saturday, we held our 6th Day of Action, and the energy was off the charts. We had over 60 volunteers sign up to knock doors and make phone calls, even though it was a rainy day in December here in the mountains.
This is how we fight the toxicity we see from Trump, Cawthorn, and their allies – by meeting people where they are, listening to what matters to them, and connecting with them on a human level.
It is what I’ve dedicated myself to as a minister, an organizer, and an elected official. It is what I will do as a candidate, and it is what I will continue to do after I am elected. **However, we can’t build the robust organization that we need to connect to the people of Western North Carolina without you.**
[**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to work together and reach our goals. Will you chip in $5 or more right now so we have the resources to start 2022 off strong and show our opponents what this team is capable of?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39727418/321152519/-468352360?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211216_FR_FightToxicity_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDAzNjI5Ny03YTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aqn5KU9FDiUJAFB1E84V-UEVkkNt_eGWPAaQBffjvWQ=)

clean_body: | = | | Peter, In the last few weeks, two things have become crystal clear: 1. Western North Carolina is ground zero for Madison Cawthorn’s attempt at an extremist takeover of North Carolina. 2. Organizing will be the key to winning this election. We must replace Madison Cawthorn and Mark Meadows' toxic, divisive brand of politics with a politics of love, empathy, and doing right by our neighbors. And I need your support to do it. = = | | | = Let’s start with why winning in Western North Carolina is so important. Last week, Madison Cawthorn and Donald Trump were exposed hatching a plan at Mar-a-Lago for an extremist takeover of North Carolina. Trump and Cawthorn are playing a dangerous and cynical game of musical chairs in North Carolina. They're running multiple right-wing candidates in districts where they’ve never lived, and handpicking candidates who are willing to go along with the Big Lie that the election was stolen. Western North Carolina is one of the most competitive and important battlegrounds in North Carolina. It could determine control of Congress. And the only way that we will win is if we do what I’ve done my whole career: Organize. This last Saturday, we held our 6th Day of Action, and the energy was off the charts. We had over 60 volunteers sign up to knock doors and make phone calls, even though it was a rainy day in December here in the mountains. This is how we fight the toxicity we see from Trump, Cawthorn, and their allies – by meeting people where they are, listening to what matters to them, and connecting with them on a human level. It is what I’ve dedicated myself to as a minister, an organizer, and an elected official. It is what I will do as a candidate, and it is what I will continue to do after I am elected. However, we can’t build the robust organization that we need to connect to the people of Western North Carolina without you. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for all your support, Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . It’s that time of year again, friends: _Campaign finance deadline season!_
**Our next Federal Elections Commission deadline is midnight on December 31, which means that this campaign is approaching what could be a make-or-break moment.**
[**Will you donate whatever you’re able to help us hit our goal and show the strength behind our grassroots campaign to flip this House seat blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39728924/321157730/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211216midmonth2_EG_main_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmMyYTFmNC03YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FvMAuGp467RceJZoa0SsKXk9myIIkwWWk8UlMI9QW_s=)
Every three months, campaigns have to report quarterly fundraising numbers to the FEC for everyone to see. Those numbers are _crucial_ indicators of a campaign’s strength, and will set the tone as we enter the new year.
And let’s not forget: **The stakes in this race are incredibly high**. With partisan gerrymandering tilting control of the House in the GOP’s favor, flipping districts like this one — especially when held by extreme, out-of-touch candidates like Scott Franklin — could be crucial in Democrats’ efforts to hold the House and deliver on an agenda that provides help to the people who need it most.
We need to raise **_$15,000_** from online grassroots donors before the end of the year to keep pace with our corporate-backed, insurrectionist opponent and give ourselves the best shot possible to flip this seat.
[**Can you chip in $15 to support Eddie’s campaign to restore honest leadership to FL-15 and help us reach our goal by the end of the year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39728926/321157732/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211216midmonth2_EG_main_xx_l3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmMyYTFmNC03YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FvMAuGp467RceJZoa0SsKXk9myIIkwWWk8UlMI9QW_s=)

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

subject: BREAKING: Mark Meadows held in contempt

body:
Last week, President Biden hosted a Summit for Democracy which brought together world leaders from over 100 countries to set an agenda for democratic renewal and tackle the greatest threats to democracy. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39731675/321169577/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3M2U5N2RmLTgwNWUtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I7l-Mk_Xpebr6Jvb9Tf-3F0pWZXoWDDUxcY5BR5abxM=&emci=74393376-e25d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e73e97df-805e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=16335001) **House votes to hold Meadows in contempt for refusing to comply with Jan. 6 committee subpoena**
– _The Washington Post_
Did you hear the news, team?

The House voted in favor of holding former Trump Chief of Staff Mark Meadows in contempt for refusing to comply with the committee's subpoena. Meadows is the second person – after Steve Bannon – to be held in contempt for trying to impede the investigation.

The House is sending a strong message that they won't let Trump and his allies get away with impeding their investigation and escaping accountability. They're holding them responsible and doing everything in their power to uncover the truth about January 6.

We're grateful for everything the January 6 committee is doing. While they focus on discovering the truth, we're focused on defeating the most dangerous and radical Republicans who spread the Big Lie and voted against the results of a free and fair election.

**[Will you join us? Chip in $5 or more before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help us protect our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39731680/321169580/3877195?refcode=em21_211216_mm2_fnd_gq_act___tna_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211216_mm2_fnd_gq_act___tna_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3M2U5N2RmLTgwNWUtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I7l-Mk_Xpebr6Jvb9Tf-3F0pWZXoWDDUxcY5BR5abxM=)**

Thanks,

While they focus on discovering the truth, we're focused on defeating the most dangerous and radical Republicans who spread the Big Lie and voted against the results of a free and fair election. = Thanks, Never Again PAC Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Louie Gohmert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | = PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC Never Again PAC PO Box 2153 Purcellville, VA 20134 United States

name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: The people have spoken — we have a new winner of the MTG award!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

You voted, and we have this month's Marjorie Taylor Greene Award winner!

This month’s worst Pennsylvanians are... anyone who supported S.B. 565!

It is a well-deserved win for the shameful majority of our state's legislature. If there's a bill that says you care more about guns than your kids, your parents, your neighbors, yourself... this is it.
S.B. 565 is a "Constitutional Carry" bill that would have allowed people to carry firearms freely and without a license in PA. It made its way all the way to Governor Wolf’s desk before it was vetoed.

But think of the journey of this bill! Before it made it to the Governor's desk, it was introduced by Big Lie-fan Republican PA Sen. Cris Dush. It passed through the State Senate where 107 people voted yes for this bill. Then it made its way through the House where 29 elected officials voted for it. How do these people sleep at night??

The bill is horrific. It would have allowed anyone in PA to keep and bear firearms without a permit, including carrying loaded or unloaded guns openly or concealed, and it would have eliminated restrictions to carry on public streets or private property in Philadelphia. This Wild West crap, it's no way to live.

We have to fight this kind of cruel, dangerous, and self-serving politics NOW. If we didn’t have a Governor with common sense to protect us, we could be living in, well, basically Texas right now.
Join our fight by donating today to mobilize and organize voters and community groups to Get Out The Vote to build a truly progressive PA.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=121621 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=121621]

Thank you ,

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Pittsburgh, PA 15224

name: Erika Benfield
subject: RELEASE: Erika Benfield Announces "Veterans for Erika" Coalition
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJwEf75VvrIWVZ8uy_JBairI0QRP1mBBGp6n7wVIGKC1pKn-WFtaMCE3mxxLWyR6Z9tB2h_LVXEOO6Pukd3BIPtZdaUlv5xXpNN5p5Qd6G73AwsmVe4w_vizm8YFJAZyhfunKEkH3cQTcVinsFYmKhN1oc-CSYsdeO029RggHL4=&c=DZLfqjGqPsWnQeHIkoYqjez53xBNj872YcLhxINtEhfPADEcsoftpg==&ch=9aOOE69kvV7VAEuchKbiOTFFD2cKv6ZSWWnoEbrFCj_FIToIOKlZ9w==)
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: December 16, 2021
---
| Contact: Derek Dufresne press@erikabenfieldforcongress.com; 202-809-6013
---
| Erika Benfield Announces "Veterans for Erika" Coalition
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJwEf75VvrIWVZ8uy_JBairI0QRP1mBBGp6n7wVIGKC1pKn-WFtaMCE3mxxLWyR6Z9tB2h_LVXEOO6Pukd3BIPtZdaUlv5xXpNN5p5Qd6G73AwsmVe4w_vizm8YFJAZyhfunKEkH3cQTcVinsFYmKhN1oc-CSYsdeO029RggHL4=&c=DZLfqjGqPsWnQeHIkoYqjez53xBNj872YcLhxINtEhfPADEcsoftpg==&ch=9aOOE69kvV7VAEuchKbiOTFFD2cKv6ZSWWnoEbrFCj_FIToIOKlZ9w==)
---
| Lake Mary, FL - Erika Benfield, candidate for Congress in Florida's Seventh Congressional District, announced the launch of the Veterans for Erika Coalition, backed by an extensive list of well-respected local veterans.
---
| Erika Benfield made the following statement in response to releasing her Veterans for Erika Coalition:
"I am proud to officially announce the launch of the Veterans for Erika Coalition. This group of local veterans is filled with American patriots who embody the principles of leadership and service that I will bring to Congress. I have worked with the veteran community here in Central Florida for many years, and working with them has filled me with great joy and passion for service. Our veteran community is full of highly dedicated and exceptional servicemen and women, and it would be my honor to advocate for them in Congress.
"In my position as Vice Mayor of DeBary, I have been a tireless advocate for our local veterans. I am a regular volunteer at my local VFW Post 8093 and Auxillary, and I am proud of my relationships with veterans here in my community. Working with veterans is important to me because it serves as a way to give back to the brave men and women who have made so many sacrifices to protect and honorably serve our country. I am truly humbled to have so many amazing veterans supporting me in my campaign to be the next Congresswoman of Florida's 7th Congressional District. When I am elected, I will be sure to continue my work advocating for our veterans."
---
| The Veterans for Erika Coalition have released the following statements:
Dr. Rick Montz, Navy Commander (O-5), U.S. Navy, DeBary, FL: "I know Erika well, and I know that she has the drive and passion necessary to not only win this race but also to serve our community well. So, make sure you vote for her and not anybody else. That's an order!"
Ralph Mosley, U.S. Navy, Deltona, FL: "Freedom is not free, and I trust Erika to keep us free. She knows us, veterans, well through her past work with veterans groups. That's why I support Erika to represent us."
John Bolduc, U.S. Air Force, Deltona, FL: "She's a true Trump Republican. We went to a rally together along with other veterans from Post 8093, as she is an auxiliary member. You can trust what she says, believe what she does; she's absolutely a true Trump Supporter."
Howard Krugman, Specialist (E-4), U.S. Army, Debary, FL: "I wholeheartedly endorse Erika Benfield for Congress because she's really with it. She stays on top of all the issues. I know she will represent our district well on Capitol Hill."
Other members of the Veterans for Erika Coalition include:

* Randy Pollack, Specialist (E-5), U.S. Army, DeBary, FL

* Kathryn-Gates Skipper, Staff Sergeant-Gunny Select, U.S. Marine Corps, Lake Wales, FL

* Chuck Dean, Airman 1st Class, U.S. Air Force, DeBary, FL

* Mike Oliver, Seaman (E-3), U.S. Navy, DeBary, FL

* Tommy Shaffer, Specialist (E-4), U.S. Army, Orange City, FL

* Dave Drysdale, Fireman, U.S. Navy, Orange City, FL

* Allen Boykin, Sergeant (E-5), U.S. Marine Corps, Sanford, FL

* Giovanni Arcelay, Sergeant (E-5), U.S. Army, Deltona, FL

* David Pesante-Pinto, Staff Sergeant (E-6), U.S. Army, Deltona, FL

* Rob Wilkerson, Petty Officer Third Class (E-4), U.S. Navy, DeBary, FL

* Mike Plaskon, Seaman 1st Class (E-3), U.S. Navy, DeBary, FL

---
| This coalition is the first of many that will be released in the coming months in addition to the other local endorsements Erika has earned thus far from other community leaders and local officials, such as Volusia County Sheriff [Mike Chitwood](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJwEf75VvrIWVZ8uy_JBairI0QRP1mBBGp6n7wVIGKC1pKn-WFtaMMMwrPjTIp8zUXw8ddYYcNW7ixI1yEtIwbSOYO-swggAOiFDXrRorQrTgtm1jUnNLnvIV1hrgnxtafnIx7JdH_4f2Ql0qwyzL2mh5TeRk4okUON_PJuQZW2a7iEnQJ9pHa7airjzLflIkTx1LPQPqpK4g78elLHk7Yo2C2qsKN2m-xhgg96BKmLCqCWR2QTQuV4P-AvLTF3e35L0zTTy5ds=&c=DZLfqjGqPsWnQeHIkoYqjez53xBNj872YcLhxINtEhfPADEcsoftpg==&ch=9aOOE69kvV7VAEuchKbiOTFFD2cKv6ZSWWnoEbrFCj_FIToIOKlZ9w==), Former State Representative [Bob Cortes](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJwEf75VvrIWVZ8uy_JBairI0QRP1mBBGp6n7wVIGKC1pKn-WFtaMMMwrPjTIp8z80GUs22QrmgSUIE1DKE4Z8y3g1TwLzE6p-oKYvYoj5oBq_h8oY7yez9YvLMo_VNLHhZwFqe7SsrC6rl28B-EOet7_xy9iTgY0ISZ6fzyMNvj6ubipmyOn2SPUbFbDYoABWxSr9ZA8LC0HK31PLgiwsAD5gqi13V3l2teP6os50edFp6HsFIzPb7BqGSrRCkCUTAxClJ7Zjc=&c=DZLfqjGqPsWnQeHIkoYqjez53xBNj872YcLhxINtEhfPADEcsoftpg==&ch=9aOOE69kvV7VAEuchKbiOTFFD2cKv6ZSWWnoEbrFCj_FIToIOKlZ9w==), Seminole County School Board Member [Amy Pennock](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJwEf75VvrIWVZ8uy_JBairI0QRP1mBBGp6n7wVIGKC1pKn-WFtaMMMwrPjTIp8zSWPj3N2oWHTugoYMx-bes0z-EQY6JmKUOZ2al_cYXk4L0Ek-2gykLQD1f1-UIyeqTkkBAAcMHcO5tnAsyeb_WhEAAdKk2DKNLGcT69Ixjhi2IK44SKsRrC4sxn1lvfkr2Z_KtZwUB_GpyDjr3PT1A8XS3qJA7KcdajITuQNAUVHt5K5NgiXN0CF1g8UNxnI_YXLXvhRT_qU=&c=DZLfqjGqPsWnQeHIkoYqjez53xBNj872YcLhxINtEhfPADEcsoftpg==&ch=9aOOE69kvV7VAEuchKbiOTFFD2cKv6ZSWWnoEbrFCj_FIToIOKlZ9w==).
Erika Benfield is a small business owner, a former vice mayor of DeBary and DeBary City Council Member, and a proud wife, mother of four, and grandmother.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: December 16, 2021 | Contact: Derek Dufresne press@erikabenfieldforcongress.com; 202-809-6013 | Erika Benfield Announces "Veterans for Erika" Coalition | == | Lake Mary, FL - Erika Benfield, candidate for Congress in Florida's Seventh Congressional District, announced the launch of the Veterans for Erika Coalition, backed by an extensive list of well-respected local veterans. | Erika Benfield made the following statement in response to releasing her Veterans for Erika Coalition: "I am proud to officially announce the launch of the Veterans for Erika Coalition. This group of local veterans is filled with American patriots who embody the principles of leadership and service that I will bring to Congress. I have worked with the veteran community here in Central Florida for many years, and working with them has filled me with great joy and passion for service. Our veteran community is full of highly dedicated and exceptional servicemen and women, and it would be my honor to advocate for them in Congress. "In my position as Vice Mayor of DeBary, I have been a tireless advocate for our local veterans. I am a regular volunteer at my local VFW Post 8093 and Auxillary, and I am proud of my relationships with veterans here in my community. Working with veterans is important to me because it serves as a way to give back to the brave men and women who have made so many sacrifices to protect and honorably serve our country. I am truly humbled to have so many amazing veterans supporting me in my campaign to be the next Congresswoman of Florida's 7th Congressional District. When I am elected, I will be sure to continue my work advocating for our veterans." | The Veterans for Erika Coalition have released the following statements: Dr. Rick Montz, Navy Commander (O-5), U.S. Navy, DeBary, FL: "I know Erika well, and I know that she has the drive and passion necessary to not only win this race but also to serve our community well. So, make sure you vote for her and not anybody else. That's an order!" Ralph Mosley, U.S. Navy, Deltona, FL: "Freedom is not free, and I trust Erika to keep us free. She knows us, veterans, well through her past work with veterans groups. That's why I support Erika to represent us." John Bolduc, U.S. Air Force, Deltona, FL: "She's a true Trump Republican. We went to a rally together along with other veterans from Post 8093, as she is an auxiliary member. You can trust what she says, believe what she does; she's absolutely a true Trump Supporter." Howard Krugman, Specialist (E-4), U.S. Army, Debary, FL: "I wholeheartedly endorse Erika Benfield for Congress because she's really with it. She stays on top of all the issues. I know she will represent our district well on Capitol Hill." Other members of the Veterans for Erika Coalition include: Randy Pollack, Specialist (E-5), U.S. Army, DeBary, FL Kathryn-Gates Skipper, Staff Sergeant-Gunny Select, U.S. Marine Corps, Lake Wales, FL Chuck Dean, Airman 1st Class, U.S. Air Force, DeBary, FL Mike Oliver, Seaman (E-3), U.S. Navy, DeBary, FL Tommy Shaffer, Specialist (E-4), U.S. Army, Orange City, FL Dave Drysdale, Fireman, U.S. Navy, Orange City, FL Allen Boykin, Sergeant (E-5), U.S. Marine Corps, Sanford, FL Giovanni Arcelay, Sergeant (E-5), U.S. Army, Deltona, FL David Pesante-Pinto, Staff Sergeant (E-6), U.S. Army, Deltona, FL Rob Wilkerson, Petty Officer Third Class (E-4), U.S. Navy, DeBary, FL * Mike Plaskon, Seaman 1st Class (E-3), U.S. Navy, DeBary, FL | This coalition is the first of many that will be released in the coming months in addition to the other local endorsements Erika has earned thus far from other community leaders and local officials, such as Volusia County Sheriff ==, Former State Representative ==, Seminole County School Board Member ==. Erika Benfield is a small business owner, a former vice mayor of DeBary and DeBary City Council Member, and a proud wife, mother of four, and grandmother. | ### | | == | | | | == == | | Erika Benfield for Congress | 4300 W Lake Mary Blvd, Suite 1010-318, Lake Mary, FL 32746 | | Sent by mailto:press@erikabenfieldforcongress.com powered by

name: Jessica Mason
subject: South Dallas raised me, and Washington will never change that.
body:
I didn’t leave Dallas to make this world worse for another little girl. So now, I’m running for Congress to represent TX-30.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39732299/321173109/-1288899752?refcode=21xx_FR_welcome1introjm_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWUwNDAzYS04MjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b1N9Nz7xB-FBErdw0yYUUrbuutdVu8gG71lWcatwZ1A=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39732302/321173113/-1288899752?refcode=21xx_FR_welcome1introjm_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWUwNDAzYS04MjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b1N9Nz7xB-FBErdw0yYUUrbuutdVu8gG71lWcatwZ1A=)
---
Hello Friends! **_My name is Jessica Mason, and I'm running for Congress to represent the people of Texas' 30th District!_**

From growing up housing insecure and not being able to afford preventative medication to enlisting in the Navy to complete my degree, my story is not unique to working-class people. I grew up in a community that was set up to fail by design. **I am not just another politician or political operative; I’m a daughter of Dallas — running to represent the community I grew up in and the people I love.**

Raised with my sister by my mother and grandmother, my family barely had enough for ourselves, but if my grandmother knew someone needed food, she would bring them something. Once, a neighbor offered to braid my hair for free. She knew picture day was coming, and my family couldn't afford to get my hair done. My neighbor was looking out for me — that type of compassion and understanding are inherent to Dallas. ******[**South Dallas raised me, and Washington will never change that. I'm sick of seeing my community left behind and tired of watching the people I care about ignored by corrupt politicians. TX-30 deserves a leader who will fight for them and put the needs of working families above special interests. CHIP IN NOW to help me bring this fight to Capitol Hill >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39732303/321173115/-1288899752?refcode=21xx_FR_welcome1introjm_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWUwNDAzYS04MjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b1N9Nz7xB-FBErdw0yYUUrbuutdVu8gG71lWcatwZ1A=)****** **______[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39732305/321173117/-1288899752?refcode=21xx_FR_welcome1introjm_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWUwNDAzYS04MjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b1N9Nz7xB-FBErdw0yYUUrbuutdVu8gG71lWcatwZ1A=)** In Dallas, when things get tough, the only thing we can do is work harder. For five years, I worked as a Navy medic while making sure to pursue my bachelor's degree. I counseled service members ailing with the mental tolls of war, sexual harassment and sexual violence, and substance abuse. After completing my military contract, I decided to pursue my Master of Public Administration while working as a legislative aide in the Virginia State Legislature.

Working in public policy, I saw how corporate money worked to influence policies that destroy Black and Brown communities across the nation. I didn't leave Dallas to make this world worse for another little Black girl. So as soon as I completed my master's, I returned to Dallas.

_Returning home, I was astonished to see things were exactly the same as they were when I left, if not worse._ I started working as an affordable housing administrator to deliver life-sustaining resources, such as rental assistance, adequate nutrition, and healthcare, to families and individuals. I began volunteering at various food pantries, and as the holidays came around, I organized toy and coat drives for my community because I was once that little girl with no presents under the tree and holes in her coat. But truthfully, charity can only do so much.

**It's hard to see my community in pain. The people of this district aren't just constituents. These are my friends and neighbors. And they are suffering. We are hungry; we are scared. And no one seems to care.**

TX-30 needs policies that are designed for our success. And that starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. That's why I'm in this fight -- to give back to my community and lift up the voices of TX-30. ******[**But this isn't going to be easy. I'm running a fully people-powered campaign, fueled and funded by grassroots donations and ground support from everyday people like you. So today, I'm asking for your help to lay the foundation we need to take this fight all the way to Congress. Will you pitch in anything you can right now to help me finally give TX-30 the representation we deserve?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39732307/321173119/-1288899752?refcode=21xx_FR_welcome1introjm_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWUwNDAzYS04MjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b1N9Nz7xB-FBErdw0yYUUrbuutdVu8gG71lWcatwZ1A=)****** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ********[**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39732309/321173121/-1288899752?refcode=21xx_FR_welcome1introjm_EL10&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWUwNDAzYS04MjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b1N9Nz7xB-FBErdw0yYUUrbuutdVu8gG71lWcatwZ1A=)********

clean_body: I didn’t leave Dallas to make this world worse for another little girl. So now, I’m running for Congress to represent TX-30. | | | = = Hello Friends! My name is Jessica Mason, and I'm running for Congress to represent the people of Texas' 30th District! From growing up housing insecure and not being able to afford preventative medication to enlisting in the Navy to complete my degree, my story is not unique to working-class people. I grew up in a community that was set up to fail by design. I am not just another politician or political operative; I’m a daughter of Dallas — running to represent the community I grew up in and the people I love. Raised with my sister by my mother and grandmother, my family barely had enough for ourselves, but if my grandmother knew someone needed food, she would bring them something. Once, a neighbor offered to braid my hair for free. She knew picture day was coming, and my family couldn't afford to get my hair done. My neighbor was looking out for me — that type of compassion and understanding are inherent to Dallas. ****=** __= In Dallas, when things get tough, the only thing we can do is work harder. For five years, I worked as a Navy medic while making sure to pursue my bachelor's degree. I counseled service members ailing with the mental tolls of war, sexual harassment and sexual violence, and substance abuse. After completing my military contract, I decided to pursue my Master of Public Administration while working as a legislative aide in the Virginia State Legislature. Working in public policy, I saw how corporate money worked to influence policies that destroy Black and Brown communities across the nation. I didn't leave Dallas to make this world worse for another little Black girl. So as soon as I completed my master's, I returned to Dallas. Returning home, I was astonished to see things were exactly the same as they were when I left, if not worse. I started working as an affordable housing administrator to deliver life-sustaining resources, such as rental assistance, adequate nutrition, and healthcare, to families and individuals. I began volunteering at various food pantries, and as the holidays came around, I organized toy and coat drives for my community because I was once that little girl with no presents under the tree and holes in her coat. But truthfully, charity can only do so much. It's hard to see my community in pain. The people of this district aren't just constituents. These are my friends and neighbors. And they are suffering. We are hungry; we are scared. And no one seems to care. TX-30 needs policies that are designed for our success. And that starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. That's why I'm in this fight -- to give back to my community and lift up the voices of TX-30. **=** If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ****=**** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** **** **** Thank you for standing with me. I can't do this without you. Jessica = ************ ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Jessica Mason for Congress**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- Jessica Mason was born and raised in Dallas and has experienced firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that impede the success of Texas working families. As a former Navy medic, Jessica received her Master's Degree in Public Administration so that she could pursue her passion for public service. She's running for Congress to represent Texas' 30th District because she's tired of seeing everyday people left behind. TX-30 deserves policies that are designed for the success of the people who live here. That starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. And that starts right here, with Jessica Mason. = __= | || || ** Jessica Mason for Congress PO Box 271183 Dallas, TX 75227 United States | | Paid for Friends of Jessica Mason

body:
Members of Congress stand behind our campaign https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-endorsements-1215 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-endorsements-1215]Dear friends,
I’m excited to announce the support of two Members of Congress who are supporting our efforts!
These join endorsements earlier this week from former Congressmen Robert Wexler and Peter Deutsch as well as local leaders Dept. Mayor April Thanos and former Councilwoman Wanda Schwerer.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-endorsements-1215 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-endorsements-1215]I look forward to working with Congressman Panetta and Congressman Swalwell to work on the national priorities that will have deep impacts on the people of my district. We cannot continue passing legislation if we don’t maintain our Democratic Majority, and these Congressmen know that I’m the best candidate to help us keep FL-13 blue.
Congressman Panetta highlighted our strength:
“With years of national security experience at the federal and international level, Eric has a first-hand understanding of how to navigate the challenges of lawmaking. He is our best hope to keep Florida’s 13th district blue in 2022 , and I would be glad to call Eric a colleague.”
Congressman Swalwell joined in that sentiment:
“In this critical moment, with attacks on the very foundation of our democracy, it’s imperative that Democrats hold the majority in the House. Eric is the most qualified candidate to both win this race, and help get our country back on track. I’m proud to back Eric Lynn for Congress.”
If you agree with these Congressmen, please help make our vision a reality by contributing to this campaign before tomorrow’s mid-month deadline! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-endorsements-1215]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

subject: Help pass the Build Back Better Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39735271/321181145/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTM4OWEwZS04NTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2Rp61f_RypZOrwwqlBrOj7s16DH2a9Gdi6se_lhYuE=&emci=722d9d4c-bc56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=75389a0e-855e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
We're thrilled to see House Democrats pass the Build Back Better Act. This historic bill will lower the costs of child care, elder care, housing, and health care.
It also includes an extension of the Child Tax Credit, **the largest middle class tax cut in history,** while creating good-paying and sustainable jobs that will benefit our environment and economy.
The bill is now in the hands of the Senate and we are urging the U.S. Senate to pass this critical piece of legislation for Southern Arizona. [**Can we count on your support?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39735284/321181146/-968462501?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTM4OWEwZS04NTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2Rp61f_RypZOrwwqlBrOj7s16DH2a9Gdi6se_lhYuE=&emci=722d9d4c-bc56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=75389a0e-855e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12898431)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39735299/321181147/-1881385537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTM4OWEwZS04NTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2Rp61f_RypZOrwwqlBrOj7s16DH2a9Gdi6se_lhYuE=&emci=722d9d4c-bc56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=75389a0e-855e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12898431)

clean_body: Friend, We're thrilled to see House Democrats pass the Build Back Better Act. This historic bill will lower the costs of child care, elder care, housing, and health care. It also includes an extension of the Child Tax Credit, the largest middle class tax cut in history, while creating good-paying and sustainable jobs that will benefit our environment and economy. The bill is now in the hands of the Senate and we are urging the U.S. Senate to pass this critical piece of legislation for Southern Arizona. We need to keep the pressure on the U.S. Senate to ensure this critical legislation passes -- and soon. Thank you for all that you do, Team Engel = = Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.

Peter,

We've been excited to see an outpouring of support from conservatives standing with us to **turn Georgia RED and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority.**

But Peter, the Democrats have responded by making Georgia their number one priority. They're raising tens of millions of dollars to accomplish their goal.

Our country is hurting, but the Democrats have been more worried about keeping their majority than leading. **[That's why I decided to get off the sidelines and run for office for the first time, and it's why we need YOUR support before midnight.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59032861:JfRYFpEFN:m:1:3298722022:2AEE1A94395536058C5C7FC1B45322CF:r)**

**[We joined this Senate race to bring real change to Washington, but we're 24 donations short of hitting our goal before tonight's mid-month deadline. Will you chip in before time runs out?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59032861:JfRYFpEFN:m:1:3298722022:2AEE1A94395536058C5C7FC1B45322CF:r)**
