Our conservative campaign to give power back to the people has caught the attention of National Democrats. They see the crowds we're attracting and the momentum that is building - including from people who aren't normally involved in politics. The **Democrats are raising a record amount of cash to defeat our campaign, so we need your help to win.**

**[Please help us show strength by chipping in before midnight and being 1 of the only 24 donors we still need to hit our mid-month goal.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59032861:JfRYFpEFN:m:1:3298722022:2AEE1A94395536058C5C7FC1B45322CF:r)**

**[We can't do this without you.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59032861:JfRYFpEFN:m:1:3298722022:2AEE1A94395536058C5C7FC1B45322CF:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59032861:JfRYFpEFN:m:1:3298722022:2AEE1A94395536058C5C7FC1B45322CF:r)
Herschel Walker

| | Team, The fight against climate change isn’t about just one issue — it’s an existential threat to our state and our planet. And it’s not just coming, it’s already here. Record-breaking heat, rainfall, and storms are already hitting our state, and unless we act now, this crisis will only deepen. As a mother and a public servant, I refuse to accept that future for our kids and our state. That’s why today, I’m announcing my Green New Deal for Massachusetts. This is a bold plan that will allow us to rapidly transition away from fossil fuels and create tens of thousands of green jobs for our Commonwealth. We have the tools and resources we need to meet this moment and address the climate crisis all while building a better future for everyone across Massachusetts. That starts with stopping new fossil fuel infrastructure, while transitioning our energy grid and all our buildings to 100% renewable energy. We’ll expand and electrify public transportation systems across the state, and my administration will also make regional buses and trains fare-free, – because public transit is a public good. Everyone benefits from it. We’ll also get to work establishing an East-West rail, along with robust regional transit, to better connect all corners of the Commonwealth while working to bring down vehicle emissions. And we’ll not only defend low-income communities and communities of color from the disproportionate impacts of climate change, but make sure they are first in line to share in the benefits of the new green economy. There’s so much work we have to accomplish in order to win the fight against climate change, advance climate justice, and develop a 21st century clean energy economy that can sustain all our families. [_**That starts with enacting a Green New Deal for Massachusetts. Click here to read my full plan.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39736596/321183442/370248553?refcode=em_20211216_f_s_climate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmVhMGI3NS04NjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SqbF19h-7H0FybuRv8Enj0vN0AWbw6RA4q8OYndHm4M=&emci=41889d56-7e5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=efea0b75-865e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684840) I am not one to shrink away from a challenge. The lives of our families, of our children, and our future generations depend on what we do right now. Thank you for being on this team with me. Together, we will win and deliver a Green New Deal for Massachusetts. Saludos, Sonia | Sonia Chang-Díaz is a State Senator running for Governor to make real change for Massachusetts families. She is the driving force behind many of the progressive battles we’ve won on Beacon Hill. She never backs down from a fight, and needs folks like you on her team. | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39736597/321183443/676662639?refcode=em_20211216_f_s_climate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmVhMGI3NS04NjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SqbF19h-7H0FybuRv8Enj0vN0AWbw6RA4q8OYndHm4M=)

clean_body: Here’s my plan: | | | | | Team, The fight against climate change isn’t about just one issue — it’s an existential threat to our state and our planet. And it’s not just coming, it’s already here. Record-breaking heat, rainfall, and storms are already hitting our state, and unless we act now, this crisis will only deepen. As a mother and a public servant, I refuse to accept that future for our kids and our state. That’s why today, I’m announcing my Green New Deal for Massachusetts. This is a bold plan that will allow us to rapidly transition away from fossil fuels and create tens of thousands of green jobs for our Commonwealth. We have the tools and resources we need to meet this moment and address the climate crisis all while building a better future for everyone across Massachusetts. That starts with stopping new fossil fuel infrastructure, while transitioning our energy grid and all our buildings to 100% renewable energy. We’ll expand and electrify public transportation systems across the state, and my administration will also make regional buses and trains fare-free, – because public transit is a public good. Everyone benefits from it. We’ll also get to work establishing an East-West rail, along with robust regional transit, to better connect all corners of the Commonwealth while working to bring down vehicle emissions. And we’ll not only defend low-income communities and communities of color from the disproportionate impacts of climate change, but make sure they are first in line to share in the benefits of the new green economy. There’s so much work we have to accomplish in order to win the fight against climate change, advance climate justice, and develop a 21st century clean energy economy that can sustain all our families. I am not one to shrink away from a challenge. The lives of our families, of our children, and our future generations depend on what we do right now. Thank you for being on this team with me. Together, we will win and deliver a Green New Deal for Massachusetts. Saludos, Sonia | Sonia Chang-Díaz is a State Senator running for Governor to make real change for Massachusetts families. She is the driving force behind many of the progressive battles we’ve won on Beacon Hill. She never backs down from a fight, and needs folks like you on her team. | = | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Conservative Partnership
subject: State Freedom Caucuses
body:
Fellow Patriot:

The success of the House Freedom Caucus proves how
badly it was needed. CPI has worked closely with HFC members
since our founding. The coordination, training, and strategic
thinking we provide have made all conservatives better at
fighting the Left, defending our Constitution, and saving our
country.

Conservatives already know who to fight; CPI teaches
them how.

The parent uprisings against tyrannical school
boards and public health "experts" this year showed that the same
resources CPI has provided our partners in Washington are
desperately needed by conservative leaders around the country.

And so, thanks to your help, CPI is launching the
new State Freedom Caucus Foundation.

The mission of this project is to bring together
freedom-minded legislators in every state legislature in the
country:

✓ Helping them find and train staff;

✓ Providing research and data analysis; and,

✓ Developing their legislative and rhetorical
skills to build a "farm team" of future state and national
leaders.

As you know, George Soros and other Socialist
billionaires have poured money into state elections and
policymakers to sneak away control of America's local
governments, school boards, state attorneys general, and local
district attorneys.

Your support for CPI's State Freedom Caucus
Foundation will help conservatives fight back against the woke
socialists in your state and every state!

CPI's State Freedom Caucus Foundation boot camps
will begin to equip state leaders with the tools they need to
succeed.

To achieve this goal, we're bringing on two
battle-hardened conservative leaders to lead this effort:

• Andy Roth, former Executive Director of the
Club for Growth Foundation, and

• Justin Ouimette, former Executive Director of
the congressional House Freedom Caucus.

Andy and Justin will be joining CPI to work on the
State Freedom Caucus Project full time: recruiting, training,
organizing, and strategizing with conservative legislators
looking to elevate their games and take the fight to the Left in
their states.

Help us level support conservative leaders in the
states!

The Georgia Freedom Caucus has already been
organized. Illinois is on the way. And we won't stop until all 50
states have principled, fighting conservatives leading their
legislatures with the best ideas, best messages, and best
strategies to make their states great again.

Please support CPI and our new State Freedom Caucus
Foundation with a tax-deductible donation today!

We'll be updating you on this new project as new
State Freedom Caucuses form, as we host more boot camp training
sessions, and start creating more conservative wins.

Now is the time to seed this new effort as
aggressively as we can: with money, research, and resources.

Please make a tax-free contribution to CPI to help
us take this project national as soon as possible.

Thank you, stay in the fight, and God Bless!

Sincerely,

Jim DeMintCPI Chairman

CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE300 Independence
Ave SEWashington, DC 20003(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282
FaxCPI.org

DONATE

Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is an
IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to
Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is tax-deductible to the
extent allowed by law.

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWp66-VH-N

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

Team New Deal, **this is our SECOND major endorsement this week!**

**VoteVets** is the first and largest group of progressive Veterans in America. Their mission is to elevate the voices of Veterans on the issues that affect the lives of those who served, their families, and the country.

_VoteVets endorses Veterans and national security professionals who champion progressive causes such as:_
* Ending the forever wars
* Preventing the spread of nuclear weapons
* Combating the spread of disinformation and the rise of violent extremism
* Reversing climate change, which threatens global security
* Ensuring healthcare, jobs, and housing for Veterans and military families
* Defending voting rights against attacks on our democracy

It’s truly an honor to be in this fight with VoteVets so we can work together to amplify the voices of Veterans and military families to remind elected officials that we are fighting for progressive policies to protect the very privileges and freedoms that so many of us have served this country to defend.

Despite the growing number of women in Congress, the number of Veterans serving as representatives is declining and is at its lowest rate since World War II. **To date, there has not yet been a Black woman Veteran on the House floor.**

That’s why this VoteVets endorsement of my campaign is such a huge step towards making history. name: Catherine Cortez Masto (D)
subject: Mitch McConnell vs. Us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
If we’re going to keep our Democratic majority, we’ve got to win these fights.
#
Peter,
**With the Senate split 50-50, Mitch McConnell only needs ONE seat to flip the Senate red. And he’s dead-set on defeating three Democratic women senators:** Me, Sen. Maggie Hassan and Sen. Patty Murray.
New polling shows me LOSING to my Trump-endorsed opponent by 2 points in Nevada’s critical Senate race. The Cook Political Report just downgraded my chances of winning to “Toss-Up.” And McConnell’s allies are massively outspending my campaign -- they’ve already spent more than $2 million on vicious attack ads to defeat me.
**I won’t sugarcoat how tough it will be to defend our majority. CNN just announced that “Republicans are _favored_ to take the Senate.” But Maggie, Patty, and I aren’t afraid of a tough fight. We’ve all faced close elections before and won thanks to grassroots supporters like you, Peter.**
I know we can do it again and save the Senate, but _only_ with your help. We’re facing a must-hit $25,000 fundraising goal at midnight tonight and we’re falling short with only a few hours to go:
**[Please Peter, will you pitch in $5 to help me, Maggie Hassan, and Patty Murray defend our Democratic Senate majority? We urgently need your support at this critical moment >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39741425/321198526/-82313335?refcode=pm_em_211216_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZlMTcxYS04ZjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KYw9cSurgZ8D8X74vombZ8u7K7DPmSO4KvlaFGpuqbA=)**

The truth is, we’ve got some ground to make up if we’re going to hit our fundraising goal before the holidays.
Tonight’s deadline is an important marker that will tell us whether we can meet our end-of-year goal. And on January 1, the midterm election year officially begins and it’s crucial we’re prepared to not only win my own re-election, but to also help new and incumbent Democrats get elected across the country.
Every single dollar makes a difference. We must be ready to go in 2022 when the GOP starts targeting Democratic candidates with attack ads.
It’s going to be tough, but I know we’re up for the challenge. Let’s get to work.
— Adam

---

---
| December 2021 Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---
Friends,
As we enter this holiday season of thanks and celebration, I would like to extend my thanks to you for all that you do to support our community efforts! Despite the challenges faced this year, you have done a tremendous job providing leadership and support to those who need it most. I am grateful to be part of such a collaborative and giving community! May your holidays be merry and filled with peace, love, and joy. Continue to stay safe amidst the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic.
---
|
---
---
| | | The Business Ecosystem Alliance for Minorities and Women ([BEAMW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H77vBjO18YkQQis_IovEEp8cRpdrC3hLxu9JMYxTLU8pLLtx-yHwHAF3pTJsYi8x8bLEhR7QPwFChzV0Cd4Vh4izD1THuYC2cVrOOVdyC2H7Gg3P9qCa9giHyO9WHVDSqYs_4ndpXGc=&c=xhvDW-9CB9B38vXuTvGSRzXo8D0ALXO1RAww30Aq4JNjc-bEEtPSXQ==&ch=mmAaFfIT77NTcGQH32H-Qb23dDX39zaU0wFXun1uB8F4OSgDN5yUOg==)) is off to a stellar start with its work to support women and minority owned small businesses! With a mission to reduce disparities in accessing capital and scaling businesses that many women and minority small business owners face, we have commenced our call for small businesses to sign up for one-on-one financial preparedness counseling [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H77vBjO18YkQQis_IovEEp8cRpdrC3hLxu9JMYxTLU8pLLtx-yHwHPO2B9tWPRbwK-5SkMA7_DkRIBbab7fgIhoh1mSJTrtVBkcaemIx-AE4sO3vq3C2nlUpVM-J9G-4FA7xcZ0sZ9dhiLTr6KsjzQ==&c=xhvDW-9CB9B38vXuTvGSRzXo8D0ALXO1RAww30Aq4JNjc-bEEtPSXQ==&ch=mmAaFfIT77NTcGQH32H-Qb23dDX39zaU0wFXun1uB8F4OSgDN5yUOg==). Make sure to sign up today!
---
| | |
---
|
---
---
CALL FOR VOLUNTEERS TO REBUILD MR. BROWN'S HOME
---
As you have previously read, we are the process of rebuilding Mr. Brown's home. Four years after sustaining damage caused by Harvey, the devastation remaining in 85-year-old Mr. Brown is heartbreaking. I came to know of Mr. Brown because of his plumbing needs stemming from the Texas Winter Storm (Uri) & power outages. His neighbors reached out to me about Mr. Brown because of the work Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization was doing for seniors. In partnership with another non-profit partner (West Street Recovery), we sent plumbers out to help him, but the plumbers alerted me to outrageous circumstances Mr. Brown faced in his home.
We have since removed Mr. Brown from the home, but are excited to announce that Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization is teaming up with SBP USA to assist with repairing/rebuilding Mr. Brown's home so that he may return to a safe, decent home! We need volunteers to sign up to assist with the repairs. Please sign up using this [link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H77vBjO18YkQQis_IovEEp8cRpdrC3hLxu9JMYxTLU8pLLtx-yHwHFj9uAfv2K2WcI7YnKd7wzMsRoRvO0J3HlssLfLWAL4OYOtBmu5nax4qc-iAiNC1oWnJUxUt7HkDZ5myFPEeTv8m-wk73N-48v-IAeiNyGC-S61mqldWGJt6Pn96rGrS1vtRWWWz3myBHLj4i7VfwyI=&c=xhvDW-9CB9B38vXuTvGSRzXo8D0ALXO1RAww30Aq4JNjc-bEEtPSXQ==&ch=mmAaFfIT77NTcGQH32H-Qb23dDX39zaU0wFXun1uB8F4OSgDN5yUOg==) to volunteer. This holiday season, we need volunteers to assist with rebuilding Mr. Brown's home on Mondays through Saturdays. We are grateful to Melissa Correa & KHOU for highlighting Mr. Brown's journey. To learn more about Mr. Brown's story, click the image below. Please sign up to help today!

---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H77vBjO18YkQQis_IovEEp8cRpdrC3hLxu9JMYxTLU8pLLtx-yHwHJUBIUEUnMyzSwZWS23GewY9px69l4SYKB_O1zhe26QDTR6_t5V3uXXlaiB2n8371c48xPA9RexjB8-rFQbbBSas6eAsm2m9KfVZIfjLcfgy8NoNlopYL-lTrfvPMx-TjA==&c=xhvDW-9CB9B38vXuTvGSRzXo8D0ALXO1RAww30Aq4JNjc-bEEtPSXQ==&ch=mmAaFfIT77NTcGQH32H-Qb23dDX39zaU0wFXun1uB8F4OSgDN5yUOg==)

In partnership with another non-profit partner (West Street Recovery), we sent plumbers out to help him, but the plumbers alerted me to outrageous circumstances Mr. Brown faced in his home. We have since removed Mr. Brown from the home, but are excited to announce that Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization is teaming up with SBP USA to assist with repairing/rebuilding Mr. Brown's home so that he may return to a safe, decent home! We need volunteers to sign up to assist with the repairs. Please sign up using this == to volunteer. This holiday season, we need volunteers to assist with rebuilding Mr. Brown's home on Mondays through Saturdays. We are grateful to Melissa Correa & KHOU for highlighting Mr. Brown's journey. To learn more about Mr. Brown's story, click the image below. Please sign up to help today! == | == | If you would like to support the Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization mission, please make a contribution to our 501(c)(3) organization by clicking on the Be The Solution button below. | | == | | | Sincerely, Amanda K Edwards | | | | | | | For More Updates, Follow my Social Media by Clicking on the Links Here | == == == == == | == Paid for by Amanda Edwards | | Amanda Edwards | PO Box 88228, Houston, TX 77288 | | Sent by mailto:akedwards00@yahoo.com

| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/920f9163a1e49cc3/cc9acd4ad3784619c3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
Friends,

Portland has gone from bad to worse in recent years. Today, it’s an absolute DISASTER.

Extreme-left rule has resulted in lawlessness, rampant crime, shuttered businesses, and dictatorial decrees that have trampled citizens’ rights...

**And make no mistake, if we don’t take back our country in 2022 the left WILL turn our entire nation into a Portland-esque nightmare!**

Nate has never been more concerned about America’s future. He’s all-in to win.

_Your support is crucial as we ramp up to BREAK the D.C. Democrats’ grip on power!_

**[Will you rush a](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/920f9163a1e49cc3/ab3e796936dcb899c3d6b838967d376c/37283)[ $5,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/920f9163a1e49cc3/40b6c3020ea196ffc3d6b838967d376c/37283)[ $10,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/920f9163a1e49cc3/6a3a06e1f1ac6ec7c3d6b838967d376c/37283)[ $25,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/920f9163a1e49cc3/d820a234956961f3c3d6b838967d376c/37283)[ or $50](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/920f9163a1e49cc3/06310712f6ea3053c3d6b838967d376c/37283)[ donation today to stand with Nate?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/920f9163a1e49cc3/e3b3c65e68983465c3d6b838967d376c/37283)**

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/920f9163a1e49cc3/ba14f89b11d8d53cc3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
This insanity in Washington, D.C. must be stopped. The Democrats have thrown open the border, ushered in an era of punishing 30-year high inflation, and launched endless attempts to infringe on our individual liberty.

Help ensure our great nation does not become the next Portland.

These people will DESTROY the America we know and love if we don’t defeat them!

**[Support our fight for Republican victory in the Sixth District.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/920f9163a1e49cc3/64b5cf59a49a53d3c3d6b838967d376c/37283) **We must do our part to take back the House and save our country.

name: Jay Jones
subject: I wanted you to hear this from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rh7jF6X4cN90qTDqvZNknEOmsGDUHW9Q5u_aI0_eTlA=/YJGnnf3hMwLxemKnPnHRumECwmWiLlaK8cKZyU28zVQ=)
---
Friend -- When I decided to run for office in 2017, it was because I felt deeply in my bones that Norfolk deserved a leader that could represent the diversity of the 89th District - I'm so proud that our district has young and old, Black and white, gay and straight, wealthy and working class, and everything and everyone in between. We've been going full steam since I first announced my candidacy in February 2017. Since then, I've campaigned actively across Virginia as Democrats took the majority in the General Assembly two years ago so we could usher in historic and long overdue policy changes in 2020, tackled reckonings with race and our conception of ourselves as a society after horrible injustices, ran in a statewide primary for the Democratic nomination for Attorney General, and went through another grueling election cycle advocating across the state for the values and ideals that I wholeheartedly believe in. We put a lot of miles on the car, spent a lot of time on the phone and on Zoom, gained more than a few additional gray hairs on my head, and met thousands and thousands of wonderful Virginians of all stripes from Lee County to the Eastern Shore. Along the way, I got married to my incredible wife Mavis. Words cannot express how much I owe her for her love, grace, mercy, strength, and understanding as I spent countless hours away from our home in Norfolk. Politics became a full-time job for me over the last four years as a member of the General Assembly; you try to be all things to all people, especially your constituents, and it can take its toll on other parts of your world. My wife and family braved those challenges together. In addition to my family, I owe enormous debts of gratitude to the countless people who have given their heart and soul to furthering our efforts. Because of you, we were able to build an incredible campaign that allowed us to raise record sums of money and bring together the many wings of the Democratic Party and the many corners of the Commonwealth. You all know who you are and I'm eternally grateful for your enduring support, encouragement, and friendship. When I announced our campaign for Attorney General, I told you all that decision was generations in the making. My family descends from slaves, my grandfather was one of the first Black lawyers in Virginia, and my father was one of the first to attend an all-white school in Norfolk. The work we do has always been as much about the next generation as our own. But that mission now takes on a new meaning as my wife and I gear up for a new frontier: we're expecting a baby this summer and we couldn't be more excited. Being parents is something that we have long wanted and we're so thrilled that our dream is on its way to becoming reality. As most parents can attest, bringing a child into this world is a massive time commitment and every second with your family and child is worth its weight in gold. I'm 32, a practicing attorney, and have given everything that I have in my soul to serving Norfolk and the Commonwealth since 2017. But my new job-to-be is as a father, and I'm ready to make that the highest priority in my life. To that end, I wanted you all to know that I'll be stepping away from the House of Delegates at the end of this year. I want to put my family first and be the best dad and the most supportive and present husband that I can possibly be. Serving in the House has been the experience of a lifetime - I have forged relationships that I will cherish forever. I've long talked about our capacity to rise to meet the moment in front of us and I know in my heart that this is the right decision for me at this point in time. Although my circumstances will be different, I'm not leaving public service. We have a lot of work to do in Virginia to make this the Commonwealth I know that it can be. Listening to each other, meeting people where they are and understanding their challenges, and finding solutions that bring this state into the 21st century remain as pressing issues as ever and I'm committed to being a part of that. Meet Our Moment, the initiative I started to train candidates of color and women for state and local offices, is off to a great start. We just held our first training last weekend and a dozen Virginians - half of whom are women and all of whom are Virginians of color - got a full day of intense programming that will serve them well in future runs. We're already gearing up to train a new cohort in Charlottesville in the spring. This effort is real and meaningful and just one of the many ways in which I'll be able to contribute to our politics over the next few years. As I look eagerly upon state elections under new lines in 2023 and federal races in 2024, I'll be training candidates, raising and contributing money, and doing anything and everything I can to help Democrats in Virginia. Believe me when I tell you that the movement and energy we created in 2021 and continue to build upon is just getting started. My commitment to helping those who have been marginalized, left out, and left behind remains stronger than ever and I maintain that our justice system is the best way to effect the changes we'd like to see. Let me be clear, our work is not done and I intend to serve the people of Virginia for years to come. And that work may well mean a run for Attorney General in 2025. I hope you know that I so appreciate you all and your love and support. God bless you all and this amazing Commonwealth. See you soon. Jay

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rh7jF6X4cN90qTDqvZNknEOmsGDUHW9Q5u_aI0_eTlA=/2LHuncfYYmtxIo_l31x8b56fhRdGk95aytb5OPVU_hQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rh7jF6X4cN90qTDqvZNknEOmsGDUHW9Q5u_aI0_eTlA=/iKj30wYo28AFj2TZHmGBH_N7s_GQoO0du6ePhwPP_fo=)[](https://act.myngp.com/el/rh7jF6X4cN90qTDqvZNknEOmsGDUHW9Q5u_aI0_eTlA=/VTHKa-Rrx8QGoK4vuYuDGy74jc7d_Mx15TqR4RJw_pE=) | Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones
---

Norfolk, VA 23501 United States

Warm regards, Team Joe Lombardo

name: Aaron Jacobs
subject: falling short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
I'm worried, folks. Last night we fell short of our mid-month goal, and now we're losing momentum in the most competitive Senate race of the cycle. To make things worse, this is the SECOND fundraising goal we've missed this month. **With Republicans spending MILLIONS against us, falling short could cost us our Senate majority.** The reality is, Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to take back the gavel, and Maggie Hassan is the GOP's number one target. Republicans have spent more attacking this campaign than any other Democratic incumbent this year. If we don't close our fundraising gap, and fast, it could tip the scales in the GOP’s favor. **[So can you please chip in $5 right now to help us make up ground?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39742679/321204174/-913685435?refcode=20211216_aj-short&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGE1Y2JkNi05MTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1ei1CZ5eLrN1Cn3paqa4YibHfECdqy2u1Qhe7Z3Nkj4=)** This is a make or break moment, team. Every goal we miss is an opportunity for the GOP to flip this seat and take back the Senate majority. subject: 0-1 for Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59029139:Jyb4qpENP:m:1:3103520637:CC1E019819B34A8474348403EF12E1D0:r "Headline") Peter, This is why you can never back down from the left. Weeks ago, I objected to the Democrat plan to force Women in America to register for the National Draft. They called me a sexist fool. They said that I hate women - even when they know it isn't true. Like children, the Left always screams and cries. But, like **an adult** , I stand true to my convictions, and eventually, I win. The White House has been forced to drop this requirement. We won this battle in America's culture war, but we have to keep fighting. This isn't the first time I have defeated the left's bad ideas, and it won't be the last. Sadly, this will make me EVEN MORE of a target for the left. **[If you support my fight against the liberal destruction of our values, I need to know that you are on my team before the end of the year so we can show the left that our conservative movement that supports traditional values and the life of the unborn will continue to oppose their efforts in 2022.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59029139:Jyb4qpENP:m:1:3103520637:CC1E019819B34A8474348403EF12E1D0:r "If you support my fight against the liberal
destruction of our values, I need to know that you are on my team before the end of the year so we can show the left that our conservative movement
that supports traditional values and the life of the unborn will continue to oppose their efforts in 2022.")** **_I will never apologize for standing up for my beliefs, and I will not allow them to destroy our nation to achieve their perverse agenda._** The left can call me as many names as they want - I have never wavered in my fight to preserve our values. **Please, I need to hear from you before the end of the year.** **[Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $45 will give me the resources to keep fighting the left's perverse agenda.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59029140:Jyb4qpENP:m:1:3103520637:CC1E019819B34A8474348403EF12E1D0:r "Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $45 will give
me the resources to keep fighting the left’s perverse agenda.")** Thank you for standing by me this year. For America's future,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59029139:Jyb4qpENP:m:1:3103520637:CC1E019819B34A8474348403EF12E1D0:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley

name: Karoline Leavitt
subject: Your chance to sit with President Trump at Mar-a-Lago
body:
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59032979:JSRN4pEN6:m:1:3253819041:A46603B967C9D3DDDEBEF08DAEB170FF:r)
---
Peter,
---
What if I told you that you could meet **President Trump** and Rep. Elise Stefanik at an exclusive event? Yes, you read that right! You have a chance to sit with _President Trump_ at his table _. _**But here 's the thing... there is only ONE seat left to win **and I told them I wanted to reach out to you first before they filled it. **On January 11th, one lucky patriot will have an all-expenses-paid trip to Mar-a-Lago in Palm Beach, Florida, sit with President Trump during a roundtable, and get their photo taken with him. Click here to enter this exclusive, once in a lifetime, contest >>**
---
| | [ENTER TO WIN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59032979:JSRN4pEN6:m:1:3253819041:A46603B967C9D3DDDEBEF08DAEB170FF:r)
---
**Do you want the chance to tell your family, friends, coworkers, or even your mailman, you got to meet President Trump?** If so, you seriously can't let this opportunity pass you by. Chairwoman Elise Stefanik is so excited to have you come, she'll even pay for your flight and hotel! But you need to hurry... **_thousands of other conservatives have already entered the contest._****[Here's how you can enter:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59032980:JSRN4pEN6:m:1:3253819041:A46603B967C9D3DDDEBEF08DAEB170FF:r "Here’s how you can enter:")**

Peter, I hope to see you there!

Thanks,

Karoline Leavitt

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Holy cow! Can you spot all the 🚩 flags, Derek?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Basically the entire GOP establishment, from the “moderates” to the extremists are throwing their support behind Dr. Oz.
#
Let’s play a game, Derek: Can you spot all the red flags in this tweet? 🚩
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38426?refcode=ema20211216-3848&t=1&akid=3848%2E434096%2E9AagiA)
🚩 Delaware -- one of Oz’s first fundraiser to be a U.S. Senator for Pennsylvania isn’t even in Pennsylvania
🚩 $1,000 MINIMUM donation just to attend
🚩 The co-hosts: former GOP Governor Mike Castle (a former “moderate” now endorsing Oz), FBI director Louie Freeh, Reagan spox Frank Ursomarso, and members of the DuPont family (of chemical company and major polluter DuPont)
So... yeah. Basically the entire GOP establishment, from the “moderates” to the extremists are throwing their support behind Dr. Oz.
**Here’s why we need to worry about that:** The people throwing their support behind Dr. Oz are his fellow millionaires and elites, who are able to throw nearly endless amounts of money into this race. Just a couple days ago it was reported that a Super PAC was created for that very purpose -- to funnel unlimited funds into Dr. Oz’s candidacy.
We don’t have endless money from millionaire donors, Derek. In fact, John refuses to accept any PAC money or contributions from the fossil fuel industry.
**That’s why donations from grassroots supporters like you make such a difference. Every dollar you give is another dollar against Dr. Oz and the GOP establishment funding his campaign.**
**[So, what do you say? Can you make a donation of $5 or more today to help cancel out the donation Dr. Oz is going to receive from this Delaware fundraising event? Please give before our mid-month deadline tonight at midnight, if you can.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38426?refcode=em20211216-3848&t=2&akid=3848%2E434096%2E9AagiA)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38426?refcode=em20211216-3848&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3848%2E434096%2E9AagiA)**
Thanks for all you’ve done to help us cancel out Dr. Oz’s self-funding this month, Derek. We couldn’t do it without you.
--Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211216-3848-footer&t=22&refcode2=3848_434096_9AagiA&akid=3848%2E434096%2E9AagiA)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: Basically the entire GOP establishment, from the “moderates” to the extremists are throwing their support behind Dr. Oz. Let’s play a game, Derek: Can you spot all the red flags in this tweet? 🚩 🚩 Delaware -- one of Oz’s first fundraiser to be a U.S. Senator for Pennsylvania isn’t even in Pennsylvania 🚩 $1,000 MINIMUM donation just to attend 🚩 The co-hosts: former GOP Governor Mike Castle (a former “moderate” now endorsing Oz), FBI director Louie Freeh, Reagan spox Frank Ursomarso, and members of the DuPont family (of chemical company and major polluter DuPont) So... yeah. Basically the entire GOP establishment, from the “moderates” to the extremists are throwing their support behind Dr. Oz. Here’s why we need to worry about that: The people throwing their support behind Dr. Oz are his fellow millionaires and elites, who are able to throw nearly endless amounts of money into this race. Just a couple days ago it was reported that a Super PAC was created for that very purpose -- to funnel unlimited funds into Dr. Oz’s candidacy. We don’t have endless money from millionaire donors, Derek. In fact, John refuses to accept any PAC money or contributions from the fossil fuel industry. That’s why donations from grassroots supporters like you make such a difference. Every dollar you give is another dollar against Dr. Oz and the GOP establishment funding his campaign. Thanks for all you’ve done to help us cancel out Dr. Oz’s self-funding this month, Derek. We couldn’t do it without you. --Team Fetterman | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Bill Lee's 10 Point Poll Drop
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Hi Peter,

Bill Lee is weak. Not just in the polls, but as a leader. He is out of touch with voters and constantly dodges his responsibility as Governor. The good news is that’s he’s slipping in the polls, even within his own party.

He is not the Governor we need. He's a clear threat to Tennessee's future with the dangerous policies he's put into place — from making it illegal for private companies to implement vaccination requirements to sitting on a multi-billion dollar surplus of taxpayer money and everything in between.

We need him out. Can you chip in $25 now to help us build a party that can take on Bill Lee and his conservative money making machine? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

His 10 point poll drop is bad news for Republicans, but good news for Tennesseans. People are starting to wake up to just how terrible he's been as a Governor, which means we need to seize the moment to push back as hard as we can into the New Year. We need your help to keep the pressure on so that his numbers decline even more.

Can you chip in now to help us fight back and finish strong into 2022? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Your support is why we keep fighting,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi5n4m02289u4pcrsvb0sfe4hsgnpservevkdlj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdjmao70cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65thkcarj5c3getj65d1k6pj72ptj64pm9olj69hm8clkethn5crl6confd5l6erjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb2pjh6aqr8dtnc1j35c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv7ejrv5o1h3amug04h5odtj6gkdvesvc8rhdevo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdjmao70cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2mc9sc899hmghai9viv6cdifbc4tddupa7hi0cg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdjmao70cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdlm7ksej4je0lcolfln88vmg93p6er7bi2vqs4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdjmao70cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: We must add four or more seats to the Supreme Court. Here’s why:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
If we don’t take action to rebalance the Supreme Court and restore its integrity, this broken institution will keep attacking basic constitutional rights, undermining the promise of equal justice under law, and threatening the foundations of our democracy. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39744044/321210748/-1964596891?ms=em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmYxZmQ2MC05NzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=thu3QHjt771RCPZSMfiMSyHe1T86m7loDEMnYH7zntU=&emci=aed7f559-975e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fff1fd60-975e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9027908)
---
From the filibuster to the Electoral College, the Republican party uses every tool they can to defy the will of the people — to make sure they can control Congress and the White House even when they get fewer votes. And now they’ve hijacked the Supreme Court, too. Mitch McConnell stole two seats to install a super-majority of far-right justices so they can ram through an unpopular, extreme agenda. Roe v. Wade is hanging by a thread, and that’s just the tip of the iceberg. If we don’t take action to rebalance the Supreme Court and restore its integrity, this broken institution will keep attacking basic constitutional rights, undermining the promise of equal justice under law, and threatening the foundations of our democracy. **So today, I’m announcing my support for a plan to add at least four seats to the Supreme Court.** The Constitution gives Congress the authority to do this, it’s already happened seven times before, and for the sake of our democracy, we must act now. [_**Add your name if you agree: It’s time to expand the Supreme Court.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39744045/321210749/-299026285?ms=EMZ2M_SCO_E_20211216_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmYxZmQ2MC05NzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=thu3QHjt771RCPZSMfiMSyHe1T86m7loDEMnYH7zntU=&emci=aed7f559-975e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fff1fd60-975e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9027908) If we don’t take action, the Supreme Court will keep on leaning into extremism and partisanship — with additional radical right-wing opinions on abortion, voting, dark money, unions, corporate power, and more. In the next year _alone_ , the Supreme Court is considering whether to nullify the right to an abortion, whether to bar states and cities from regulating guns on our streets, and whether to eviscerate the federal government’s abilities to fight climate change. The American people see what’s going on here — the Supreme Court has hit record lows in the eyes of the public. Rebalancing the Court is a necessary step to restore its credibility as an independent institution, one that works for the American people and not just for the wealthy and the powerful. Engraved on the entrance of the Supreme Court is a simple phrase: “equal justice under law.” Americans deserve a Court committed to that fundamental idea. One that values the settled constitutional rights of every American. One that protects democracy, instead of undermining it. One that gives working parents and millionaire executives the same fair shake. This extremist Court has shown that it is not interested in advancing the equal administration of justice. It’s time to rebalance the Supreme Court to create one that is. **Expansion is the only way to rebalance the Court after Republicans stole two seats and undermined its legitimacy. I’m supporting legislation by my friend Senator Markey that will expand the Court by 4 seats, restore its integrity, and ensure equal justice for all.** [_**I’ll keep up the fight, but I can’t do it alone. Add your name to say you’re in this fight to expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats and help defend our democracy.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39744046/321210750/-299026285?ms=EMZ2M_SCO_E_20211216_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmYxZmQ2MC05NzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=thu3QHjt771RCPZSMfiMSyHe1T86m7loDEMnYH7zntU=&emci=aed7f559-975e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fff1fd60-975e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9027908) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

From: **Susan Daggett Bennet** <_[info@michaelbennet.com](mailto:info@michaelbennet.com)_ >
Date: Tue, Dec 14, 2021 at 6:08 PM
Subject: Taking action for what matters
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

Friend,
Every year I watch my husband travel around Colorado, listening to his constituents about what matters most to them. Michael has listened, has heard and has acted.
When folks shared how massive forest fires threatened their livelihoods, he secured investments to fight the climate crisis and recover from wildfires. In response to concerns over the rising costs of raising a family, Michael expanded the Child Tax Credit and gave monthly tax cuts to working families. Addressing concerns about economic opportunity, he passed the infrastructure package, which will create scores of good-paying jobs all across Colorado. And he passed the largest single federal investment in high-speed internet expansion to help Americans compete on a global scale.
Because of those wins, Colorado families can better afford to provide for their children. And as a country, we’re going to invest in the infrastructure needed to build for the future; and we’ll create good-paying jobs so that more people can live the American dream.
But Michael is not done. He’s fighting to make sure that the expanded Child Tax Credit doesn’t end, and to lower the cost of prescription drugs. Meanwhile, the campaign is fighting to keep him in office and to fend off attacks against his record.
That’s where you come in: Michael’s team tells me we’ve fallen a bit behind and have $19,634 to make up before the end of the quarter.
**Will you pitch in before Thursday’s mid-month deadline to help Michael’s campaign close the gap? We need Michael in the Senate to keep delivering for Colorado families.**

clean_body: | = Hi folks, I wanted to make sure you saw my email on Tuesday. Thanks to everyone who pitched in a few dollars to help close the gap, Michael's team tells me we're now just $10,673 short. So if everyone reading this email right now chips in just $5, we’ll hit our goal in no time. Help send Michael back to the Senate so he can build on the progress he’s made for Colorado families by donating $5 — or whatever works for your budget — today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thanks for taking the time to hear me out. I’m so proud of my husband and with your support, he’ll continue to do great things. Susan \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Susan Daggett Bennet <mailto:info@michaelbennet.com > Date: Tue, Dec 14, 2021 at 6:08 PM Subject: Taking action for what matters To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Friend, Every year I watch my husband travel around Colorado, listening to his constituents about what matters most to them. Michael has listened, has heard and has acted. When folks shared how massive forest fires threatened their livelihoods, he secured investments to fight the climate crisis and recover from wildfires. In response to concerns over the rising costs of raising a family, Michael expanded the Child Tax Credit and gave monthly tax cuts to working families. Addressing concerns about economic opportunity, he passed the infrastructure package, which will create scores of good-paying jobs all across Colorado. And he passed the largest single federal investment in high-speed internet expansion to help Americans compete on a global scale. Because of those wins, Colorado families can better afford to provide for their children. And as a country, we’re going to invest in the infrastructure needed to build for the future; and we’ll create good-paying jobs so that more people can live the American dream. But Michael is not done. He’s fighting to make sure that the expanded Child Tax Credit doesn’t end, and to lower the cost of prescription drugs. Meanwhile, the campaign is fighting to keep him in office and to fend off attacks against his record. That’s where you come in: Michael’s team tells me we’ve fallen a bit behind and have $19,634 to make up before the end of the quarter. Will you pitch in before Thursday’s mid-month deadline to help Michael’s campaign close the gap? We need Michael in the Senate to keep delivering for Colorado families. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thanks for all your help, Susan Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

The timing could not be worse because it's almost the end of the year, and even though it's the holiday season, we're also facing our next urgent fundraising deadline. And going into 2022, Republicans are going to be eyeing how much we can raise over the next couple of weeks before we have to send in our report to protect this seat.
We can't have a slump in fundraising when our next FEC deadline is coming up quickly and we need to show we're well-prepared to defeat any GOP extremist they throw up against us. name: ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5jlhftacth46oaqb8javoifr3u8fchuf3t8ve0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdjmeor6cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztng7emq1ukj1s5qjobgore8muprg05dn05dofag_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdjmeor6cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1i13ag98u1lg0pvo63bfao6c9tgttpk2f713s7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdjmeor6cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Re: Friends, do you know the average cost of childcare in your city? It's alarming...
disclaimer_text: paid for and budgeted accordingly
body:
I was shocked myself. Before my opponent disparages childcare programs with name-calling and false labels, I'm extending an open invitation for Jack to debate me on the merits of the child tax credit, universal pre-k, and childcare entitlements in a town hall for working families. I want him to look parents in the eye and tell them why he oppose affordable childcare. **We must address the debilitating cost of childcare for Northern Michigan, UP families** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745576/321217651/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=) **_Our district’s average monthly cost of childcare is over $700.00 per child – sometimes costing parents half their salary to work and raise children. To reduce poverty, working families deserve relief. _** [HELP ME HELP WORKING FAMILIES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745578/321217654/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745580/321217656/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=) [ON-CLICK IMMEDIATE $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745582/321217658/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=) Good morning, Friends. According to [**Rural Insights**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745584/321217660/1119709795?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=&emci=ceeb6b70-985e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bca71f2c-9c5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) , the cost of childcare in the six largest counties in the UP [**averages $752.04**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745586/321217662/-934716602?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=&emci=ceeb6b70-985e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bca71f2c-9c5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427). That is $9,024.48 annually for _one_ child: “If you are working at a job paying $10 per hour, you make $20,800 a year, and your child care is almost half of your pay before paying your rent and purchasing family food. If you make $15 per hour, you make $31,200 a year, and your child care costs would take up almost 30% of your budget. “Many families with one, two or more children say their child care costs are more than their rental or mortgage payments. “We hear from many working families all around the UP about how childcare is a major issue for them. “The federal child tax credit provides families $3,000 to $3,600 per child (been in existence since March) is set to expire this coming January 1st. Some states already have their own child care tax credits, and some states have existing legislation to provide a child care credit–including Michigan. “The federal and state childcare tax credits have done an excellent job in reducing child poverty in our country. “Whisperers tell us that our federal government and state leaders need to focus on this issue that is so important to working families. If you are concerned about this issue, you can let your federal and state elected leaders know your opinion.” – **Rural Insights, David Haynes [**[**RuralInsights.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745588/321217664/-934716602?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=&emci=ceeb6b70-985e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bca71f2c-9c5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427)**]** I support [**childcare provisions in the Build Back Better (BBB) Framework**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745590/321217666/396623375?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=&emci=ceeb6b70-985e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bca71f2c-9c5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) because they support us in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula and help us build a better future through the success of our children. In addition to the child tax credit, the BBB legislation also creates childcare and early learning entitlement programs for children under six who have not yet started kindergarten.
* For eligible families who want to participate, this means access to affordable, high-quality childcare in the setting that best meets their needs.
* For Michigan, it will mean federal funding to support supply-building and a phased-in expansion of income eligibility.

It isn’t free. The programs are paid by corporate taxes and taxes on those making over $400,000 annually. Reducing poverty, caring for our children, and providing relief to hard-working families is taxpayer money well-spent. We will see significant economic benefits as it helps parents get back to work and pursue more opportunities for their families. Inaccessible and unaffordable childcare has adverse economic impacts. It causes higher employee absence rates and turnover, postponement of education or training opportunities, reduction of hours, and ultimately, working-parents leaving the workforce. Unfortunately, COVID-19 has only exacerbated the problem. Reliable access to childcare can generate an additional $79,000 in lifetime earnings for parents. In addition, single parents who receive assistance for childcare payments are nearly **40% more likely to maintain employment** over two years than those who do not. **Before my opponent disparages these programs with name-calling and false labels, I'm extending an open invitation for Jack to debate me on the merits of the child tax credit, universal pre-k, and childcare entitlements[in a ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745592/321217668/42169985?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=&emci=ceeb6b70-985e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bca71f2c-9c5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427)[town hall for working families](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745594/321217670/42169985?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=&emci=ceeb6b70-985e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bca71f2c-9c5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427).** **I want him to look parents in the eye and tell them why he oppose affordable childcare.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745595/321217672/42169985?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=&emci=ceeb6b70-985e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bca71f2c-9c5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) It’s time our district has a leader in Congress working hard for hard-working families. We need quality childcare, health care, and education, and they need to be paid for and budgeted accordingly. I will work as your Representative in Washington with a vision for the future to improve the lives of Northern Michiganders and Yoopers. As for my opponent, I am sure he will name-call these programs without any facts. So, this is an open invitation. The great people of our district deserve to hear it directly from both of us. So, let’s debate. Let’s invite independent fact-checkers and open the floor to comments and questions from parents, so you and I can learn how to improve the lives of those we serve. [HELP ME HELP WORKING FAMILIES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745596/321217674/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745597/321217728/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745598/321217729/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=) [ON-CLICK IMMEDIATE $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745599/321217730/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=) You may [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ceeb6b70-985e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/bca71f2c-9c5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E3MWYyYy05YzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzihgQ2LydLyxHofBRCpLoJ5AkHtbXxC_mjNq9tSWHg=&id=116937387). name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: December 31
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Today, I’m asking you to rush a donation to support my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. Let me explain why in just two sentences.

This is the final FEC deadline month of the year, and shortly after December 31, we are legally required to report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. Ours is the only Democratic campaign beating Ron Johnson in the polls right now, election experts moved our race from Lean R to Toss-Up, and we are hearing he is going to announce his re-election decision very soon. We have to be ready.

**Click any button below to make a contribution today and help us prepare for the critical task we have ahead of us to flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat from red to blue:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39745857/321218935/-1116050000?refcode=em21_211216_mm7_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211216_mm7_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTFlNmFjOS05ZDVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hc-83a6zwZ8n6QuR_7low5OR4VzN7rZuxsf18P-o9wk=)

clean_body: Today, I’m asking you to rush a donation to support my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. Let me explain why in just two sentences. This is the final FEC deadline month of the year, and shortly after December 31, we are legally required to report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. Ours is the only Democratic campaign beating Ron Johnson in the polls right now, election experts moved our race from Lean R to Toss-Up, and we are hearing he is going to announce his re-election decision very soon. We have to be ready. Click any button below to make a contribution today and help us prepare for the critical task we have ahead of us to flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat from red to blue: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you. — Sarah Godlewski Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

clean_body: Did you see Joe’s message this week about the new polling that once again shows we’re on track to BEAT Sisolak next year? | | | | | | | == | | Peter, Did you see Joe's message this week about the new polling that once again shows we're on track to BEAT Sisolak next year? If so, then you weren't alone... Check out the national media buzz we're picking up here in Nevada as our mission continues to build momentum! | | | == | == | "Lombardo displayed a ten-point lead over Sisolak, showing 51 percent to 41 percent in the polls when the respondents were asked which candidate they would vote for in the 2022 gubernatorial election if the election was held today." Sheriff Joe's message of supporting law enforcement, stopping lawless upside down policies, and keeping us safe is getting a leg up over the liberal agenda here in our state. He now leads Sisolak in the polls - and even leads all of the Republican primary candidates as well! We need your support, though, to see these trends continue and keep OUR mission at the top of the pack. == | | | == | | | == | Thank you for the continued support, Team Joe Lombardo | \---------Forwarded Message------- From: Sheriff Joe Lombardo Date: Mon, December 13, 2021 at 7:00 PM Subject: POLL ALERT: We're on track to win in 2022! | Peter, More HUGE poll numbers came out today that captured just how much momentum our mission is building here in Nevada... This new state of the race poll shows that we are poised to BEAT Sisolak at the ballot box in November! | | | == | Take a look: | == | It's impossible to overstate just how big this is... The numbers are showing that Keeping Nevada Safe is very much within our grasp! This latest polling metric even has us leading Sisolak by a whopping 10 Points \- far more than any other candidate in the primary field. Our campaign is continuing to show just how formidable this mission to Keep Nevada Safe truly is. Folks are latching on to the message, and we're making it clear once again that we're the front runners here in our state! But we still can't rest on our efforts. Sisolak and his team are going to see these numbers as well, and it's going to make them double down on their efforts to try to stop our momentum. I'm confident that we can hold them off - but only if we keep up the energy and enthusiasm that got us to this point. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thank you for continuing to get us closer to victory, Sheriff Joe Lombardo | | Lombardo for Governor | == | == == == | | Lombardo for Governor | P.O. | | _**Folks — here’s 5 reasons why we need you to chip in $5.**_ 1\. Susie Lee is running in the **most competitive congressional district** in the country. 2\. name: Laura Hernandez Holmes, campaign manager
subject: Be the first to get your yard sign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter, can we send you a free yard sign?
We just got our first batch of Team Greg yard signs and wanted you to be the first to get one!
It’s as easy as this: sign up at the link below with your address and we’ll ship it to you for FREE if you live in TX-35 (and it’s only $15 if you live outside of TX-35).
Click here to get your FREE Greg Casar for Congress yard sign! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZCIPqOqt3U-zBKof-IaQIA2]
Every day more people across TX-35 are finding Greg’s campaign and are excited to join this movement we’re building. They’re ready for leadership in TX-35 who will fight for them and their families and deliver on the important issues like a $15 minimum wage, Medicare for All, and good jobs here in Texas.
These yard signs will help us spread the word and get folks excited about voting in the March primary election. Click here to sign up for your free yard sign and be the first to show your pride for this movement!
Thank you,
-Laura
Laura Hernandez Holmes
Campaign Manager - Greg Casar for Congress

|

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

Button")

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59032194:Jhpq0pEYN:m:1:3299561967:DB102D3746953AB3D706D922AD0A4D9D:r "Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5,
$10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59032194:Jhpq0pEYN:m:1:3299561967:DB102D3746953AB3D706D922AD0A4D9D:r "BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember,
all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59032194:Jhpq0pEYN:m:1:3299561967:DB102D3746953AB3D706D922AD0A4D9D:r "Generic Button")
---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59032194:Jhpq0pEYN:m:1:3299561967:DB102D3746953AB3D706D922AD0A4D9D:r "I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please,
rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.")**

Thank you,

name: Val Demings (personal note)
subject: here's my story:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Friend: This is a longer but especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.

I was raised in Jacksonville, FL – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've got to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked hard. And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had faith. I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.

That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me: "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – never tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.

I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.
Never tire. These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.

Never tire, I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.

This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians. I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.

So I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is resources. The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?refcode=jtk1965-fr-text

Thank you for being in this with me. Never tire.

Val Demings

Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue.

Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate.

I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue?

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?refcode=jtk1965-fr-text

If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, please visit my campaign store:

https://store.valdemings.com/?refcode=jtk1965-fr-text

Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ibu2rS35CUKF9kop2dIjsg2] , or click here to unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d1c00d6f-fe5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/22017ae4-9e5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjAxN2FlNC05ZTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8VmmzTF2WHTW8JXHttxmthYjX8r26jDuBjykO9sF8iI=&id=123159867 .
Val Demings for U.S. Senate
P. O. Box 536926
Orlando, FL 32853
United States
Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate
