name: Karen Bass
subject: A city where everyone can thrive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Hello --

As we approach 2022, I wanted to reach out and say thank you. I am so grateful to have you on my team, and to have received the endorsements of local leaders and organizers alike including Congressman Adam Schiff and Labor and Civil Rights Leader Dolores Huerta just last week. But team, the primary is right around the corner, and I don't plan to waste a single moment until then.

This is still anyone's race. I'm determined to put our best foot forward in the new year to make sure our message reaches every single voter in every single neighborhood. But that takes serious resources, from funding digital ad campaigns and volunteer efforts to sending campaign emails just like this one.

**[We can't afford to miss the moment and start next year behind, so that's why I'm reaching out to you today. My finance team tells me we are only $1,740 short of our mid-month fundraising goal. Will you chip in $3, or whatever you can, before tonight at midnight to help us close the gap?](https://act.myngp.com/el/IbhZ7dids6hUyYgsn-x5YLS1EK2gyOBeta1MFQE3rTw=/dCvOsoH260Ds5AsgcSNRSL2dE0TQwKzqz7lGBVWcbIE=?ms=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&refcode=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&source=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

Thirty years ago, I saw a city in crisis and stepped up to lead. Now, I find our city yet again at a crossroads, and we need to prioritize keeping families and small businesses safe as we move forward. Will we become a leader in the fight for social and economic justice? Or will we stick to the status quo and continue to let inequities in housing, education, and more hold us back?

That's the question I'm asking Angelenos right now. And so many folks have already come forward to say, "I'm ready."

We're ready to build a coalition of activists, organizations, and leaders who believe in our vision for Los Angeles -- a city where everyone can thrive. We're ready to fight for a city that provides resources and opportunities to help get folks who may have stumbled back on their feet. But to make that vision a reality, I need supporters like you to take part.

**[Tonight's mid-month deadline is the last of the year. And we can't afford to come up short. Will you do your part by chipping in $3 right away to help our campaign reach our $8,000 goal? If you're an L.A. resident, the city could match your contribution 6-to-1.](https://act.myngp.com/el/IbhZ7dids6hUyYgsn-x5YLS1EK2gyOBeta1MFQE3rTw=/dCvOsoH260Ds5AsgcSNRSL2dE0TQwKzqz7lGBVWcbIE=?ms=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&refcode=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&source=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

Let's go,

Karen

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/IbhZ7dids6hUyYgsn-x5YLS1EK2gyOBeta1MFQE3rTw=/dCvOsoH260Ds5AsgcSNRSL2dE0TQwKzqz7lGBVWcbIE=?ms=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&refcode=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&source=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})
---

All solicitations are by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 and not by Congressman Schiff.

Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far.
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrgl0629d793ppq91lp00fclmelpp2kf2legkss0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdge8oj1c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z828dqjs3j4d1koa0s12d1d0666fbkrga80n7in8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdge8oj1c1h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z922v4abikgirlvck9oacu72aqf0e53ll65oa6j8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdge8oj1c1h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

|

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z1hp2v9ug28cu0paauoo535mpfshq6jfp9cq6nvg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhegsj8svsou8crngfgdlejjjcse5eepb58i0038_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cjhm1p32c5g649fg)

subject: Abortion Bans in Texas will cause a domino effect…
body:
Some Handmaid's Tale sh*t

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39749163/321233348/1300596418?refcode=211216_FR_teafund_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmNWYyMWNiLWE5NWUtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XoRxBvSt4qM8v9Gh-LwmstZ6_nkQ7Ic0vrpH2Xcbr-0=)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39749164/321233349/-1925450508?refcode=211216_FR_teafund_IMG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmNWYyMWNiLWE5NWUtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XoRxBvSt4qM8v9Gh-LwmstZ6_nkQ7Ic0vrpH2Xcbr-0=) Peter,

**Our justice system is failing the people of Texas and Women’s Rights are at stake.**

Last week, the Supreme Court left Texas’ ban on most abortions in place. This is what happens when conservative justices put their political views before their country. We have Donald Trump to thank for those three...

This decision gives people the ability to sue abortion clinis and anyone who “aides or abets” an abortion performed after an active heartbeat is detected. This is typically around six weeks of pregnancy - the moment most women find out they are pregnant.

Potentially overturning the 50-year-old ruling of Roe v. Wade is like taking 1,000 steps back for women in our country. Lawmakers today are more concerned with controlling women than they are about the actual children being born. The GOP cares about embryos. Not lives.

**And we’ve said it once and we will say it again. Abortion bans are f*cking racist.**

These laws ultimately affect low-income brown women more than anyone else. These groups of women have less access to safe healthcare and cannot afford the extreme costs of childcare. When have we ever seen these pieces of legislation followed by efforts to reform our foster care and adoption system?

**It makes us sick.**

We don’t have time to sit around and wait for other states to follow in Texas and Ohio’s footsteps. We know that is coming. And we will not let it happen. We will elect progressives who will fight for women’s reproductive rights and stand up against GOP dictators.

**[If you are as upset as we are, please consider donating $3 to the TEA Fund – an organization we cannot support enough. TEA (Texas Equal Access) Fund provides financial and emotional support to people seeking abortion care, because supporting abortion is an act of compassion. Would you chip in today and help fight for the women of Texas?>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39749165/321233350/-1925450508?refcode=211216_FR_teafund_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmNWYyMWNiLWE5NWUtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XoRxBvSt4qM8v9Gh-LwmstZ6_nkQ7Ic0vrpH2Xcbr-0=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **______[DONATE TO THE TEA FUND](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39749166/321233351/-1925450508?refcode=211216_FR_teafund_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmNWYyMWNiLWE5NWUtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XoRxBvSt4qM8v9Gh-LwmstZ6_nkQ7Ic0vrpH2Xcbr-0=)** We cannot thank you enough. **_Barrier To Entry PAC_**

Last week, the Supreme Court left Texas’ ban on most abortions in place. This is what happens when conservative justices put their political views before their country. We have Donald Trump to thank for those three... This decision gives people the ability to sue abortion clinis and anyone who “aides or abets” an abortion performed after an active heartbeat is detected. This is typically around six weeks of pregnancy - the moment most women find out they are pregnant. Potentially overturning the 50-year-old ruling of Roe v. Wade is like taking 1,000 steps back for women in our country. Lawmakers today are more concerned with controlling women than they are about the actual children being born. The GOP cares about embryos. Not lives. And we’ve said it once and we will say it again. Abortion bans are fcking racist. These laws ultimately affect low-income brown women more than anyone else. These groups of women have less access to safe healthcare and cannot afford the extreme costs of childcare. When have we ever seen these pieces of legislation followed by efforts to reform our foster care and adoption system? It makes us sick. We don’t have time to sit around and wait for other states to follow in Texas and Ohio’s footsteps. We know that is coming. And we will not let it happen. subject: The CORE Act - Bennet fails to deliver for Colorado AGAIN!
body:
Sensible public lands legislation needs to work for everyone
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KqsOA2l02LKhbNfWn704w38V1YSg8gNMz48AbZ_J25gnhe2lDR3XhKPqBwjXgHn3V6srOND-Oqc5Du1e86rAQ9yIvBHuydpN0lDJlT3KOPL6cC8LWAz60Aa15SEVgM8KCp_fuZz3jinHCmCkNU802M6JA1cUMaYL&c=N9oviyKPk0NGmHmwzdUqn2zcRySmwENNaPmomsHzpz-lPitf0ja-NQ==&ch=kidq8l_wQsK2kDr5BnvvHAUvWXZv0F8FPChP76hVR02PoePEb-0i2w==)

---

# Bennet fails Colorado AGAIN!
---
With one-party rule in Washington, Michael Bennet still can't get anything done.
Bennet has been half-heartedly trying to pass the CORE Act--CORE stands for Colorado Outdoor Recreation and Economy. It's been passed in the House twice and was included in the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) set to be voted on soon by the Senate. The key word here is "was."
The measure, intended to expand protection of public lands, was removed from the NDAA last week. In a Democratic controlled Senate, the bill did not impress Bennet's own party enough to leave it in. Yet, the Left will blame Republicans as they always do--namely former Sen. Cory Gardner--for opposing it, which is patently untrue.
In fact, Senator Gardner has a much stronger track record of supporting public lands legislation than Bennet. During his term, he sponsored the landmark conservation legislation called the Great American Outdoors Act. This legislation will use revenues from energy development to provide up to $1.9 billion a year for five years to provide needed maintenance for critical facilities and infrastructure in our national parks, forests, wildlife refuges, recreation areas, and Native American schools. It will also use royalties from offshore oil and natural gas to permanently fund the Land and Water Conservation Fund with as much as $900 million a year to invest in conservation and recreation opportunities across the country.
Don't let Michael Bennet fool you. Meaningful legislation that's good for our state and nation can be passed--Bennet just can't seem to get it done.
As your next U.S. Senator, I will fight for our public lands and bring forth meaningful and balanced legislation forward that will benefit Colorado. You have my promise.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Real investments in Central Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Eiie4kf4FYhrC0-8VQAgLOqZVK2SGtFeYTELxVKo6p8=/Rhdl8IApiLwWBVFu8Ir0MeyCbls4xV03AJVpLqBFOw8=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211216-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

The investments we're making in Central Virginia today, through the bipartisan infrastructure bill, will pay dividends for our communities.

I know a lot of people think of this bill and how it will repair roads and bridges -- which it will -- but the projects this investment will help grow are going to make an impact in VA-07, and the country, for generations to come.

Recently, I toured the site of the Woodman Road extension project with Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg. **This project alone will help connect multiple residential neighborhoods, areas of commerce, a park, and the future GreenCity ecodistrict.**

And these infrastructure investments are also direct investments in job opportunities. In fact, a vital part of this bill includes resources to help train new truckers. This kind of investment not only helps Central Virginians with jobs, but it strengthens our economy and our national readiness.

We're making real progress for Central Virginia and the country. As always, I appreciate your support.
---

name: Tobias Read
subject: Prioritizing in-person learning
body:
There’s a crisis in our schools, and we need to start treating it with the urgency it demands.
---
| | Dear Peter, There’s a crisis in our schools, and we need to start treating it **with the urgency it demands**. _**[I wrote to the Oregon Way about why we need to keep our kids in schools](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39749830/321239350/1192455022?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjg2OWM1ZS1hYzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xPME_m34KaatGCQSPlJtOjhWjvsYjNXGxkSoVfYi0Hg=&emci=c3b53b27-a65e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9b869c5e-ac5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=30662126)**_ and how I think we have to support them and the teachers who educate them. I’m running for Governor because I know that our students and teachers deserve better, and I have a plan to get there. **As your Governor, I’ll act day one to take this problem head on.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39749831/321239352/-169693661?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjg2OWM1ZS1hYzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xPME_m34KaatGCQSPlJtOjhWjvsYjNXGxkSoVfYi0Hg=&emci=c3b53b27-a65e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9b869c5e-ac5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=30662126) As a candidate for Governor with kids in public school, I see first hand how my kids and their classmates have struggled with remote learning and transitioning back to in-person instruction. And the data confirms it. Fewer students are on track to graduate high school, and test scores across grade levels have fallen. Teachers are overworked and under-resourced, and there is an escalating mental health crisis that must be addressed. **We need to get emergency support out to school districts yesterday.** But we also need to get innovative in bringing an end to the teacher shortage in the near and long term. We can’t allow our students to fall further behind. In short: **we need to do more and we need to do it as soon as possible.** That’s what I will do as your next Governor. **[Will you take a moment to share my op-ed with your friends and neighbors?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39749834/321239353/-169693661?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjg2OWM1ZS1hYzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xPME_m34KaatGCQSPlJtOjhWjvsYjNXGxkSoVfYi0Hg=&emci=c3b53b27-a65e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9b869c5e-ac5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=30662126)**
Thank you,

---

---

* * *
| [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39749840/321239359/1385179419?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjg2OWM1ZS1hYzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xPME_m34KaatGCQSPlJtOjhWjvsYjNXGxkSoVfYi0Hg=)

name: Gary Black
subject: I'll put my experience to work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/265e89f5c77acd0d/c16303012abddd3ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — One of the reasons I’m running for the U.S. Senate is to stop Joe Biden and Raphael Warnock’s totally failed economic agenda. **

---
Biden and Warnock have paid people not to work, spent trillions when we can’t afford it, refused to break our dependence on Communist China, and assaulted American energy production. The result? Sky-high gas prices, inflation at a 39-year high, a labor shortage, and a supply chain crisis. And now they want to spend trillions more on their so-called “Build Back Better” plan. **[Will you donate now to help us put an end to this?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/265e89f5c77acd0d/cee959ac3d74d14cc3d6b838967d376c/37793) ****When I'm in the U.S. Senate, I’ll take immediate action to do the following: ** ✅ Break our dependence on Chinese manufacturing.

✅ Renew American energy independence. ✅ Stand in the gap to stop regressive spending. As Georgia’s Agriculture Commissioner, I’ve led the charge to expand jobs, create new markets, and get government out of the way so businesses can grow and thrive. **In the U.S. Senate, I’ll put that experience to work to create opportunity, not dependency, and to put Americans first. ** [**If you’re with me on this, then I hope you’ll fuel our efforts here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/265e89f5c77acd0d/58d04acb47890ec2c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/265e89f5c77acd0d/0cf64e4bd0816c2bc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/265e89f5c77acd0d/b1dc0ff34a718798c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | _**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/265e89f5c77acd0d/6d5b3bc160186db5c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=265e89f5c77acd0d&d=a57d3e3f70e3f3cec3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=265e89f5c77acd0d).

Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts. With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below. We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, .

our top supporters. Thank you for being such a big part of our team to
flip Ohio’s open Senate seat blue.

FROM THE ROAD

SUNDAY TRADITIONS: Watching the Browns game, throwing the football with
Brady, and some good homemade sauce ready on the stove.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6258?t=1010&amount=25&akid=1723%2E3611125%2EwYtGgV ]Tim and Brady making sauce

VETS FOR TIM: Recently, we launched our Vets for Tim constituency group.
We’re proud to stand with the women and men who fought and sacrificed so
much for our country. As Senator, Tim will never stop fighting to honor
their bravery and dedication to our nation.

America in Kettering to fight back against local manufacturer Tenneco’s plan to
shut down their plant and ship jobs overseas. The decision is a slap in the face
to workers and Tim is fighting like hell to make sure it ends here.

It is critical that we head into 2022 on strong footing to keep Indiana RED, and help flip the House RED in the mid-term elections. The Democrats are going to be coming after Hoosiers in every way they can, because they hate that we’re thriving in Indiana!

name: Giffords
subject: Gun safety has never been more important than it is today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It's been more than ten years since a gunman tried to assassinate Gabby during a meeting with her constituents.
#

Friends,
It's been more than ten years since a gunman tried to assassinate Gabby during a meeting with her constituents. While she survived, six did not, and 12 others were injured.
For Gabby, the road to recovery has been difficult, but she gets stronger and tackles new challenges every day.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?refcode=em211216-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1343_3935704__ic3FA&akid=1343%2E3935704%2E_ic3FA)
After Gabby resigned from Congress, she planned to focus on rebuilding her strength—but then a gunman killed 26 people, including 20 children, at Sandy Hook Elementary School. Since that tragedy, Gabby has dedicated herself to making sure that no other family would have to experience losing a loved one to gun violence.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?refcode=em211216-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1343_3935704__ic3FA&akid=1343%2E3935704%2E_ic3FA)
After Sandy Hook, we were disappointed—furious, even—when a minority of Senators blocked a proposal that would have closed the loopholes in our background check system and made it harder for people to access guns who shouldn’t have them.
But we also have won some great victories. Together, we've played a role in helping gun safety champions win up and down the ballot in local, state, and federal races and worked hard to pass lifesaving legislation in states across the country and in the US House of Representatives.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?refcode=em211216-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=1343_3935704__ic3FA&akid=1343%2E3935704%2E_ic3FA)
Gun safety has never been more important than it is today. We are facing an uphill battle against the gun lobby and their efforts to block sensible legislation that would save American lives. But they are no match for us if we stand together. Not now. That's why we are asking:
[**Can you make $3 to Giffords PAC today as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of the gun lobby's influence in Congress and that you are ready to fight for change that will make our communities safer from gun violence?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?refcode=em211216-1-subs&t=4&refcode2=1343_3935704__ic3FA&akid=1343%2E3935704%2E_ic3FA)
Thank you for all of your support,
The team at Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?refcode=em211216-1-subs&t=5&refcode2=1343_3935704__ic3FA&akid=1343%2E3935704%2E_ic3FA)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1343%2E3935704%2E_ic3FA) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: ICYMI: Endorsement Alert, Tim Hugo endorsed my campaign for Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
body:
I am proud to be endorsed by my friend, Delegate Tim Hugo! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f59dca55ad7b/one-week-in-5394635?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
| **Dear Friend,** **Do you remember the video of the pediatric neurosurgeon AND Virginia Governor, Ralph Northam nonchalantly defending a bill lifting restrictions on third trimester abortions including up to birth? _“The infant would be delivered, the infant would be kept comfortable, the infant would be resuscitated if that’s what the mother and family desired.”_ His words haunt my heart, but they certainly didn’t bother the _Darling of Planned Parenthood and NARAL, Jennifer Wexton. _ ** **While Wexton supports taxpayer funded and third trimester abortions, I have a lifetime record of supporting babies and their vulnerable moms. I’ve been on the front lines of this fight for decades standing shoulder to shoulder with strong pro-life advocates like Delegate Tim Hugo. That’s why I am so proud to announce his endorsement of my campaign for Congress. **
---
|
---
| **“Jeanine Lawson is a trusted conservative and a longtime advocate for life. As an adoptive mom and founding board member of a local crisis pregnancy center, she's a proud defender of life. We can trust Jeanine to passionately oppose third trimester and taxpayer funded abortions in Washington being pushed by Nancy Pelosi, Jennifer Wexton, & The Squad. She has my full support." -Tim Hugo**
---
| [Donate $10 Today!](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=a0a7cfb9e2&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $10 Today!")
---
| [Donate $25 Today!](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=81b9fe175f&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $25 Today!")
---
| [Donate $50 Today!](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=dbbd344627&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $50 Today!")
---
| [Donate $100 Today!](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=0313ac5a74&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $100 Today!")
---
| [Donate Another Amount Today!](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=88a1eeeb5b&e=fc83fb200d "Donate Another Amount Today!")
---
| **Wexton’s extreme abortion views have no place in Virginia, or anywhere. I need your help to defeat Jennifer Wexton, take back Congress and stand up for Virginia’s most vulnerable.** **My pro-life positions are paramount to who I am. As the mother of an adopted son and aunt to Abbie, who has Down Syndrome, I will remain relentlessly dedicated to promoting a culture of life. I am proud to live my faith and support crisis pregnancy centers to educate women about the options that they have to protect life.** **In Congress, I won’t back down on life. It’s too important.** **But I need your help to get there.** **[Chip in $25, $50, $100, or any other amount](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=cce7329e19&e=fc83fb200d)you can afford to help STOP abortion extremist Jennifer Wexton.**
---
| [Let's Fire Nancy Pelosi & Her Planned Parenthood Darling, Jennifer Wexton](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=08c4b0be7b&e=fc83fb200d "Let's Fire Nancy Pelosi & Her Planned Parenthood Darling, Jennifer Wexton")
---
| **Every contribution will help me stand up for the pro-life cause and oppose the radical abortion lobby funding my opponent’s campaign.** **Best,
** **Jeanine Lawson**
---
| | [Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
---

clean_body: I am proud to be endorsed by my friend, Delegate Tim Hugo! | | | | | | Dear Friend, Do you remember the video of the pediatric neurosurgeon AND Virginia Governor, Ralph Northam nonchalantly defending a bill lifting restrictions on third trimester abortions including up to birth? “The infant would be delivered, the infant would be kept comfortable, the infant would be resuscitated if that’s what the mother and family desired.” His words haunt my heart, but they certainly didn’t bother the Darling of Planned Parenthood and NARAL, Jennifer Wexton. While Wexton supports taxpayer funded and third trimester abortions, I have a lifetime record of supporting babies and their vulnerable moms. I’ve been on the front lines of this fight for decades standing shoulder to shoulder with strong pro-life advocates like Delegate Tim Hugo. That’s why I am so proud to announce his endorsement of my campaign for Congress. | | “Jeanine Lawson is a trusted conservative and a longtime advocate for life. As an adoptive mom and founding board member of a local crisis pregnancy center, she's a proud defender of life. We can trust Jeanine to passionately oppose third trimester and taxpayer funded abortions in Washington being pushed by Nancy Pelosi, Jennifer Wexton, & The Squad. She has my full support." -Tim Hugo | "Donate $10 Today!" | "Donate $25 Today!" | "Donate $50 Today!" | "Donate $100 Today!" | "Donate Another Amount Today!" | Wexton’s extreme abortion views have no place in Virginia, or anywhere. I need your help to defeat Jennifer Wexton, take back Congress and stand up for Virginia’s most vulnerable. My pro-life positions are paramount to who I am. As the mother of an adopted son and aunt to Abbie, who has Down Syndrome, I will remain relentlessly dedicated to promoting a culture of life. I am proud to live my faith and support crisis pregnancy centers to educate women about the options that they have to protect life. In Congress, I won’t back down on life. It’s too important. But I need your help to get there. can afford to help STOP abortion extremist Jennifer Wexton. | "Let's Fire Nancy Pelosi & Her Planned Parenthood Darling, Jennifer Wexton" | Every contribution will help me stand up for the pro-life cause and oppose the radical abortion lobby funding my opponent’s campaign. Best, Jeanine Lawson | | "Paid for by Lawson for Congress" | | | | | | | | | | | jeaninelawson.com | | Copyright © 2021 Lawson for Congress, All rights reserved. name: Sen. Patrick Leahy
subject: I’m asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend,

I recently announced that after 47 years serving Vermont in the U.S. Senate, it's time for the next Vermonter to carry the torch of progress.

Even though I won’t be on the ballot myself next year, I am still focused on helping Democrats defend our Senate majority. **[In a moment, I’ll explain exactly why this is so important, but if you’re already with me, please make a donation now to stop Mitch McConnell from regaining power.](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211216-PatrickLeahy-LeahyRetirement-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211216-PatrickLeahy-LeahyRetirement-Pros-sl1&akid=2286%2E9716520%2Eseo5Ih)**

When I was elected in 1974, our country was in the midst of a constitutional crisis. The strength of our democracy had been tested by the Watergate scandal, and our nation was in serious need of trustworthy leadership. That year brought historic Democratic victories that were essential in rebuilding what had been broken.

Now, we stand on the precipice of yet another constitutional crisis -- this time brought on by some members of the Republican Party who are bent on suppressing voters, subverting elections, and actually _celebrating_ the mob attack on our Capitol on January 6th.

**That's why I can say with certainty that the upcoming midterm elections are the most important I’ve seen in my years of public service.**

With a razor-thin Senate majority and Mitch McConnell’s obstructionist tactics at an all-time high, Democrats have an uphill battle ahead of us. It is critical that we not only defend our current Democratic senators but expand our majority to ensure we bring true progress to the American people.

Although I won’t be running for office myself, I’m not backing down from this fight -- I'm doubling down, and I’m asking you to do the same.

**[Friend, will you give what you can to the DSCC so that they can help our Democrats make history in 2022? Your donation could be the difference between lasting progress for generations to come or handing power back to Mitch McConnell and the Trumpist senators who tried to overturn our democracy on January 6th.](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211216-PatrickLeahy-LeahyRetirement-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211216-PatrickLeahy-LeahyRetirement-Pros-sl1&akid=2286%2E9716520%2Eseo5Ih)**
We need your help to defend our Senate majority. Can we count on you to keep this grassroots campaign going strong and ensure that every operation is fully funded? Quick action from supporters like you is critical. If you are with those wanting better leadership for Oregon, then right now to help us get back on track! With a big push at the grassroots level today, we WILL reach our weekly fundraising quota and the much-needed change to Oregon politics will still be very much within reach. | | | Every dollar counts when we get down to the wire like this! If you donate today you can claim a tax credit of up to $50 on your 2021 Oregon tax return (up to $100 for a joint filing) using the Oregon Political Tax Credit! name: Ally For Utah
subject: Friend, Have you seen my new policy initiatives?
body:
This week I launched my policy initiative, "The Right Things: A Compact with Utah. A Vision for America."
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HKIqKVeKxrLwmha-0QNJNfqisVBjW1CRrpptFDFabvU3XWr1AYIZuwpRVQcAwu2zq8w1HLTxd35TafNJBa-n7jZrn7NMt9A3cS3ZkNRldqEEnLoqWTNTrZLlRfdwrUqrZqfU_7124y4cof4Uo5cZNA==&c=PRXUDcu_Nybf5D3vrR8D-vlUVhgg4Wbvz4_C1Izw8htngvU00HkOOw==&ch=M7Fj2dYKEKSNcibfWKOySImsw5JlCozhVzROsXRPPrbwl48p78oyNA==)

| | Friend,,
This week I launched my policy initiative, [The Right Things: A Compact with Utah. A Vision for America.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HKIqKVeKxrLwmha-0QNJNfqisVBjW1CRrpptFDFabvU3XWr1AYIZu_JP0kRv_pa2QYiAc2zTo3lxMb204aI4xfBaYcOm3oXc52T78PPiaMOiMPHLbzcXd9jzfAOsI5eI6fuyfgW-m233UD_BT6g5NASJS3zGh0P3NUtIm1D-PbKJnBnXY4rSOIerPVgVyYmpVlYzjSyPBZ7z3VHW70QoG2BVHEQ5rQj-&c=PRXUDcu_Nybf5D3vrR8D-vlUVhgg4Wbvz4_C1Izw8htngvU00HkOOw==&ch=M7Fj2dYKEKSNcibfWKOySImsw5JlCozhVzROsXRPPrbwl48p78oyNA==)
This compact is a commitment to continue to truly listen to Utah, to fight for the right things, to achieve a vision for our nation--a shared vision of cooperation, prosperity and family success.
[Read the compact >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HKIqKVeKxrLwmha-0QNJNfqisVBjW1CRrpptFDFabvU3XWr1AYIZu_JP0kRv_pa2G2hhqIqSDcLIvqPlL73Pe7OyIjHRE2gMvHCqL_IIIfldENl9zo5XmVePyiBZDWVTPLuDNIqaVSDWx-xTO3Z-wLwlVQzNy6yTcQQa674KzXaIsyZyVGbDrWinmep8Hfqf_uVAd6DOZatS4ImWTzFP8SFN7S4Sxw8f0xH3d0_rcCqgZXD7uFASv0UURBP5USrOwbwp1hYCJ-9SL6o1KvM0wJj1MiG62doj8lN7DKzAkgMHbS_m56TP77RWXbjBI_20xJny3Ee3BufogPo5ZXwegbcNSPhSHrF4jFB86uxd29XRz8wYfVzYqPN4Lo9hedszlDRLWcg2_BM=&c=PRXUDcu_Nybf5D3vrR8D-vlUVhgg4Wbvz4_C1Izw8htngvU00HkOOw==&ch=M7Fj2dYKEKSNcibfWKOySImsw5JlCozhVzROsXRPPrbwl48p78oyNA==)
Over the last six months, wearing my red running shoes, I've walked with everyday Utahns in nearly 70 Utah cities and towns across this beautiful state. I've listened to local community leaders, parents, business owners, entrepreneurs, ranchers, and everyone in between -- all in an effort to understand what's top of mind and in the hearts of my fellow Utahns.
Consistent themes emerged: water, affordable housing, the economy, childcare, law enforcement morale, and the impact of the pandemic. Those conversations are now the foundation for my policy positions.
Over the next several weeks I'll share more about my eight policy planks. They are clarity, stability, stewardship, family success, infrastructure integrity, innovation, health & well-being, and order in the Republic. The Right Things. For Utah. For You.[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HKIqKVeKxrLwmha-0QNJNfqisVBjW1CRrpptFDFabvU3XWr1AYIZu_JP0kRv_pa2-zRKZx0lNo3J5_0xY8WqWPWgFluuVsBTAWHiH5L4EpL_aaK-xQihTLeNODA3uNHX7UJJ4Mo8-3VLm_4WTU76n1185yWi_XQdAK7iD3IRgFAro_RMfombSHeW0-w5j8lnWu9q5nQFGgt7LUwM5fPJJTUeXlZzJYq0zOSMI9gyUq-Q5swmkzqKCMnI_O1-sngslbSeHf6tUNTiNdyU8RcNEIx9VysHd2CaBsMUdaa_BMdn5xyMfacNWdnQL039hqaZ7KznT_JxhN-O6ACuueqYz3V92DqxvO2vobmp-xMljotkNYX5Ey_Y9dPZUI9UWKwvbi86Dm9QTW4DKxh1jem0xZbOTKEJZBjaRfe7_2liCxxWg2LLO7Fzd40LE-U7R5wm&c=PRXUDcu_Nybf5D3vrR8D-vlUVhgg4Wbvz4_C1Izw8htngvU00HkOOw==&ch=M7Fj2dYKEKSNcibfWKOySImsw5JlCozhVzROsXRPPrbwl48p78oyNA==)
If you want to achieve this vision for our country, we need your help! Please chip in TODAY before our quarterly deadline.

name: Diehl for Massachusetts
subject: Reminder: Diehl Supports Republican Convention
body:
Encourages Republicans to Join and Unite in 2022
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
December 13, 2021
The Diehl for Governor campaign announced today that it is the first statewide campaign to make a significant donation to help support the 2022 Massachusetts Republican State Convention. Diehl presented a $25,000 check to Massachusetts Republican Party Chairman Jim Lyons. "I'm excited to participate in the state convention next May as I campaign for the Republican party's nomination for Governor," Diehl said. "I am also honored to be the first statewide candidate to make a contribution. Our campaign is building strong support and we are gaining momentum every day. I look forward to a great gathering of fellow Republicans in Springfield next year." Diehl also issued a call to Republicans across Massachusetts to unite and get involved in the convention process. "We have a tremendous opportunity in 2022, but in order to take advantage of it, it is essential that members of our party be united and fully engaged," Diehl said. "I encourage Republicans across the state to sign up to become a delegate and to take part in the convention process. Full participation makes our party stronger and enhances our chances of winning." Lyons expressed his appreciation to Diehl for the generous contribution. "I applaud Geoff Diehl for his support of our party and his solid commitment to conservative principles," said Lyons. "In particular, I appreciate Geoff Diehl's early and emphatic expression of support for our 2022 state convention. "It's an exciting time to be a Republican in Massachusetts, and we look forward to not only a great convention but also a very successful election." Republican delegates from across Massachusetts gather once every four years for a convention. The purpose of the convention is for the party to endorse candidates for certain Constitutional offices in advance of the state primary. Next year's convention will be held in Springfield on May 21, 2022. According to longstanding party policy, candidates for Governor are levied a $25,000 convention fee. In order to qualify for the primary ballot, candidates must receive support from at least 15 percent of convention delegates. Geoff Diehl, a Republican and former State Representative from Whitman, announced his candidacy for Governor of Massachusetts on July 4. His campaign has been steadily building support, focused on a message of making Massachusetts a better place to live, work, and raise a family. Diehl is also well-known for being a fiscal conservative and for successfully leading a campaign against state gas tax increases several years ago. For more information about Geoff Diehl and his campaign for Governor, please visit[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-nTUZmjFM4wBKZ992fdzsk-1-CThAKKIoe68SfjwMdJBTD03pmIZv4hMakPTKzc8dQufvXKcgC4hAQgZe-6HdQ4s8zwzXpFf66mGQ5Myhk43F_bh0lru0hsYlfwpCwQNMUL2ossr8LbXd5BAoo8dgw==&c=GaFqKblBzOrEF7XX_9m0soGM29aGssbyHd8mPG3N-SFJqS-XA4ajwA==&ch=7rz5RA0VbR-fG_W7nRnk3WB_z1kdN-mJPbXEtFDoz9fIZ7o_XP_3sg==)[www.geoffdiehl.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-nTUZmjFM4wBKZ992fdzsk-1-CThAKKIoe68SfjwMdJBTD03pmIZv7p0y8AUHZ4uJtt5-SslKsbBewRrwKVuuyPgtNfCGXFcjm6A3Y80TZzeUHu5sNDJcL2MwMAbC4yyERcAocoZJ8WbebjdIaYKNg==&c=GaFqKblBzOrEF7XX_9m0soGM29aGssbyHd8mPG3N-SFJqS-XA4ajwA==&ch=7rz5RA0VbR-fG_W7nRnk3WB_z1kdN-mJPbXEtFDoz9fIZ7o_XP_3sg==)

# **Friend — With your help, our online fundraising has surged in the last 48 hours and we reached our Mid-Month fundraising goal! **

---
I can’t thank you enough. Your support fuels our fight against Joe Biden’s tyrannical vaccine mandates and the woke left’s push to transform America. [**But this is no time to take our foot off the gas — if you missed this Mid-Month deadline, I hope you’ll act now to help us head into 2022 with momentum.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/8dff2121eeafa58b/113aeaabc4edb914c3d6b838967d376c/37973) Together, we’re going to put a stop to Biden’s assault on American sovereignty and our freedoms. And we’re going to take back the U.S. Senate and House. As I said, your input and support powers our effort, and it’s an honor to have you on Team Marshall. Thank you again.

clean_body: It’s no surprise that the Democrats have made defeating us their number one priority this election cycle. It’s no surprise that the Democrats have made defeating us their number one priority this election cycle. | Peter, We’ve been excited to see an outpouring of support from conservatives standing with us to turn Georgia RED and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority. But Peter, the Democrats have responded by making Georgia their number one priority. They’re raising tens of millions of dollars to accomplish their goal. Our country is hurting, but the Democrats have been more worried about keeping their majority than leading. Our conservative campaign to give power back to the people has caught the attention of National Democrats. They see the crowds we’re attracting and the momentum that is building - including from people who aren’t normally involved in politics. The Democrats are raising a record amount of cash to defeat our campaign, so we need your help to win. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: BIG NEWS: Our general election starts today!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I wanted you to be among the first to hear today’s big news:
#

I wanted you to be among the first to hear today’s big news: State Sen. Jeff Jackson has decided to end his campaign and endorse us. Here’s what he had to say:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211216-1-a1&refcode2=133.357359.qQqAd4&t=1&akid=133%2E357359%2EqQqAd4)
Jeff brought attention to the issues important to so many North Carolinians, and I know he’ll continue to do meaningful work. He’s run an honest and decent campaign, and I’m grateful to have his support. Together I know that we can deliver on real progress for this state.
**[Will you help us start our general election strong by making a $3 donation to our campaign today? This is a critical moment for our campaign to show our grassroots strength.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211216-1-a1&refcode2=133.357359.qQqAd4&t=2&akid=133%2E357359%2EqQqAd4)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211216-1-a1&refcode2=133.357359.qQqAd4&t=3&akid=133%2E357359%2EqQqAd4)**
North Carolina is among Democrats’ best opportunities to flip a GOP-held seat and expand the majority.
While the “public brawling” in the Republican primary continues to dominate headlines, Democrats are focusing on what really matters — uniting to fight for the people of our state.
**[If you’re ready to help us continue building our campaign and working to flip North Carolina’s Senate seat in 2022, then please make a $3 contribution today. Every donation today sends a powerful message that this grassroots movement has what it takes to win North Carolina.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211216-1-a1&refcode2=133.357359.qQqAd4&t=4&akid=133%2E357359%2EqQqAd4)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211216-1-a1&refcode2=133.357359.qQqAd4&t=23&akid=133%2E357359%2EqQqAd4)**

Mitch McConnell is optimistic about flipping the Senate and the last time he was in power he turned the Senate into a legislative graveyard. name: Jerry Dickinson
subject: The truth is…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Dickinson for Congress Committee
body:
| | |
---
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39752315/321250644/-632576040?utm_source=headerlogo&utm_medium=email&refcode=em_20211216-fr-JD-eoylaunch-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTg5NzM3My1iYTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_R8UzkBINosYoceBXUhQDT_aPirnzoUAxb-cDelybCI=&emci=5cba935b-955e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=41897373-ba5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25561085)
---
| Too many politicians on both sides are beholden to corporate interests because they donate to their campaigns—not me. Friend, I’ll be one of the first people to tell you: Over the next couple of weeks, you’re probably going to be getting a lot of emails from non-profits, issue-based movements, some of your favorite stores, and even political candidates like myself. I know it can be a lot, but I wouldn’t be sending this email if it wasn’t necessary for our campaign. You see, I made a pledge when I started running that I wanted this campaign to be different—that’s why, from the very beginning, I’ve refused to take money from corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry. This is a people-powered campaign. **Too many politicians are beholden to corporate interests because they donate to their campaigns—not me. The only people I want to be accountable to are everyday people like you, and that’s how it should be.** **[We need to raise as much as we can before the new year to ensure we have everything we need to succeed in the 2022 primary. Will you donate right now to help us reach our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39752316/321250645/1205227003?refcode=em_20211216-fr-JD-eoylaunch-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTg5NzM3My1iYTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_R8UzkBINosYoceBXUhQDT_aPirnzoUAxb-cDelybCI=)** Friend, because this is a grassroots-funded effort, we generally raise less money than those cashing big checks from corporations. And that’s why fundraising deadlines like this end-of-year one are so crucial for this campaign. I think it’s high time that the Pittsburgh region has a representative that puts the people first. I got in this race because I believe, with all my heart, that we can do better. From housing rights, to health care access, to clean air and water, to racial justice—the people deserve someone who will put the full weight of the federal government behind policy efforts that address decades worth of failed policies and practices. This is a solidly blue district, so there’s no reason we shouldn’t be on the frontlines of progressive policy. But we can’t do that without support from people like you. **Look, the truth is, I don’t expect every single person who opens this email to donate, and that’s okay! Not everyone can. But if even half of you chip in just $5, we’ll hit our goal easily.** [**So, will you help us reach our end-of-year fundraising goal by making a donation right now? clean_body: | | | | | Too many politicians on both sides are beholden to corporate interests because they donate to their campaigns—not me. Friend, I’ll be one of the first people to tell you: Over the next couple of weeks, you’re probably going to be getting a lot of emails from non-profits, issue-based movements, some of your favorite stores, and even political candidates like myself. I know it can be a lot, but I wouldn’t be sending this email if it wasn’t necessary for our campaign. You see, I made a pledge when I started running that I wanted this campaign to be different—that’s why, from the very beginning, I’ve refused to take money from corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry. This is a people-powered campaign. Too many politicians are beholden to corporate interests because they donate to their campaigns—not me. The only people I want to be accountable to are everyday people like you, and that’s how it should be. = Friend, because this is a grassroots-funded effort, we generally raise less money than those cashing big checks from corporations. And that’s why fundraising deadlines like this end-of-year one are so crucial for this campaign. I think it’s high time that the Pittsburgh region has a representative that puts the people first. I got in this race because I believe, with all my heart, that we can do better. From housing rights, to health care access, to clean air and water, to racial justice—the people deserve someone who will put the full weight of the federal government behind policy efforts that address decades worth of failed policies and practices. This is a solidly blue district, so there’s no reason we shouldn’t be on the frontlines of progressive policy. But we can’t do that without support from people like you. Look, the truth is, I don’t expect every single person who opens this email to donate, and that’s okay! Not everyone can. But if even half of you chip in just $5, we’ll hit our goal easily. = Thank you so much for your support, Jerry = | | Emails like this are often the best way for us to stay in contact with supporters like you. If you no longer wish to receive email communications, you can . Paid for by the Dickinson for Congress Committee Dickinson for Congress Committee P.O. Box 5367 Pittsburgh, PA 15206-9998 United States

name: John Kasich
subject: A special message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
I asked my team to share this short video message with you. Our hard work is making a difference. [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=276a02f8cde04b1ba9bc1454d45340c8&_e=v80FRIS7odIW8BXHtmwD74UF2-qAL-QVH8HiTqR7qXSNA_LNq9CFNDBZtWzVvlJYyt5k5ItfT2FoWruQom7MO69LWpNsxQfjOsE-arHDStAhb1RNZ7U9fjZfi7aFXSraT1HZeS_tS0_yszCK3WIFcwGC4UIjGxel_pPEjhgM1TNonQSW2xFaY8QhMzHaFQMOZqlSIxBetokHCbBW06Z4Xbx4JWEfstB0L97zp7JjQ1VVbM2OHU3rerqTfmOyyI7nqwSuBbpjru73BAHJqMP_4Q%3D%3D) Peter - as lawmakers head home for the holidays, it's my hope that they will reflect on the things that bind us together as Americans. What many of our elected leaders have lost is that unspoken commitment of serving a higher purpose during their time in office. What has replaced it is a selfish desire for opportunism and belief that doing nothing is winning. **You and I know better and that's why we're so invested in pushing for positive change**. I asked my team to share this short video message with you: [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=276a02f8cde04b1ba9bc1454d45340c8&_e=v80FRIS7odIW8BXHtmwD7_dgeAQ2LtLFzJG-6ygXiafBh5CnFngt7OooPNV0YESboFIx25kQHg64j97S__Tdv3SAyfVeDl2khVtzec5qQPeFL07KFi2C5AWigWkd_D2KDfm_qYuuhGKtgwx8-pwjCeRGXN4G8Jsr0mN2ttt5tRXxLL1iXBeczYbJqTD3kUxTB0ntD9-4cDRTWsgX9GvLww9NnQh89j5xdsoT6A9tqvoHIN4htNU_AGZzNioLs_-so_ChBKd1w76rvURps9xmPQ%3D%3D)
Our hard work is making a difference as you see Trump's grip on the party weakening and Republican candidates distancing themselves from his hateful rhetoric.

[But we have to keep up the momentum and that means we need to keep raising the funds to keep at it](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=276a02f8cde04b1ba9bc1454d45340c8&_e=v80FRIS7odIW8BXHtmwD71TqboprxXVI61mnuQiAJf8VZSqmBLdZo_Usdyx09R9mEwdDb16DYdQ6OD4ZggfMgC2WHfLejKUqZNRz58_DWN2CodOa5QaPKFKPXopMeBylG3IYM2ctAgQdyzHSxhn7MV1BWcAlX1enFaPxhDNPJze-k0JPE7j_OpNweB7v6sgf0TnVNwSDaA5HK4GVfuztD0A04ahSIoS-EX6gWdc7WYxHH6UfVlR5lZM7VE7T8tV7v2r9eCUyLNvcWDVhQTY0lg%3D%3D). I know it's the holiday season and budgets are tight but I'd appreciate anything you can pledge to help us keep up our efforts in the New Year.
[Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=276a02f8cde04b1ba9bc1454d45340c8&_e=v80FRIS7odIW8BXHtmwD71TqboprxXVI61mnuQiAJf8VZSqmBLdZo_Usdyx09R9mhnR68p2zrezVEadQkNdkkwghJx7k3POwuwCj3v3Rc7XbY73VKMs8AyL8YYD8kiG3R7ffBJhyflAwScGP_JFk8FUj66a-djnVZ_nS60N1ytrb9w9yCxCklKlXhRHOybMmPk_qeNzz3Y8AEyMae0CwtPdfjx1Tyy_t6tksK9R1GoirFPC-SeYcOgxqIXKT5fn93ZNWu4JDVDe13b6KzIVDuA%3D%3D)
I'm so appreciative of all the work you're doing to heal the divisions in our country and get our government working again for all of us.

Thank you!

-John

| | We’re in a real time crunch, so I’ll cut right to it: [**_As of 4pm, Tony’s behind on his final fundraising goal. As his campaign manager, it’s my job to get him over the finish line. He needs 39 more supporters to chip in before midnight, or his chances of flipping this seat blue will be in jeopardy. Can we count on your $10? It would mean so much to both of us. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39752723/321252411/1129282168?refcode=20211216_em_fr_b1_mm_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTI0ZWRiMC1iYjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvalWy8KzCU6QQ3ftov28lLzFMtiZ4zgSfNdMlkDido=)

I’ll be blunt: This is a make-or-break moment for Tony. The final deadline before 2022 is critical for our chances of flipping this seat. But as of this moment, our budget is trailing dangerously behind. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39752724/321252412/1129282168?refcode=20211216_em_fr_b1_mm_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTI0ZWRiMC1iYjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvalWy8KzCU6QQ3ftov28lLzFMtiZ4zgSfNdMlkDido=)

I have no doubt this race will be close. I have no doubt Don Bacon’s cronies will rush in whatever amount of money it takes to defeat Tony. But I also have no doubt that if we band together, we can do this. That’s why hitting Tony’s final fundraising goal before the election year is critically important. [**And I promised him we’d do it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39752725/321252413/1129282168?refcode=20211216_em_fr_b1_mm_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTI0ZWRiMC1iYjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvalWy8KzCU6QQ3ftov28lLzFMtiZ4zgSfNdMlkDido=) [**_I’m lucky to work with Tony every day. I know how dedicated he is to this race and to Nebraska. But for Tony to fight back and win, we need funds to launch ads, reach every single swing voter, run a massive field program, and all the expenses in between. Tony and I still need 39 grassroots donations to turn things around and win this important race for Democrats._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39752726/321252414/1129282168?refcode=20211216_em_fr_b1_mm_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTI0ZWRiMC1iYjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvalWy8KzCU6QQ3ftov28lLzFMtiZ4zgSfNdMlkDido=) [**So I’m asking: Will you chip in $10 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39752727/321252415/1129282168?refcode=20211216_em_fr_b1_mm_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTI0ZWRiMC1iYjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvalWy8KzCU6QQ3ftov28lLzFMtiZ4zgSfNdMlkDido=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39752728/321252416/1129282168?refcode=20211216_em_fr_b1_mm_30op&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTI0ZWRiMC1iYjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvalWy8KzCU6QQ3ftov28lLzFMtiZ4zgSfNdMlkDido=)

clean_body: | Peter, Did you see our last email? We wanted to make sure because it explains why we're stepping up our end of year goal to $20,000. There is simply too much on the line in 2022. While Christy is on the ground working hard for the people of CA-25, Mike cozies up to Trump, insurrectionists, and special interest donors. It's clear Mike cares about one thing and one thing only -- himself. He's got to go. = = \----------Forwarded Message---------- From: Team Christy Date: December 15th Subject: There's a big difference We talk a lot about the differences between Christy Smith and Mike Garcia but today we want to show you. We have an end-of-year goal of hitting $20,000. We have a big budget meeting at the end of this year, and we'll have to make tough choices if we don't meet this goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Want to see a few more examples? name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Make it possible for a conservative student
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs8p0domsuf6al7k1fpkj3v2tpl80dad2jna8lr0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o34clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t1mm3irap3hmapb2d756hqn4dj1eqq7dc9jc1rj8d34stjb5cdksop6bd3mmtjjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30t5l6dg7eoj66hib6p1nm2qmash5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlmk02tggutrd3tmen44b7o06jsvljcu19s3f43g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o34clh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlpo30fgsvtn2g32vqj391icek4ulvec6efgh25o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o34clh2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc82ag3h1gre646f6bv19apo8ecsvb4ti35g05g0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o34clh2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2aa4717mv0kir3cgr05rkh3ah6jf1dfr6v8uf60_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o34clh2bs)**[?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqpc1ci00d3ljofi7ih2htn8ocs6hcs065n7nfi8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o34clh2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp63mlj41ppopural892qqabr3o9sp6jefskk0q8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o34clh2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1dh4ks8vbd5apn83mbasoi7luutjoe66q41da48_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o34clh2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi885lvjukhg346fp7vkau1hbdqt5lmhv26vae50_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o34clh2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj2bd5015ruofcg2u8eog8kutoqrqi3fv5kjkpkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o34clh2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5avvnakfe2l9ov55vcfuvoo87784fgtlnd1jf6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o34clh2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr3klieog48734dab2v0vd5r3i7k4il79ka09n9g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o34clh2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmvgbnmdlss7pepnurmhgs09h2lie1u0fvgo0ap8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o34clh2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh480iehept379f89va01v5olk5f2opi314cb9b0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o34clh2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zcbt16i556bc17e6lplb71v4bbncaluh4dlr35k0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf94t3hb4b9g940rkbb3s222h8g04o4htj7tsuv8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cjhm9oj0chim49fg)

| With a Democrat Congress, the Biden Administration has been completely and wildly unaccountable.
Vaccine mandates that lay waste to the Constitution... abusive treatment of January 6 prisoners... shady dealings between Hunter and China...
This is what happens when there are no checks on the sinister America-last agenda!
It's time for REAL oversight on Biden. And that means pushback from firebrand representatives in Congress... NOT the old days of letting Democrats and the Deep State walk all over us!
---

subject: You're the hero in this story, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39753019/321253782/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTJhZGJmMS1iYzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0neOiq_ey9KITIWNQjZF3bBrDJlekVhifbKg6nIMWv0=)

Friend,

In a moment, we're going to ask if you could support Conor Lamb's grassroots campaign through the new year by signing up to become a monthly recurring donor (and explain why it's so crucial to the success of this campaign). **[But if you're already Team Lamb all the way, click here to become a monthly donor!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39753020/321253787/212407962?refcode=em21_211216_mm2&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTJhZGJmMS1iYzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0neOiq_ey9KITIWNQjZF3bBrDJlekVhifbKg6nIMWv0=)**

Campaigning in _any_ race isn't easy, but the PA Senate race is **_the most competitive Senate race in the country,_** with even more competitors entering the race just this week.

In a crowded race like this, **monthly donors can keep our campaign going strong by providing a consistent backbone of financial support.** As the race keeps heating up, this guarantees that we can cover any unexpected costs on the campaign trail. And remember, unlike his competitors, **Conor Lamb isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money,** instead he's relying on small dollar donors like you to make up the difference.

When Conor ran for Congress **in 2018, monthly donors helped close the gap each month to keep his campaign going strong.** The results speak for themselves -- **monthly donors make a real, substantial difference for grassroots campaigns like ours.**

So if you can, help make our campaign a winning one by pledging a monthly donation of any size. In a tight race like this, every dollar counts. [BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39753021/321253788/212407962?refcode=em21_211216_mm2&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTJhZGJmMS1iYzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0neOiq_ey9KITIWNQjZF3bBrDJlekVhifbKg6nIMWv0=) The truth is, friend, **running an effective campaign requires resources -- a _lot_ of resources.**

In order to reach enough voters and spread Conor's message about preserving democracy, protecting unions, and building a stronger, more diverse middle class, we need to run targeted ad campaigns that lots of people will actually see. And with such high profile, wealthy candidates like Dr. Oz entering the race, it's more important than ever that we get Conor Lamb's name out there on the airwaves.

Monthly donors make it possible for us to get our message out -- **and we need to make sure voters in PA hear it.**

**[Friend, the stakes are too high in this race to sit back and watch from the sidelines. Will you chip in any amount monthly to sustain our intensive digital and field campaign -- and help take Conor Lamb all the way to the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39753022/321253789/212407962?refcode=em21_211216_mm2&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTJhZGJmMS1iYzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0neOiq_ey9KITIWNQjZF3bBrDJlekVhifbKg6nIMWv0=)** [BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39753023/321253790/212407962?refcode=em21_211216_mm2&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTJhZGJmMS1iYzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0neOiq_ey9KITIWNQjZF3bBrDJlekVhifbKg6nIMWv0=) Thanks so much for your continued support -- Conor couldn't do this without you!

name: Team AOC
subject: Student loan debt has a cruel impact on working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We asked our movement to join Alexandria in sharing their student debt stories. Here’s what we heard →
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211216-2690-header&t=1&akid=2690%2E2526796%2E-qJQIZ)
Alexandria shared her student debt story on the floor of the House last week in an effort to keep up the pressure on President Biden to cancel student loan debt.
**We asked our movement to join her and share their student debt stories, and we received 255 submissions!**
**Here are two of the stories that were shared:**
_“I knew since I was a teenager that I wanted to be a nurse. I liked taking care of people and I was good at it, but I grew up poor so it always seemed like a distant dream. I became a medical assistant and the doctor I worked for encouraged me to go to nursing school. I told him I couldn’t afford it, but he told me that I could take out loans and they’d be forgiven by the company I work for when I get my nursing job. I took his advice and went to college at 20._ _Thankfully, I was eligible for financial aid for a little while, but I ended up needing to take out $30K to get me through my Bachelors degree. All along the way, teachers, advisors, counselors, loan officers, everyone told me the same thing, “your loans will be forgiven when you become a nurse because you’re serving the community.” Well, needless to say, they were wrong._ _I’m 32 years old and I’m still over $30K in debt. I’m currently working in the public school system and I only make $54K a year. In Connecticut, that truly isn’t much money. I’m dreading February 2022._ _I’m a nurse. I take care of my country’s people. I only wish my country would return the favor.”_ — LeeAnn
* * *
_“I am a first generation American and college student. I was told that higher education was a pathway to success and to social mobility. Now that I’ve graduated with thousands in debt, I think about how I am going to have to pay hundreds a month instead of using that money to help my family pay our bills and pursue the American Dream. Student loan debt is holding back millions from pursuing their dreams and investing in their families. Student loan debt is immoral and can be canceled by President Biden who ran on the promise of debt cancellation.”_ — Sabrina
---
The stories shared are heartbreaking reminders of the cruel and painful burden student loans place on individuals and their families.
We have seen the benefits that student loan cancellation can have during the year and nine months of the emergency COVID-19 forbearance in effect. It has given people the breathing room to take care of their families and to start investing in their futures.
No person should have to go into lifelong debt in order to get an education. It’s wrong. It’s backwards. And, it doesn’t help us as a country.
[If you agree, add your name to join Alexandria in demanding President Biden keep his promise and use his executive power to finally end the student loan crisis and cancel student loan debt for all.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/biden-student-debt/?source=em20211216-2690-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=2&akid=2690%2E2526796%2E-qJQIZ)
**[Add your name](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/biden-student-debt/?source=em20211216-2690-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=3&akid=2690%2E2526796%2E-qJQIZ)**
These stories prove that it isn’t a billionaire’s child who is taking out student loans. It’s working- or middle-class people who are trying to make a living.
[So, tell Biden: Let’s get real, and let’s cancel student loan debt.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/biden-student-debt/?source=em20211216-2690-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=4&akid=2690%2E2526796%2E-qJQIZ)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20211216-2690-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=5&refcode2=2690_2526796_-qJQIZ&akid=2690%2E2526796%2E-qJQIZ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211216-2690-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=6&akid=2690%2E2526796%2E-qJQIZ)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=2690%2E2526796%2E-qJQIZ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=2690%2E2526796%2E-qJQIZ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=2690%2E2526796%2E-qJQIZ)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=2690%2E2526796%2E-qJQIZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=2690%2E2526796%2E-qJQIZ)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: MAGA ALERT
subject: Candidate Spotlight: Madison Gesiotto Gilbert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Madison for Congress
body:
Madison Gesiotto Gilbert is an attorney, wife, and small business owner who is sick of the same failed leadership in Washington
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
Friends, Madison Gesiotto Gilbert is an attorney, wife, and small business owner who is sick of the same failed leadership in Washington that has left countless Americans feeling forgotten and lied to by those elected to represent them. So now, she's **joining Republican women across the country who are running for Congress.** [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4ieo9pih1c23bsa29nocfui13er2q1l2uam5h98_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o32chh2bs) [**HELP MADISON TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmul5o5pds3lb6fllan4l35h17269ddvhied4ero_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdie4o32chh2bs) As a conservative political commentator and columnist for the _Washington Times,_ Madison spent years fighting for freedom, justice, the Constitution, and conservative values on Fox News Channel, Fox Business Network, Newsmax, CNN, MSNBC, and more. In 2016, Madison was a**Day One supporter of President Trump** , serving as a national surrogate for the Trump Campaign and an advisor to the National Diversity Coalition for Trump. In President Trump's historic election win, her role led to her position as Regional Press Secretary and spokesperson on the Presidential Inaugural Committee. When I joined the Navy, I swore an oath to protect and defend against all threats, foreign and domestic. When you're sworn into Congress, you take the same oath. **Kevin McCarthy broke that oath.** Nearly a year ago on January 6th, our democracy nearly fell due to a violent insurrection attempt championed by Donald Trump. **That same day, Kevin McCarthy was on the phone with Trump. And we still don’t know what was said on that phone call.** The American people deserve to know what the most powerful Republican in Congress and someone who tried to overthrow our government talked about that day. **It’s time that the January 6th committee subpoena Kevin McCarthy.** ****If Kevin McCarthy can’t do his job to protect us, we can’t trust him. He’s doing Trump’s bidding. But I’m running to work for regular people like you. Washington already has plenty of bought and paid for, self-serving politicians. We don’t need another one in Oregon. We're powering this campaign with individual people.
