name: Great America Update
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6688%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=5ZsseE73DxZodTSqn5WtrA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68996%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MGD8m3syzl24s%2b68I9Qq0Q&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68996%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MGD8m3syzl24s%2b68I9Qq0Q&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68997%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8VuFQ91wgn6xWmAmnHY00g&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

name: Maggie Toulouse Oliver
subject: Do you have your booster shot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie, Robert Lara Treasurer
body:
I just got mine!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39753374/321255364/1198618133?refcode=EM_C_211216Booster_VR_MTO_90DO_4_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTcwMTViZS1iZjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTFImt7fOvdPcSY-C0A_tRY4nl3tVCah5ZgIYMAcStE=&emci=5a4623b8-415c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=417015be-bf5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3583156)
With COVID-19 boosters readily available, I made sure to get mine! Public health is so essential for everyone in New Mexico. Yet, vaccine inequity and vaccine hesitancy remain real for many.
**It’s important to close the information gap because we’re all in this together.** Most people have mild symptoms, but it can become severe for some, especially if they’re unvaccinated.
Protecting you and your community from COVID-19 is critical.
**[Click here to find out where you can get your booster shot.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39753375/321255365/746188833?refcode=EM_C_211216Booster_VR_MTO_90DO_4_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTcwMTViZS1iZjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTFImt7fOvdPcSY-C0A_tRY4nl3tVCah5ZgIYMAcStE=&emci=5a4623b8-415c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=417015be-bf5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3583156)**
You’ll be saving countless lives by doing your part.
In this together,

Maggie
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39753376/321255366/1198618133?refcode=EM_C_211216Booster_VR_MTO_90DO_4_NG_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTcwMTViZS1iZjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTFImt7fOvdPcSY-C0A_tRY4nl3tVCah5ZgIYMAcStE=&emci=5a4623b8-415c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=417015be-bf5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3583156)
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy!**_ _**______[FIND OUT MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39753377/321255367/1198618133?refcode=EM_C_211216Booster_VR_MTO_90DO_4_NG_N_BIO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTcwMTViZS1iZjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTFImt7fOvdPcSY-C0A_tRY4nl3tVCah5ZgIYMAcStE=&emci=5a4623b8-415c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=417015be-bf5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3583156)**_

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: disturbingly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | I’ve had it.

At least **TEN** people involved in the Capitol rallies were just elected to office.

At least **FIVE** more are now running for Congress.

And Republicans only need**FIVE** seats to topple our Democratic Majority.

I mean every word I’m about to say:

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zkqggtg9qevef2i2r853rp5ck62p44getof1hen8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdieco76cth2bs)
---|---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zk65fl586dvhvaj0sumnlvphf435sv4sd7bc8gv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdieco76cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5g5asfmd69va0gvp8vo7m9grre8maa8ort6q84o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdieco76cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Primary Power
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Five progressive candidates and an incredible opportunity to build our
progressive bloc of Justice Democrats in Congress. That’s what awaits us
in 2022, Peter.

But we can’t wait. Now’s the time to continue building our operations to
ensure we have five more victories in 2022. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori
Bush, Jamaal Bowman and the rest of our Justice Democrats in Congress have
shaken up politics in D.C. – there’s no doubt about it. They’ve had a
major impact on legislation and voted against the Democratic establishment
when the Party prioritized corporations over people.

Now we can elect Odessa Kelly, Rana Abdelhamid, Kina Collins, Jessica
Cisneros, and Summer Lee to join our 10 JDs already making an impact in
Congress. We’re ready to build on what we’ve started. Are you?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87509?refcode=em20211216-21005&t=1002&akid=21005%2E1203867%2Ee9AxUP ]Chip in $3 to our Primary Power Fund today and help us
elect our progressive slate of 2022 endorsed candidates »

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87509?refcode=em20211216-21005&t=1003&akid=21005%2E1203867%2Ee9AxUP ]The five Justice Democrats on the 2022 slate with a donation ask.

We’re up against the Democratic party and their entire ecosystem of
resources. From political technology, volunteer lists, party PACs, and big
corporate donors, all working together to raise millions of dollars and
elect candidates who are doing little in Congress to improve the lives of
working people.

But we’re also fighting powerful right-wing interests spending money on
Facebook ads, TV commercials, and text messages to smear the Squad and
other Justice Democrats. And they’ve already started directing their
racist, xenophobic, right-wing lies towards our primary challenges, and
we’re not expecting it to stop.

We’re relying on your support to fight the incoming attacks from both
sides, so we can out-organize and out-campaign the political establishment
— and win. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87509?refcode=em20211216-21005&t=1022&akid=21005%2E1203867%2Ee9AxUP ]Can you contribute $3 towards the Primary
Power Fund to send Summer, Jessica, Kina, Rana, and Odessa to Congress?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87509?refcode=em20211216-21005&t=1023&akid=21005%2E1203867%2Ee9AxUP ]Contribute $3

With your support, we’ll elect the next generation of Justice Democrats to
challenge corporate Democrats and start fighting for working people in the
halls of Congress.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=21005%2E1203867%2Ee9AxUP ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=21005%2E1203867%2Ee9AxUP ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211216-21005-footer&t=1026&refcode2=21005_1203867_e9AxUP&akid=21005%2E1203867%2Ee9AxUP

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=21005%2E1203867%2Ee9AxUP

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Holly
subject: Not this time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, when Marjorie Taylor Greene got elected in 2020, the circumstances were bleak.
Marge was ramping up her hateful rhetoric and the only democrat in the race was forced to drop out weeks before the election. This left Marjorie Taylor Greene with a wide open lane to the Halls of Congress. However, the democratic challenger still got 25% of the vote despite no longer running.
Let’s be honest folks, GA-14 democrats were scared and had nowhere to turn in 2020. That won’t be the case in 2022. If a candidate who dropped out got 25% of the vote, imagine what our campaign is capable of.
GA-14 cannot have a repeat of 2020. The same folks who voted for Marge were since abandoned and left in the dust. The atmosphere has shifted and we’re going into 2022 ready to fight.
Team Holly knows this won’t be easy by any means. That’s why we have launched the biggest voter registration program GA-14 has ever seen. The ground work we’ve been doing to flip moderates, outreach voters, and register democrats is how we’re going to win this race. Chip in $14 today, and together we can provide Northwest Georgia with true leadership. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1216]
Thanks so much,
Team Holly.

subject: Reckless and ineffective -- Marjorie Taylor Greene is wasting our seat in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Let me cut to the point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Mitch McConnell is hoping you will lose interest and stop caring.
#
Peter,
I know you care whether the Senate does something about global warming, women's health care, or voting rights for all Americans.
**[Will you step up to pitch in $5 or any amount to reach our mid-month goal to defend the Democratic Senate majority? And if you can, will you make that a recurring contribution?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39753722/321256499/-358626674?refcode=dd_em_211216_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTIyMGVhZi1jMTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VO3s4T_8UWwVtPKnTrPKbTB7yg9oQVvbvIebvmDyZTg=)**
Mitch McConnell has made it abundantly clear he wants to take over the Senate and take us back to the Trump era. He’s hoping you will lose interest and stop caring.
But I know you won’t. With just two weeks left in December, we need to cross the end-of-the-year finish line strong.
**[We are SO CLOSE to our mid-month goal. Will you chip in $5 or any amount?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39753723/321256500/-358626674?refcode=dd_em_211216_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTIyMGVhZi1jMTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VO3s4T_8UWwVtPKnTrPKbTB7yg9oQVvbvIebvmDyZTg=)**
We can and we will defend our Senate majority, together.
My best,
Dick Durbin

name: Larry Klayman
subject: Our government is rotten to the core!
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6680%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=9Y2QODtbngiLDcNfopMmgg&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68990%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gnH19zxqTeuYEX%2fVKOLipQ&sysid=1)
Patriot,

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68991%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RXH1tx0ErZRpkYPBMnQ2Xg&sysid=1) My name is Larry Klayman and I now serve the American people as the Founder, Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I am also the founder of Judicial Watch.

Freedom Watch is a 100% donor supported public interest watchdog and in effect the Peoples Justice Department dedicated to defending Americans who have seen their God-given civil rights trampled and violated by the power elite in this country.

**[PLEASE HELP](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68992%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I0nyckZSiDSzkGWWuK%2f4yg&sysid=1)**

I’m talking about:

➢ The **_socialist and communists_** running the Democrat Party,

➢ The equally corrupt establishment **_“anything for a buck”_** elites that run the Republican Party,

➢ The **_“We Know Best” Deep State Bureaucrats_** who can’t be fired and who use their power to persecute anyone who disagrees with them,

➢ **_“Too Big to Fail” corporate Big Shots_** who buy and sell politicians and purchase “protection” from **_hate groups like Black Live Matter_** , and

➢ The hundreds upon hundreds of **_“special interest” organizations and Big Labor Unions_** that live on your tax dollars as long as they deliver votes on Election Day.
As part of our vital work, we sue people, elected officials, organizations, appointed bureaucrats and the departments they run when they abuse their power, violate the rights of citizens, and break the law!
And that is why I am writing you today.

I am filing a Class Action Lawsuit against our corrupt U.S. Attorney General Merrick Garland as well as FBI Director Christopher Wray for weaponizing the Department of Justice to go after President Joseph Biden’s political enemies!

**[PLEASE HELP](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68992%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I0nyckZSiDSzkGWWuK%2f4yg&sysid=1)**
Our lawsuit seeks relief from the illegal “Abuse of Power” exercised by Secretary Garland and the FBI against January 6 protestors on a massive scale.

**The facts on the January 6 protest.**
Virtually all of the riots that took place in the United States from 2020 to 2021 were incited by Black Lives Matter race baiters, Antifa anarchists, socialist agitators, and flat-out communists.

In all, dozens of people were killed and more than $1.3 BILLION in property had been destroyed - including damage to federal property.

**There were no DOJ investigations ... no DOJ Task Forces formed to bring offenders to justice...no “FBI Tip Lines” to report rioters... no nationwide dragnets to trap radicals - nothing.**
However, there was one protest that got the attention of the FBI and the Department of Justice - President Donald Trump’s “Stop the Steal” rally on January 6, 2020.

**[PLEASE HELP](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68992%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I0nyckZSiDSzkGWWuK%2f4yg&sysid=1)**
After President Trump’s rally ended, a small group of protestors broke away, went to the capitol, and entered the Capitol Building. The overwhelming majority were peaceful and did not harm person or property in the people’s house. Many were escorted into the Capitol Building by the Capitol police, who largely were on the side of the peaceful protesters and the American people!

As far as violent protests go, it was a sleepover.

But not to House Speaker Nancy Pelosi. And not to our completely corrupt Attorney General Merrick Garland and his chameleon of an FBI Director Christopher Wray!

**To these crooked officials, January 6 was all the excuse they needed to declare that Trump supporters had attempted an “insurrection” and that President Trump led them in this cause!**
More to the point, January 6 gave them the excuse they needed to publicly and shamelessly shred the Constitution and Bill of Rights of more than six hundred American citizens and counting!

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68993%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N0vL%2fCNraTmnxcJGTOfInw&sysid=1) **These targets were hunted down all over the country. They were subjected to morning raids conducted by FBI goons kicking down doors. These “terrorists” were then hauled back to Washington, DC.

Of those who were kidnapped by the FBI, many were tossed into solitary confinement without bail... frequently without a right of legal counsel ... usually without a genuine and fair hearing before a judge... without the ability to face their accusers...without access to their families... and all this for more than 10 months and counting!!**

That is why Freedom Watch is fighting back and why I need your help to do it.

**[PLEASE HELP](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68992%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I0nyckZSiDSzkGWWuK%2f4yg&sysid=1)**
Right now, Freedom Watch is filing a Class Action Lawsuit against the Department of Justice, Attorney General Merrick Garland **personally** , the FBI, and FBI Director Robert Wray **personally** for abuse of power, civil rights violations, and other counts of criminal behavior following the January 6 protest.

But to prevail, [**I need your help - today - in any amount you can provide**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68994%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IBtMs%2fjmmKbib4Tk3WYjSQ&sysid=1).

**[PLEASE HELP](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68992%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I0nyckZSiDSzkGWWuK%2f4yg&sysid=1)**
Yours in Freedom and Liberty,

Larry Klayman
Founder and Chairman
Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Right now, federal judges in Washington, DC are using their near absolute power - at the command of socialist and communist authoritarians - to employ **KANGAROO COURTS** , **FORCED CONFESSIONS** , and **LOYALTY OATHS** - to convict and punish peaceful January 6 protestors.

These fascists think they can wear down their captives. break them financially and do both because their targets do not have the resources to fight back.

But you can prove them wrong by helping fund our Class Action Lawsuit against the DOJ and the FBI [**with your contribution of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68905%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e70Tsza20K%2fFl0eMQAhWdg&sysid=1) today. Thank you very much.

**[PLEASE HELP](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68992%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I0nyckZSiDSzkGWWuK%2f4yg&sysid=1)**

---

name: Team Booker
subject: Tonight: Team Booker all supporter call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Saying that this past week has been difficult for our Commonwealth is an
understatement. Last weekend’s tornadoes have caused unthinkable damage to
our towns and communities, particularly in Western Kentucky.

We’re holding everyone impacted close in our hearts as we continue to do
what we Kentuckians do best: showing up and caring for each other during
this time of need.

This evening, Charles is hosting an all supporter call where we’ll discuss
how we can provide relief to our Western Kentucky family in their time of
need. Will you please join us?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14018?t=1001&akid=1341%2E346206%2EY9mgmN ]All Supporter Call for KY Tornado Relief
Thursday, December 16
5 – 6:30pm EST

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14018?t=1002&akid=1341%2E346206%2EY9mgmN ]RSVP »

No matter where you’re located, we hope you can join us as we continue to
navigate the aftermath of last weekend’s tragedies. We will discuss what
is needed here on the ground in Western Kentucky, how we can use our
networks to provide aid, and more.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14018?t=1003&akid=1341%2E346206%2EY9mgmN ]It will take months if not years for Western Kentucky to
rebuild, Peter. But
if we stand together as family, we can do it. Our work starts now — please
join us tonight if you’re able to do so, and feel free to invite friends
and family.

Thank you, and we hope to see you on the call.

Together,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211216-1341-footer&t=1004&refcode2=1341_346206_Y9mgmN&akid=1341%2E346206%2EY9mgmN

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1341%2E346206%2EY9mgmN

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: American Update
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8204%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=wK4VYoY9pM1rOBylQdS4ww&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10842%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QMh%2b73Gy22gHS2VCc9h3nA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10842%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QMh%2b73Gy22gHS2VCc9h3nA&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10843%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IIHIId2e3iLTWTCvXz2DJQ&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

name: Drew Thompson
subject: They Flunked the Test
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Peter, Dont worry, your child didnt actually fail their test today, I wish we could say the same for our school system. Unfortunately, with disasterous teachers unions, left wing propaganda and race based curriculims taking priority, our standards continue to plummet far below other countries. The education system in the United States increasingly fails the test. This morning we announced our _Parents for Jane_ Coalition that is dedicated to guaranteeing a voice for concerned parents who have finally woken up to the horror of what actually occurs in our classrooms. On January 13th, we are launching this coalition in Columbus and we want you to be there! Join Jane, our _Parents for Jane_ Chairs, and concerned parents just like you by clicking the RSVP button below! _**Parents for Jane Launch**_ Date: Thursday, 1/13/2021

name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: I was SHOCKED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I cannot let these attacks go unanswered
| | |
---
Friend, I know I've asked for your urgent support before, but this moment is _different_. That's because** the head of the Republican National Committee is now coming after me directly – and I cannot let these attacks go unanswered. **
This major escalation comes just as the GOP is sounding the alarm about protecting Marco Rubio, who CNN analysts called one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection.
**It's no exaggeration to say that the whole of the Republican establishment is doubling down to defeat me because they know this race will decide Senate control. **
I _must_ secure the resources to meet their attacks head on and fight back immediately. Florida's last Senate race was decided by a mere 10,000 votes, so believe me when I say that moments like this don't just move the needle: They move mountains – and they will determine our Senate majority.
**So I need you with me, friend.[Help me fight back and win by rushing an emergency donation of $5 or whatever you can spare today. I'm statistically tied in the polls with Marco Rubio, so I cannot let these attacks go unanswered. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39754537/321260239/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1972-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDc4Y2I1Mi1jNTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bg-YpI3Fx8ZKIP2bql3X8NIWUPItU6Xn4TGeK5zTIBw=)**

name: Governor Pete Ricketts
subject: Join me in supporting Derek for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
This is Pete Ricketts, Governor of Nebraska and your neighbor to the north. Today, I wanted to let you know that I’m endorsing my friend Derek Schmid Friend, This is Pete Ricketts, Governor of Nebraska and your neighbor to the north. Today, I wanted to let you know that I’m endorsing my friend Derek Schmidt to be the next Governor of Kansas. Peter,

New Mexico's teachers work tirelessly to educate the next generation of doctors, engineers, entrepreneurs, and leaders.
Administrations before me have failed to compensate our educators what they deserve – and it's clear to me that they deserve better. That's why I just announced my plan to increase teacher pay by 7% to properly compensate our educators, attract the best teachers in the region, and address the educator shortage.
**I strongly believe that New Mexico's kids deserve the very best – and that means we need to continue to invest in their education. But I need to know what you think, Peter. I'm running a poll to find out whether my supporters agree with my education plan, and I need to hear from you before midnight:**
| | **Do you agree with my plan to raise pay for teachers?**

body:
Senate Democrats appear to be giving up on voting on the Build Back Better bill this year. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPMq0ePFSoFEn3c3NEN8Peldeiv6l2kVx97MPITv1LyNdu_w71JI3FXtA8kpfJpZvOo97Gmc7pixbNIjGNuIfT-dP_8arZFr0kJpwcnXv7Mfo7peIvNo6GgvNyqv5VOvAtdWmgtlHiS6dlTkg1V3_TStTkEDjL0bhFTElxmOTBYH5FjgOWuRSFRGMzy86sIY4c5a66DRmpcGYT7oXytIx2aLpKC0U1VRsHqwpeITMglS-Qlw7mJOKMFNbuJ9TJUJJAQ/3hw/bu9otEh7QV2zSehVbjD5Dg/h0/OzJ7pPIb_laeEDcK68vCqfspzC0RsgV7f-WFxraZuDw)
Bad news, Peter. **FIRST:** Senate Democrats appear to be giving up on voting on the Build Back Better bill before the end of the year. It’s because they don’t have 50 votes — in part because Senator Kyrsten Sinema (and Joe Manchin) _still_ won’t agree to vote Yes. **THEN:** Democrats turned their attention to passing critically-needed voting rights legislation. But Sinema doubled down on her support for the Jim Crow filibuster yesterday, leaving no path to get our voting rights protected. **[Enough is enough, Peter. We need to get Kyrsten Sinema out of the U.S. Senate. clean_body: Senate Democrats appear to be giving up on voting on the Build Back Better bill this year. | | | Bad news, Peter. FIRST: Senate Democrats appear to be giving up on voting on the Build Back Better bill before the end of the year. It’s because they don’t have 50 votes — in part because Senator Kyrsten Sinema (and Joe Manchin) still won’t agree to vote Yes. THEN: Democrats turned their attention to passing critically-needed voting rights legislation. But Sinema doubled down on her support for the Jim Crow filibuster yesterday, leaving no path to get our voting rights protected. The House passed the Build Back Better Act weeks ago. But largely because of Kyrsten Sinema’s actions, it’s nowhere closer to reaching President Biden’s desk. Sinema already managed to force out the progressive goal of allowing Medicare to negotiate lower prescription drug prices — which won her hundreds of thousands of dollars in support from a Big Pharma-funded dark money group. But even after this devastating cut to the bill, Sinema won’t do her part to help Democrats get it passed. Now, she’s blocking ANOTHER urgent Democratic priority: protecting voting rights. Apparently, she’s OK with the fact that we can’t pass federal voting rights legislation without a supermajority, even though dozens of state legislatures are chipping away at our voting rights by simple majority vote. Kyrsten Sinema cannot be allowed to stay in the Senate after betraying her constituents — and working families across America. But with Republican mega-donors and corporate interests funneling millions to her campaign, it’s going to take all of us fighting back to stop her re-election. Thanks to Sinema and Manchin, we are being denied free and fair elections, more affordable health care, child tax credits, paid family leave, universal pre-K, clean energy, and so much more. We must hold Sinema accountable for holding Democrats’ priorities hostage. Keep fighting, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. It’s a huge responsibility - being the leading outside group still supporting President Donald Trump and candidates nationwide! As you know, Peter, the vast majority of actual outside money spent supporting President Trump and Trump conservatives has come from ONLY two groups - with your Great America PAC leading the way! We’ve now spent more than $50 million to champion President Trump and America First leaders who are determined to uphold his principles of freedom and prosperity - and we have plans to fund a huge campaign as we enter the 2022 Midterm Election year. We’re once again ready to take the leading role for the legacy of President Donald Trump and his America First agenda by helping to elect as many Republicans as we can to take back the Senate! I know that you must be getting ready to spend the holidays with family and friends, but I needed to reach out to you before our next campaign deadline.

Team McMaster has had a busy couple of months and we're gearing up for our big year in 2022.

South Carolina Democrats, with the support from DC liberals, are trying to turn traditionally "Red States" blue and our state is their #1 target.

subject: Access to reproductive healthcare is at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
Like the majority of Wisconsinites, I believe that every person should have autonomy over their reproductive health. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39754904/321261526/1434030581?refcode=EM_FR_211216FR_N_AL_90DA_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzhjM2JkNS1jNzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7T3svHUYVIerXASxCJEtthBoCd3McK-dFqq2lSUBimA=)
---
Peter,

Earlier this month, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ , a challenge to Mississippi’s abortion ban that could decimate the constitutional right to an abortion established by _Roe v. Wade_.

**Like the majority of Wisconsinites, I believe that every person should have autonomy over their reproductive health.**

In the U.S. Senate, I will fight to ensure that everyone has access to inclusive, high-quality, and affordable healthcare, and that includes abortion and reproductive care. Abortion must remain safe and legal in Wisconsin, and I will work at the federal level to make sure that our laws protect these essential rights, regardless of who is sitting on the Supreme Court.

The filibuster right now stands in the way of our Democratic majority passing comprehensive protections for reproductive healthcare, and that’s one of the many reasons why I support eliminating the filibuster.

**[We need action, and we need it now -- that’s why I’m running for Senate and asking you to join me today by supporting my campaign with a contribution of $10 or clean_body: Like the majority of Wisconsinites, I believe that every person should have autonomy over their reproductive health. | | = Peter, Earlier this month, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization , a challenge to Mississippi’s abortion ban that could decimate the constitutional right to an abortion established by Roe v. Wade. Like the majority of Wisconsinites, I believe that every person should have autonomy over their reproductive health. In the U.S. Senate, I will fight to ensure that everyone has access to inclusive, high-quality, and affordable healthcare, and that includes abortion and reproductive care. Abortion must remain safe and legal in Wisconsin, and I will work at the federal level to make sure that our laws protect these essential rights, regardless of who is sitting on the Supreme Court. The filibuster right now stands in the way of our Democratic majority passing comprehensive protections for reproductive healthcare, and that’s one of the many reasons why I support eliminating the filibuster. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Together we can protect access to critical reproductive care. Thank you, Alex Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. What a way to end 2021, team!
John has spent December criss-crossing the state to grow our movement to flip Ohio blue, and he’s been grateful for the opportunity to meet so many supporters personally.
**Whether it’s meeting with firefighters in Dayton or community activists in Toledo, John wants to be where _real Ohioans_ are.**
_In December alone, John has visited Walton Hills, Glenville, Toledo, Dayton, and Columbus._
John’s schedule is packed full of travel to communities from one end of Ohio to the other. That’s one of his biggest priorities as the election year comes around — John wants to have the chance to connect in person with voters from all over the state.
But here’s the thing: Right now, gas money is one of our campaign’s major expenses, and if we don’t have the funds to fill up the gas tank over and over (and over), John might have to cut back on travel.

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: We’re meeting voters where they are. | | = = What a way to end 2021, team! John has spent December criss-crossing the state to grow our movement to flip Ohio blue, and he’s been grateful for the opportunity to meet so many supporters personally. Whether it’s meeting with firefighters in Dayton or community activists in Toledo, John wants to be where real Ohioans are. In December alone, John has visited Walton Hills, Glenville, Toledo, Dayton, and Columbus. John’s schedule is packed full of travel to communities from one end of Ohio to the other. That’s one of his biggest priorities as the election year comes around — John wants to have the chance to connect in person with voters from all over the state. But here’s the thing: Right now, gas money is one of our campaign’s major expenses, and if we don’t have the funds to fill up the gas tank over and over (and over), John might have to cut back on travel. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Appreciate your support, Team Cranley = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. Peter,

According to a new poll by CNBC, Republicans hold a _“historic”_ 10-point advantage over Democrats in polls when asked which Party they want to control Congress after next year’s midterm elections.

According to CNBC _“In the past 20 years, CNBC and NBC surveys have never registered a double-digit Republican advantage on congressional preference, with the largest lead ever being 4 points for the GOP.”_

**WOW. Can you believe that? Republicans are currently polling more than six points better than our current preference record.**

**BUT BUT BUT. Just because we’re polling well right now doesn’t give us license to pull back and assume that we’re going to win it all next November.** If anything, this should motivate us to work as hard as we can to ensure that, once the dust settles, we can point to these polls being accurate.

**[We’re curious to know where you stand. If the election were held today, how strongly would you support sending a Republican majority to Washington?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=144534b2c3104465a3a25a8a2f95b8c1&_e=nNQ0WKjYsERrkodu_8KqzzMkhlkJE5jeJKRky8O7xZL9BH-tn566VBJ8C-C1GHdrr-jnSpBbVC93cpLUVEOf6P2ePiHfqcmiW1EG0e8ShC1xqJi0KNNWKMsAUlNs6PLGRKBh7-7H7HPAoZH4U7eo5Np53Vnnk6pAe0B0nhqg7TDjlcMdCdgh3mnrbeM4ixtwVGiAdN3olTkDCQgQbjkljYUH-_a932RMmbezcddGMfpwAmcJ_Ycf4E53Z3nU2Z6TTk1le209nSLUBlSz4AxXOuAqOEbiet1imubNL5N-iAkrwr0pnIeQT_GxLLxhmXnS7Rflk1wqPJsqwGtcfUTEtMgLQjeKe2ebb4dNQTtrpywzxiE3idWPpW9SF8vMaY4GGG1dXTS5KOdPlMvGOsmG3kTTb7E6CPSLN0RFUsMHADJ4unWm5Zi4-7gRFQ4u2wC6o4ZR1IFbC9KQisy9br75lJqzDch_ekFXxEloUDAuE6YGedf_d_mE5HLcbDkt549pqnZXgBjs-5ksR4txloAo9fU78irNAAt7DKEO464g1_19Hrd_WhyOGkWzNE0uY8dYJjjiwXJtVXwoBJR22q_laY3SwErrhtBywg9KnWfkDvo%3D)**

clean_body: | | | | | Folks, The end of the year is approaching fast, which means the 2022 election is right around the corner. I’m going to talk about what’s on the line in this election, but first you should know: On December 31st, our campaign is facing its first public reporting deadline and I’ve set an ambitious $30,000 fundraising goal. | | | | | I won’t sugar coat it: we’re facing an uphill battle to combat millions in attacks from national Republicans. This race was just rated as a toss-up, and my 6 GOP opponents are eagerly searching for cracks in this campaign. The things we’ve fought tirelessly for – reproductive rights, a public health insurance option, well-funded public education, workers’ rights, expanded voting access – are all at stake in this race. Which is why I’m asking for your help: our campaign has to raise $30,000 before 11:59 PM on December 31st if we want to defend our progress in 2022. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your support, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. clean_body: We’re getting ahead before we fall behind. | | = Team, we’re nearly halfway through December, and our most critical end-of-year goal is just on the horizon. So we’re going to do something big: = = Scott Perry’s commitment to extremism over people is not just wrong, it’s dangerous, and his actions throughout 2021 give us all the more reason to ensure that his political reign ends soon. Every $5, $15, or $25 we bring in gets us closer and closer to ending a decade of broken promises and sending a real leader to Congress. Scott Perry is one of the most vulnerable extremists in Congress, and your support will help us finally kick him out of office. That’s why we need to act now. Before tomorrow at midnight, we’ll be raising $5,000 to build out the resources we’ll need to end Scott Perry’s career.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Eugene ** | | Eugene DePasquale has dedicated his public service to tirelessly fighting for working people, our senior citizens, and our most vulnerable. For far too long, too many of our communities have been left behind by Governor Henry McMaster — who has shown time and time again he’s NOT up to the task of leading our state forward. Peter,

Donald Trump has a path back to the White House in 2024, and he’s already laying the groundwork to make it happen.

Step 1: Help Republicans retake the House and Senate by supporting “loyal” candidates who support his Big Lie about how the 2020 election was “stolen.”

Step 2: Give extremist members of the GOP leadership spots so that they will march in lockstep with Trump’s plans to win in 2024 by any means necessary.

Step 3: Get the GOP to give Trump the presidency, no matter what the vote totals or the Electoral College say, by refusing to certify the election and appointing Trump as president.

[_**Hillary Clinton isn’t exaggerating. The authoritarian Donald Trump 2024 playbook is plain to see. The only question is what good people like you will do to stop him and save our democracy.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39755557/321264091/-1273307081?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211216-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGEwNmU5OC1jYjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kMjRnVFHuDP09Gqs63IVazmPv9qnjXUxh91xe9UhGzw=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39755558/321264092/-1273307081?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211216-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGEwNmU5OC1jYjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kMjRnVFHuDP09Gqs63IVazmPv9qnjXUxh91xe9UhGzw=)

clean_body: If we fall short, we could lose our lead. | Friend, Tony Evers and his allies are just waiting for us to fall short tomorrow at the FINAL mid-month deadline of 2021. If we kick off this historic election year by having to overcome a massive deficit, the lead we’ve built will be WIPED OUT. But as things stand, we’re still $22,915 behind. Evers’ allies have already begun running lying attack ads against me -- so make no mistake, if we come up short over the next 24 hours, it’ll be seen as a sign of weakness and we’ll be facing a barrage of brand-new attacks. With Tony Evers’ approval now hitting a record-low, we’ve built a LEAD of 53% of Wisconsin voters who would not reelect Evers. But these numbers mean the early attacks against us will only intensify... And we can’t become complacent. If we CRUSH this final mid-month deadline, we’ll have positioned ourselves to grow our advantage into a commanding lead by early next year that Tony Evers won’t be able to overcome -- no matter how much money his allies pump into this governor’s race. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

I’m getting back in the saddle because our way of life and conservative values are worth defending. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4f03627469564b8091fddd2838e49c82&_e=L0dsubRZqI2WYp0AQtHIfJ5a2cAFkNu8UQqGhNsEKFtovF3nsmxN2PM_ta_aTiOPpvAdJ7DL-voImyJB0GaMNRwc4ITZ6AF4p9nvecjVuRD19m_Y0Hn-jqGRbvjZEWyfT9qKA2Qbuqi8wWcc1pMdPKqW2-wCpLFDCSTtt1oHMs_nwEk3ZRKCDO1pBstybvD_wl8CrbseWV5jXuKT1RoOLeGZAyURPR9VPG6N_Pw3Mrr30RGV648oGgY31ZibuoNRqMERtHyJ5cevEjnQtI6OzmXdBjWEDOAqnj9EOqxWfEAfA6ajcLutP2pwTucqtrzCrCIT-1NUIgQXLlh1ZvlD0-EEZWhBt45cOGzVD3Z671UxrIxHmzYfJlsEe-WQHXQF)

---
Fellow American,

When I left Congress in 2017 to serve in President Trump’s cabinet, I felt good about the state of our Nation.

The economy was about to experience a record boom. Congress and the Trump Administration had exercised the Congressional Review Act to pull back egregious Obama-era regulations on energy and agriculture. President Trump had put terrorists and adversaries on notice. And Republicans had control of the House, Senate and Presidency.

America was a force to be reckoned with on the world stage.

_Our country was led by an America-First President._

But Fellow American, when I think about just the first year under the yoke of Democrat leadership, I’m horrified at what’s happening to our country.

Our border is nonexistent and wide open with a record number of illegal migrants streaming into our country daily – secretly being sent to unsuspecting states by the Biden administration

The government is threatening our freedom with its unconstitutional mandates.

President Biden turned his back and abandoned Americans overseas.

Fellow American, this is not the same situation that I left in the hands of Congress in 2017.

If we haven’t met yet, I’m Ryan Zinke - a retired US Navy SEAL Commander, former State Senator, twice elected Congressman, and former U.S. Secretary of the Interior under the 45th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump. I’m also a fifth generation Montanan, proud father, grandfather, husband, and Constitutional conservative.

I’m running for Congress again because I can no longer sit on the sidelines and watch the crazies on the left destroy our country. I took a blood oath and served my Nation, but I’m ready to do it again. We’re in a battle for our freedom, and this battle isn’t taking place in foreign countries but here at home, on our very own American soil - it’s a battle of ideas. The idea that the USA is the best country ever conceived in the history of this planet versus the idea that we need to be more socialist, more communist, more European, less American.

My ask of you today: [**would you be willing to contribute $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to my campaign today to send me to Congress to continue my service to our great nation?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4f03627469564b8091fddd2838e49c82&_e=L0dsubRZqI2WYp0AQtHIfJ5a2cAFkNu8UQqGhNsEKFtovF3nsmxN2PM_ta_aTiOPpvAdJ7DL-voImyJB0GaMNRwc4ITZ6AF4p9nvecjVuRD19m_Y0Hn-jqGRbvjZEWyfT9qKA2Qbuqi8wWcc1pMdPKqW2-wCpLFDCSTtt1oHMs_lKmkjQYNwsH1pKk-NtbOafyp-GMkM1Qa5FMJ4R9LFclLYIq4d9KLkSt9YqPMa2TdXsL0ioOXdk_mBZfDIf-s1XYCDTekFTiJqUnNFEKXxZOVF1GHOe63zegXyvU5KCB3b0mRiA3-6jK8sjA3_2jPF5sS1ZT4LhybY8G670LLb6O-1UNGhN807aAukMQBEIQP_D_bcYsJU0ELel5xBJYPB)

| [ SEND THE SEAL ⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4f03627469564b8091fddd2838e49c82&_e=L0dsubRZqI2WYp0AQtHIfJ5a2cAFkNu8UQqGhNsEKFtovF3nsmxN2PM_ta_aTiOPpvAdJ7DL-voImyJB0GaMNRwc4ITZ6AF4p9nvecjVuRD19m_Y0Hn-jqGRbvjZEWyfT9qKA2Qbuqi8wWcc1pMdPKqW2-wCpLFDCSTtt1oHMs_dnLD2dQCyYDYhf_j6m9dXr_jhl0IEpQSTE_YghYETEspE226yfpGWtEmsFe-wSKQ3S5lkLt_N_dJS_gkY566jaPC-igiiousudQImK8ELJdMK-tq3xrb0QmMonr26N9AOX-Fagff-ZxAv9Swmbm1l4WoP3zBq_-SwFLkoGZs-oLvEgEKJodYKZBGu3_A6kl8uE9pRpZXW_d6tdQnW10tv)
---

Fellow American, as a Navy SEAL you have a very small team - who work closely together and don’t back down from anything. But running for Congress means we need a large team of America-First patriots to win this fight - [**and I need you on my team.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4f03627469564b8091fddd2838e49c82&_e=L0dsubRZqI2WYp0AQtHIfJ5a2cAFkNu8UQqGhNsEKFtovF3nsmxN2PM_ta_aTiOPpvAdJ7DL-voImyJB0GaMNRwc4ITZ6AF4p9nvecjVuRD19m_Y0Hn-jqGRbvjZEWyfT9qKA2Qbuqi8wWcc1pMdPKqW2-wCpLFDCSTtt1oHMs8dAnqYZRoaQFpyLYVgK5XlmmHfVUvLqm98zICiOTZG5GRi9m49m6Y8sei1PVdpImB9zgZXqj58LpByO41Y_hUyyK34QI0wxDLllwDGg56BpKz72Wzdr_yYpEDTOUs9nvi0ruHImw27Q47bGk7ljrDMTqNXQAD4Zq1MzGcgYm2pd0GMAD1V56ORSkDuNwZQcvUKIwr9NPI1648_-cpuZbWD)

I refuse to accept the failed leadership in Washington as the new norm. It’s time to put Washington politics aside and work together as a Nation. The biggest threats aren’t foreign governments, it’s the division within our own country.

It’s time to come together as a Nation and put America first once again. [**I hope you’ll consider joining my team to take back our country and making a contribution today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4f03627469564b8091fddd2838e49c82&_e=L0dsubRZqI2WYp0AQtHIfJ5a2cAFkNu8UQqGhNsEKFtovF3nsmxN2PM_ta_aTiOPpvAdJ7DL-voImyJB0GaMNRwc4ITZ6AF4p9nvecjVuRD19m_Y0Hn-jqGRbvjZEWyfT9qKA2Qbuqi8wWcc1pMdPKqW2-wCpLFDCSTtt1oHMs_Gj2ttStPcYc8GMPOst_XuQ4NHVEAmgdUkCw8iltY5ZczTRAj_no_ejlWsWi6z2mPXfT-6LCYIme7lBy5VgOspWfxLriyxiuqq9H6gthCfn5Er7iqhJXcfSRMAWVas-ctZ3pMlW5jSLBkM1SQMZfIsbPdrHaQFWOmNx_q8rsQqAiKeevHm8qGh4mZJJDPL6RfO6loBKg5epJPEYDPTnJ08)

[**Let’s get our Nation back on track, because our future generations (like my beautiful granddaughters) deserve to grow up in a strong and secure United States of America.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4f03627469564b8091fddd2838e49c82&_e=L0dsubRZqI2WYp0AQtHIfJ5a2cAFkNu8UQqGhNsEKFtovF3nsmxN2PM_ta_aTiOPpvAdJ7DL-voImyJB0GaMNRwc4ITZ6AF4p9nvecjVuRD19m_Y0Hn-jqGRbvjZEWyfT9qKA2Qbuqi8wWcc1pMdPKqW2-wCpLFDCSTtt1oHMs__HaE9T4ZSlQbETElhmg4D0bWakfimKYC1Bn7_9FsXmyOvjYVZl1Yx23stebrj87EV7RwT4hDdeC8MI7DiFZ0czNb5r8JNTBvG0DuaEwRBiHbh50PU3Q4ZnGqJkl-1tzTSrsG4o7QmKKUSaht9HePZT29CxCc_hv9AYp5hfYNq6L17HJimvISgkuDkQqQKu_qobHz5bZanu7b3JkwKnwwP)

For God and Country,

Secretary Ryan Zinke
U.S. Navy SEAL - Retired

[ SEND THE SEAL ⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4f03627469564b8091fddd2838e49c82&_e=L0dsubRZqI2WYp0AQtHIfJ5a2cAFkNu8UQqGhNsEKFtovF3nsmxN2PM_ta_aTiOPpvAdJ7DL-voImyJB0GaMNRwc4ITZ6AF4p9nvecjVuRD19m_Y0Hn-jqGRbvjZEWyfT9qKA2Qbuqi8wWcc1pMdPKqW2-wCpLFDCSTtt1oHMs-pp2tPlmjun0CAb8UGYdlGRyRRic0Xke8Tz7PeKYI5mGonaJGEV4uoqIrTzsfocYnUaPowV4zxSrFWsQKvHTC3l8Y9KbM5j3HB4DNMZB3V7c0hfJf4tdhl8o0tJLZ2PcrpXxz0ibL-2ZtOlPOfAILaiBGji8x8ABTzX8ruCMh5hkeH7kL40HBZJiZNYmp-lt-oz1aErwhRv5JKmcGGodg3)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: “Islamophobia is not real . . . ”
body:
Yesterday, the House of Representatives passed the "Combating International Islamophobia Act", sponsored by none-other than Jew-hating, Anti-American, Anti-White, Radical Muslim, and racist-in-chief, Ilhan Omar!
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PtSki59ZqXDe2tUSKt05iw/OpNQYowKF43Gjf3HEt1lJw)
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PtSki59ZqXDe2tUSKt05iw/OpNQYowKF43Gjf3HEt1lJw) Patriot,

Yesterday, the House of Representatives passed the "Combating International Islamophobia Act", sponsored by none-other than Jew-hating, Anti-American, Anti-White, Radical Muslim, and racist-in-chief, Ilhan Omar!

**The act establishes a special envoy in the Department of State to monitor and report on "Islamophobia" WORLDWIDE!**

I can save taxpayers several millions of dollars and write up that report in four words:
**ISLAMOPHOBIA IS NOT REAL!**
[**Help me tell that truth by backing my congressional campaign today!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PtSki59ZqXDe2tUSKt05iw/OpNQYowKF43Gjf3HEt1lJw)

That's right. A phobia is defined as an "IRRATIONAL fear" of something. And you know what? We have EVERY reason to fear terrorism, murder and the hatred that is perpetuated in the Quran by Radical Muslims!

Want proof?
> _Just ask the 307 family members of Marines killed in the Beirut barracks bombing in 1983.
>
> Ask the survivors of the U.S. Embassy bombings in Tanzania and Kenya that killed 224 people in 1998.
>
> Ask the families of the Bali bombings or Madrid train bombings that killed 298 total.
>
> Look into the eyes of the mothers and fathers of the 186 children lost in the Beslan school siege by Islamic terrorists!
>
> **Ask the wives, husbands, mothers and fathers of the 2,996 lives lost on 9/11!**_
**TENS OF THOUSANDS** of men, women and children have been slaughtered in terrorist attacks in the name of Islam in 309 recognized attacks - **and that 's only counting the attacks that have been DECLARED as being tied to Islamic Terrorism!**

There are thousands of more attacks that go unreported every single year!

[**Help me stand for truth in Congress and back my campaign today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PtSki59ZqXDe2tUSKt05iw/OpNQYowKF43Gjf3HEt1lJw)

Do you know how many people have died in confirmed "Islamophobic attacks" in America? Four - three of which occurred in the emotional days following 9/11!

In fact, ten times more people have died due to Post Office Workers "going postal" than those who have been killed as a result of alleged acts of "Islamophobia."

Yet, Ilhan Omar managed to get her way once again, and yesterday she used her perpetual state of victimhood to get Congress to pass a law about an epidemic that only exists in her imagination.

**We need strong leaders in Congress who are willing to TELL THE TRUTH and confront the insanity of the Left, and the full-blown Jihadists like Ilhan Omar who have infiltrated our government. THAT LEADER IS ME!**

[**Back my run for Congress today, and help me do just that.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PtSki59ZqXDe2tUSKt05iw/OpNQYowKF43Gjf3HEt1lJw)

With the End-of-Year fundraising deadline approaching, I need every dollar you can spare to help me win so I can compete against a Do-Nothing RINO who has been in Congress for way too long.

Thanks so much for all that you do, and [**please support my campaign**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PtSki59ZqXDe2tUSKt05iw/OpNQYowKF43Gjf3HEt1lJw).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

**The future of Roe v. Wade is up in the air, friend. **
**Here's the good news:** Democratic allies of reproductive rights are fighting to defend abortion access on the state level – codifying it into state instead of federal law. That means even the Trump-stacked supermajority on the Supreme Court can't stop them!
**But here's the problem, friend:** If extremist Republican Kari Lake wins the Arizona gubernatorial race, there will be no chance for efforts like this to succeed here. She's been nothing but clear with her stance on abortion – she wants it banned.
Arizona needs a leader who will fight tooth and nail to DEFEND reproductive freedoms, not take them away – and Marco Lopez will be that governor. **But if the Supreme Court overturns Roe v. name: Alex Padilla
subject: This race was decided by just 2 percentage points in 2016
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Will you please split a $10 contribution between Senator Cortez Masto and my campaign?
#

Hi there,
My colleague, Senator Catherine Cortez Masto of Nevada, is the _first_ Latina ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And she did it by overcoming more than $50 million in spending from Mitch McConnell and national Republicans.
Now, she’s up for re-election, in a state that President Biden only narrowly won. And Republicans are coming after her once again.
Donald Trump has endorsed her opponent, and GOP groups (including one tied to Mitch McConnell) have already spent millions of dollars to try to beat her.
It’s going to take a lot of effort, energy, and yes, money, to fight back against these Republican attacks, so I have to ask:
[**Will you please split a $10 contribution between Senator Cortez Masto and my campaign? We cannot afford to let Republicans buy this seat and flip the Senate red.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21-ccm?refcode=&t=1&refcode2=509_159979_zO6Ye-&akid=509%2E159979%2EzO6Ye-)
**[SPLIT A DONATION](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21-ccm?refcode=&t=2&refcode2=509_159979_zO6Ye-&akid=509%2E159979%2EzO6Ye-)**
CNN is calling Sen. Cortez Masto one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, and Cook Political Report recently downgraded the race from “Leans Democratic” to “Toss-Up.”
Look, this race was decided by just 2 percentage points in 2016 — and it was because grassroots supporters like you came through at critical moments.
**This is the type of state that could flip back to Republicans if we’re not prepared. So we’re in another one of those critical moments. What do you say?**
[**Can you split a contribution — of $10 or whatever makes sense for you right now — between Sen. Cortez Masto and my campaign? In a race this tight, every single dollar makes a difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21-ccm?refcode=&t=3&refcode2=509_159979_zO6Ye-&akid=509%2E159979%2EzO6Ye-)
With your help today, we can defend this seat and our Senate majority from whatever the GOP throws our way. Thank you so much for being on our team.
As my friend Catherine says...
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
\- Alex Padilla
P.S. This is going to be an incredibly tight race, and with Senate control on the line, this could be the race that makes the difference. [**If you can afford it, a $10 donation split between Sen. Cortez Masto and my campaign would make a BIG difference in our fight to hold the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21-ccm?refcode=&t=4&refcode2=509_159979_zO6Ye-&akid=509%2E159979%2EzO6Ye-)

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=509%2E159979%2EzO6Ye-)

Brian Fitzpatrick voted AGAINST holding Donald Trump’s chief of staff Mark Meadows in contempt for refusing to cooperate with the bipartisan committee investigating January 6.** That’s outrageous. Meadows must be held accountable for his involvement in the insurrection and attempt to overturn the 2020 election results. Records including emails, texts, and even a PowerPoint presentation outline how Meadows worked with others in the Republican Party to try and figure out a way to throw out millions of people’s votes and keep Trump in power. That’s undemocratic and criminal. Despite all the evidence, my opponent chose party over democracy and voted against recommending criminal charges for Meadows after he failed to appear for deposition. _If Fitzpatrick won’t stand up for the first responders and the people in the building that day, why do you think he’ll stand up for you?_ **[Our district needs new leadership, and unlike Fitzpatrick, I’m ready to fiercely defend our democracy and your best interests in Washington. clean_body: | = Hey team, I know you already heard from my campaign manager today about our crucial mid-month deadline tonight at midnight, but I had to make sure you saw this news: Yesterday, PA-01’s Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick voted AGAINST holding Donald Trump’s chief of staff Mark Meadows in contempt for refusing to cooperate with the bipartisan committee investigating January 6. That’s outrageous. Meadows must be held accountable for his involvement in the insurrection and attempt to overturn the 2020 election results. Records including emails, texts, and even a PowerPoint presentation outline how Meadows worked with others in the Republican Party to try and figure out a way to throw out millions of people’s votes and keep Trump in power. That’s undemocratic and criminal. Despite all the evidence, my opponent chose party over democracy and voted against recommending criminal charges for Meadows after he failed to appear for deposition. If Fitzpatrick won’t stand up for the first responders and the people in the building that day, why do you think he’ll stand up for you? = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = — Ashley | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: THE Worst Commander in Chief in History!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden disrespects the military |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cd6c53a7d9&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

As a vet, I'm furious at Joe Biden and his disrespect for our military!

_One of the greatest things about President Trump was his love for our military and our soldiers. That man knows the value of those who lay down their lives for our freedom!_

Joe Biden, though, hates America. He has made our military woke and weak- and his latest disrespect has been too much!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=76d61901d0&e=afa21b7626), a swing district in the Orlando area last held by Republicans in 2013. This is a targeted district by the NRCC because, with the Red Wave coming in 2022, we can take this seat!**

Surely you've heard of the "woke" generals like Milley. With guys like this, one wonders if we would even win a war anymore? Townhall reports:

_Last year, Milley should have been fired when he apologized for walking with President Trump to St. John’s Episcopal Church near the White House. In the mayhem of a riot in Washington D.C., the church was severely damaged and almost burned to the ground. By visiting, the President showed his support for religious freedom and his opposition to the lawlessness that occurred nationwide in the aftermath of the death of George Floyd in Minneapolis. Before leaving, the President was photographed holding a Bible in front of the church.

After backlash from left-wing commentators on social media, Milley apologized. In an address to the National Defense University, Milley said “I should not have been there...My presence in that moment and in that environment created a perception of the military involved in domestic politics.”

The apology was unnecessary and foolish; however, it did confirm to all Americans that Milley did not support President Trump. It served as his plea to keep the position in the Biden administration. Not surprisingly, Milley was retained by Biden as both share the same ideology and the same level of incompetence.

In June, Milley established his “woke” credentials by decrying the evils of white anger and supporting the study of this topic in the United States military. In congressional testimony, Milley defended the teaching of critical race theory at the U.S. Military Academy at West Point._
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=07a6508fb7&e=afa21b7626)
---
| But now, Biden as pushed this too far!

Presidents usually attend the annual Army-Navy game. President Trump attended every year- it was his way of honoring the service by the cadets and midshipmen.

Biden? He hid in the White House, afraid to face the scorn of the military!
_**Donald Trump Jr.: Joe Biden Skipped Army-Navy Game to Avoid “Let’s Go Brandon!” Chants**_
_Joe Biden snubbed the Army-Navy football game on Saturday, opting instead to remain in his home state of Delaware.

The internet couldn’t help but notice Biden’s absence at the Army-Navy game at the MetLife Stadium in Rutherford, New Jersey, which has been customarily attended by former U.S. presidents.

“Let’s Go Brandon” and “Fuck Joe Biden” chants have erupted at numerous college football games across the country in recent months as his COVID and spending policies have resulted in inflation, rising gas prices, and supply chain breakdowns.

By contrast, former President Trump enjoyed epic tributes from soldiers and spectators alike during the Army-Navy games, which he attended every year as president except for 2017._

Now, different presidents have different priorities when they get to office.

BUT EVERY SINGLE PRESIDENT SINCE 1900, EXCEPT BIDEN, HAS ATTENDED THE ARMY-NAVY GAME!

This is the reason the winner gets the "Commander in Chief Trophy".

**Biden simply hates our military. He hates our country and wants to weaken and diminish those who protect us. That's the only reasonable explanation for this!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=be3939b317&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **I am a combat Army vet. My sons served as well. The military is very important to our family, and we understand the importance of defending our freedoms. **

The Socialist Democrats disagree. My Socialist opponent, Darren Soto, disagrees. Biden apparently disagrees.

[I got more votes here in 2020 than any Republican ever had, because I stood up for our country, and stood against the Socialists. We want America First! Will you stand alongside me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8784c024ad&e=afa21b7626)

_The military needs allies in DC right now. They don't need Darren Soto! They need fighters, and I will fight for our military!_

Help me stand for Americans against Biden, and those who would destroy our country! [Help me stop all of Biden's agenda!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2af2e7c553&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2596ce2835&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=59732a693e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=134cb01fee&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5da542795f&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=989df4c0a9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=989df4c0a9).

name: Claudia, Me (1)
subject: fwd: what happened to ‘one citizen, one vote’?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
Did you know, according to a new Election Integrity Poll by Rasmussen, that... [](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=9e7f7c129e6f476caa30962944332edb&_e=mXhV2od0oGA5gwONw3PYg80S0tdamATpZlu6U-pd6wXhA_LqrT8NBJpelAYcct0DLI096MPRGpsc6QYX1IyTtvhDFG4Q5MWUHZQxSKv-xVCaBB9I8dplVUybXV_lkqs_DQz7RoxNSv0vI8_YsYJHFOwCJ_bfHNtNUj7CB5mZKoNRxFh_V7uOIFTZ36hA-zYdIwqe_Phmpeh6LblpZoHiiEKwv1VHV0fSEgMJgUZVedGvP-4vwhMP92dP-t8AJyg0DaWgkm-R2Ir7QbGcEv1GUA1qWfnTfp7byrZPnS0tM0Hwcep0HEv1qzUz2xdH6jwBvgDSkGX0ZafQRHR_lJ4YuSot6X2dR7zMOtep8hEnJksuQt1H71yyQPHWsKEJ5ph4BfrPB0ikW0y6j27s8yqmhm94hyvxnKtnEx_N5ezPj06HHqVlOArPrdgJFwun2fQJVQuACgMMRJKVdy5V3K6n7C4xh2bfy_7p7abyiKLvRIdCyZZFCiqZgd_Iz6CM4gMX) Hi Peter—it’s Claudia. Did you know, according to a new Election Integrity Poll by Rasmussen that: 🗳 _**75%**_ of voters support Voter ID ** ** 🗳 _**66%**_ agree that mail-in ballots lead to cheating ** ** 🗳 _**61%**_ want election reform in swing states ** ** 🗳 _**55%**_**** support audits It seems to me that the majority of American people are very concerned about safeguarding the sanctity and integrity of our elections, _but what are New York Democrats doing about it?_
* Giving non-citizens the right to vote in our elections
* Making mass no-excuse mail-in voting permanent
* Allowing the shady practice of ballot harvesting

body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39756703/321286382/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk438-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDdkYWNhNi1kNDVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlM1CJaBn2W4Dao_mG1cKY-1dLXgxq_-h7E0OheRLEY=)
Peter: Remember how exciting caller ID was back in the day – maybe when you were a kid, like I was, running to the telephone to see who was calling? Or even as an adult when caller ID was a brand-new thing?
**Bear with me; I promise the novelty of caller ID actually has to do with my campaign for Senate and why I'm so determined to defeat Sen. Grassley (R) here in Iowa. **
I had a few names memorized when I was a kid, but there was one I knew from the age of 10: Dad's business agent. When that name showed up on caller ID, it meant that there was work for my dad – a union pipefitter-welder. But on the days and weeks that name _didn't_ show up, it meant the opposite. It meant Mom and Dad had to worry about having enough to pay the bills.
Peter, I'm in this race to be a champion for working families in the Senate – because working families are _my_ family. But right now – for _years,_ really – Iowa's working families have not found an ally in Sen. Chuck Grassley. He's failed again and again to stand up for workers, choosing instead to align himself with wealthy corporate interests and the conspiracy theories of the former president.
**If Sen. Grassley won't show up for America's working families, it's time to send someone to the Senate who will.** That's why nobody will work harder than I will to defeat him, but I need your help. Sen. Grassley has the backing of Senate Republicans’ campaign arm, who have nearly $30 million campaign war chest, but I'm relying on a _grassroots movement_ to power us to victory. **I'm relying on your support.**
**[If you believe that working families deserve a stronger voice in Congress – and if you want Democrats to retain the Senate majority – then please make a grassroots contribution of whatever you can spare before tonight's midnight deadline. Our fight for working families grows stronger with every grassroots contribution, and together, we can defeat Sen. Grassley and win in Iowa.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39756704/321286383/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk438-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDdkYWNhNi1kNDVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlM1CJaBn2W4Dao_mG1cKY-1dLXgxq_-h7E0OheRLEY=)**
Peter, I'll never forget being at a union event with my dad a few years back and him saying, "I think I'm the first person in the family who has worked in the building trades to live long enough to get my pension." That really stuck with me – and it's why I fought so hard in Congress to ensure people are paid a fair wage and can be taken care of if they're hurt on the job.

For all the working families out there, let's win this. I really appreciate your support.
Abby
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39756705/321286384/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk438-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDdkYWNhNi1kNDVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlM1CJaBn2W4Dao_mG1cKY-1dLXgxq_-h7E0OheRLEY=)

Peter,

This is _**HUGE.**_

Soon, I will be making a _**MAJOR**_ announcement and I want _**YOU**_ to be the first to know about it.

You have always been an incredible Patriot who has been by my side, Peter. That's why _I'm giving you my trust._ The ONLY way to find out about this _EPIC_ announcement is by joining my **Official Trump Announcement Priority List,** _but I was just told your name isn't on it._

Peter, you have the opportunity to be the first to know about this major announcement but you need to hurry. You ONLY have until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to join my **Official Trump Announcement Priority List.**

_*When you make a donation of ANY AMOUNT, you'll automatically get your name at the TOP of the Official Trump Announcement Priority List._

I'm not reaching out to just anybody, Peter. I'm reaching out to YOU because I know what an incredible supporter you are. This announcement is going to be _**EXTREMELY**_ important and I really want to tell YOU before anyone else.

_My team will be showing me a list of who stepped up and who didn't - I want to see your name there._

**_[Please contribute any amount by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to get your name on my Official Trump Announcement Priority List.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59035630:J0fiALEwN:m:1:3253819041:2F58FAC41705724E6DC5FA9BB80ED8ED:r)_**

Thank you,
