name: Tim Ryan
subject: image attached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1744%2E3611125%2EiyOhPu ][IMG]

Do you see this young boy, folks?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6282?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1744%2E3611125%2EiyOhPu ]Photo of young Tim at bat

This boy was raised by a single mom who worked clerical jobs to put food
on the table. Growing up outside Youngstown, he watched his family lose
their livelihoods as steel mills shut down and jobs got shipped overseas.
He learned the value of hard work from an early age and never forgot where
he came from.

That boy was me, folks. And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to
make sure families like mine are taken care of and that all workers get
the dignity and respect they deserve.

I know what’s at stake in this election. We have a once-in-a-generation
opportunity to tilt the balance of power back to working families—and I’m
damn sure none of my millionaire Republican opponents with their vacation
homes and private yachts will get us there.

CNN ranks us as one of the most likely seats to flip in 2022—but to win
this race and make history, we need your help to overcome everything the
other side will throw at us.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6281?t=1007&akid=1744%2E3611125%2EiyOhPu ]Will you make a donation of anything you can afford to help us flip
Ohio blue? Our campaign is powered by folks like you, and even $3 makes a
huge difference.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6282?t=1010&amount=3&akid=1744%2E3611125%2EiyOhPu ]Donate $3
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6282?t=1011&amount=50&akid=1744%2E3611125%2EiyOhPu ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6282?t=1012&amount=100&akid=1744%2E3611125%2EiyOhPu ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6282?t=1013&amount=200&akid=1744%2E3611125%2EiyOhPu ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6282?t=1014&amount=250&akid=1744%2E3611125%2EiyOhPu ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6282?t=1015&amount=25&akid=1744%2E3611125%2EiyOhPu ]Other Amount

I know how hard you work for every dollar, and I will never take your
support for granted. Thank you so much for anything you can chip in to
help us win this critical race.

-- Tim

clean_body: [ ][IMG] Do you see this young boy, folks? [ ]Photo of young Tim at bat This boy was raised by a single mom who worked clerical jobs to put food on the table. Growing up outside Youngstown, he watched his family lose their livelihoods as steel mills shut down and jobs got shipped overseas. He learned the value of hard work from an early age and never forgot where he came from. That boy was me, folks. And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to make sure families like mine are taken care of and that all workers get the dignity and respect they deserve. I know what’s at stake in this election. We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to tilt the balance of power back to working families—and I’m damn sure none of my millionaire Republican opponents with their vacation homes and private yachts will get us there. CNN ranks us as one of the most likely seats to flip in 2022—but to win this race and make history, we need your help to overcome everything the other side will throw at us. [ ]Will you make a donation of anything you can afford to help us flip Ohio blue? Our campaign is powered by folks like you, and even $3 makes a huge difference. [ ]Donate $3 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount I know how hard you work for every dollar, and I will never take your support for granted. Thank you so much for anything you can chip in to help us win this critical race. -- Tim [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [ ]click here. If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below! name: Laura Sydnor, Snappers Waterfront Cafe
subject: Maryland's restaurants and consumers need support
body:
| Thanks Doug. The effects of the COVID pandemic have placed nearly unbearable pressure on local, family-owned restaurants like ours. The likelihood of another challenging winter will make it even more difficult to keep the lights on. Given the importance of local restaurants as a source of jobs and revenue, your call for a three-month sales tax holiday is the right idea at the right time. It would truly be a lifeline for us, and for our workers and customers. Thank you for your support, Laura Sydnor Co-Owner, Snappers Waterfront Cafe Cambridge _\-------Begin Message-------_ From: Doug Gansler <info@douggansler.com> Date: Mon, Dec 13, 2021 at 4:01 PM Subject: Maryland's restaurants and consumers need support
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhntn6FMtLHdljJPa44aY_2GtzF_yo9S7o6VrPOsOxYMEfEKPgioAVxXHp9_xTv8MtWVw_vI9-1CrlWHMFTtZuIDdS15RlzY5SRzzNMI58s1hNFW1ZYkqnT68RV8fS7WzVp8-VdCUJqYe6EgfiYkCCENP6pO1yQ6eCFj_Vf8yLln6ZP6w6Vz-sOob_8wQ75YLBpu93CLHEH20n4Yzv1AfJ03xETYTFaEoShpd3sdo6xDjlffSLAF5f3bOJLWajqyecMsoip_B2PI4xosXzZsgnUmCPBrqF5eV2PW29SoAdyjif5DEA4fG7cW4d3irZLwU_bw3Wbq-CKzfXi15JL3R3dQ/3hw/Su7ytV1gT5mengM6R9G21A/h0/nxk_0TfZz1WMqIqtX_7UiLCHiB3nk3AQinYpdg4M3is)

Hi friends, **[Today, I called on Governor Hogan and the General Assembly to waive the sales tax in restaurants for three months. Will you join me in this important effort?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhntn6FMtLHdljJPa44aY_2GtzF_yo9S7o6VrPOsOxYMEfEKPgioAVxXHp9_xTv8MtWVw_vI9-1CrlWHMFTtZuIDdS15RlzY5SRzzNMI58s1hNFW1ZYkqnT68RV8fS7WzVYGMF-o5JXsDQDEb8mLsgTTx4UE3LsCo_adWmIdq2dulzZ0RCw0YEIJR210vOQ19e6kWU_F2T3p--8hLSBlgkW8ewvAe5WeDvGA8c09kRAU8l5IEBA5atSu71Gfb-9nFfiPCmxh7yWz0-dge_8SvcHCCxoKnmOxbqN6zs6snKyRat7xo_drInfuxoyoi8ZhOP0HzRJECNk2uG50j3bEFn6Q/3hw/Su7ytV1gT5mengM6R9G21A/h1/plq1nQqiYjccirfKZT6RXefa_DeAFAKGXc-9WxQ_3U4)**
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION ->**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhntn6FMtLHdljJPa44aY_2GtzF_yo9S7o6VrPOsOxYMEfEKPgioAVxXHp9_xTv8MtWVw_vI9-1CrlWHMFTtZuIDdS15RlzY5SRzzNMI58s1hNFW1ZYkqnT68RV8fS7WzVwpqVPhF_C3Q1P6EyLJkDE7z0EaWGoh4O3JrRE6aIOUBJcqtvo6vlW4bZIit1Ithy8g8ucsKYrF5wf03FDkCfVpqRqgtf-tAfjKV57X26u5hoBqgihDhWMsZ78Qz9WhyyTKQY5jSU0zuCy4HLjl0aIcNdfz9Z1e8ae16m52VxYVxO5l5pne5cR1octRFq9vj-fYn-LHkSJwYHO3UgrRwYiQ/3hw/Su7ytV1gT5mengM6R9G21A/h2/C9ekazz2xa39EZqr7MiDYFcS7EJbbNcpbBh6YPt_HgA)
---
Even as 2022 approaches, we continue to deal with the pandemic and its consequences. Far too many of our wonderful, locally-owned businesses have been destroyed, while others have limped along. Waiving the sales tax for restaurants will put a few extra dollars back into the pockets of consumers and bring customers back into our downtown areas to shop in other stores. This tax relief will also come during the quietest, slowest time of the year -- when restaurants need help the most, and when outdoor dining is less feasible due to the cold. It is clear that we are still in a crisis, and these businesses and their patrons are in need of help. **That's why the Maryland General Assembly must provide three months of desperately-needed relief for small business owners on their first day back in session in January. ** **[If you agree that Maryland's restaurants and local economy deserve this assistance, add your name to our petition and show your support today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhntn6FMtLHdljJPa44aY_2GtzF_yo9S7o6VrPOsOxYMEfEKPgioAVxXHp9_xTv8MtWVw_vI9-1CrlWHMFTtZuIDdS15RlzY5SRzzNMI58s1hNFW1ZYkqnT68RV8fS7WzVm50B-Ir7UyN4NEOnl-qCbB6Xqsxm2HEz_TYcxc8gMzeD4RO6xpvlHJj5Xl3Heo2D1ZQgVR9LwpKkUWCzR1sNlcRnER5TOJyUPFctUhTgU6YOR2VITRlzQmPlVbwxDiImMIoExvZyo8AFPorKR-Q6uNkJAKPnbHYiyhrKmXltTHjBnkdp3bUukvffeZVB2wePbZ9F97CuVvYllf8GExs6MQ/3hw/Su7ytV1gT5mengM6R9G21A/h3/ZGcDuq-ysc9CdkFyOtRRSfMSF6yRDOrx1ggW0GjG89I)**
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION ->**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhntn6FMtLHdljJPa44aY_2GtzF_yo9S7o6VrPOsOxYMEfEKPgioAVxXHp9_xTv8MtWVw_vI9-1CrlWHMFTtZuIDdS15RlzY5SRzzNMI58s1hNFW1ZYkqnT68RV8fS7WzV1F1KWmZsxEy6Burhl5DIldvaTmQhJF1SqgrV26VEa2kqrhQpWhLq4tsIAT1CQUbB7bUzARrLpLYOAvMABseItQoKU7CAS3hLx789iXwZnOGKNy9a5SLh4zETEewtdEtexosxbGnLNsZQ39mAjq3eQnMgiAx-xkNpM8tCx5oWPrO4T7JzvdMDeRwREuYinZDZwZAmNFhAJ3TCWJbbA2ZOiA/3hw/Su7ytV1gT5mengM6R9G21A/h4/aRF9vel8eHBcB34ZQ9LNxLeYmzSs6WFJTlCmYmU5RLc)

UNIQUE ID: #5907903
STATUS: **[UNCONFIRMED >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)**

_T_ _o ensure our data is as representative as possible, we 're requesting 90 responses from your state._

We need to move NOW.

The Supreme Court could overturn _Roe v. Wade_ at any moment -- and it's all thanks to conservative justices like Brett Kavanaugh.

We were **OUTRAGED** when Trump rushed to pack the court with THREE far-right, anti-choice nominees.

We were **APPALLED** when Mitch McConnell and his Senate Republicans voted in lockstep to place dangerous judges like Kavanaugh on the bench.

And now we're **HORRIFIED** at what they could do to life-saving reproductive freedoms.

But if we want to fight back by electing strong, pro-choice Democrats, we need to know if our grassroots team feels the same way.

That's why we're calling for 90 responses from your state before midnight.

******[Will you take our one-minute poll before midnight and let us know your thoughts on Brett Kavanaugh? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)******
---

Thank you,

DCCC

name: Roger Misso
subject: We're $5,118 short.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

At the beginning of the year, I promised transparency about our progress. Well, here it is: [_**we 're just $5,118 from reaching our fundraising target for 2021.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/JPoFBaFYDSYRKFv9qb1FT3zG_RhkxyJWhncWbN5TjKQ=/UWvv6sZi9rwDG2Cr7oGj9lk-saBqIRkq9uDvHWTtYk0=)

If we don't hit our mark, we won't be able to field a full slate of candidates in 2022. [_**That means we 'll have to leave some veterans behind.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/JPoFBaFYDSYRKFv9qb1FT3zG_RhkxyJWhncWbN5TjKQ=/UWvv6sZi9rwDG2Cr7oGj9lk-saBqIRkq9uDvHWTtYk0=)

_We 're not going to give up on them without a fight._

But we can't be in this fight alone. That's why we need you by our side now more than ever. [_**Can you rush a donation today so that we can field a full slate of veteran and military candidates of integrity for Congress in 2022?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/JPoFBaFYDSYRKFv9qb1FT3zG_RhkxyJWhncWbN5TjKQ=/UWvv6sZi9rwDG2Cr7oGj9lk-saBqIRkq9uDvHWTtYk0=) Every single cent counts!

_To break down why this is important:_
* [_**$10 helps us reach 20 voters by mail**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/JPoFBaFYDSYRKFv9qb1FT3zG_RhkxyJWhncWbN5TjKQ=/UWvv6sZi9rwDG2Cr7oGj9lk-saBqIRkq9uDvHWTtYk0=)
* [_**$100 helps us reach 250 voters door-to-door**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/JPoFBaFYDSYRKFv9qb1FT3zG_RhkxyJWhncWbN5TjKQ=/UWvv6sZi9rwDG2Cr7oGj9lk-saBqIRkq9uDvHWTtYk0=)
* [_**$500 helps us reach 5,000 voters by radio**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/JPoFBaFYDSYRKFv9qb1FT3zG_RhkxyJWhncWbN5TjKQ=/UWvv6sZi9rwDG2Cr7oGj9lk-saBqIRkq9uDvHWTtYk0=)
* [_**$1,000 or more helps us reach an extra 20,000 voters with TV or digital ad buys**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/JPoFBaFYDSYRKFv9qb1FT3zG_RhkxyJWhncWbN5TjKQ=/UWvv6sZi9rwDG2Cr7oGj9lk-saBqIRkq9uDvHWTtYk0=)

I know that many of us are feeling fatigued from fighting to do what's right for so long. But we have been here before. Our candidates - and our staff at Taking the Hill - have fought and sacrificed for this country in uniform. [_**Help us fight and sacrifice for it again in Congress.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/JPoFBaFYDSYRKFv9qb1FT3zG_RhkxyJWhncWbN5TjKQ=/UWvv6sZi9rwDG2Cr7oGj9lk-saBqIRkq9uDvHWTtYk0=)

Yours in service,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/JPoFBaFYDSYRKFv9qb1FT3zG_RhkxyJWhncWbN5TjKQ=/3PevxWjt9Dv8FaEfXQDvIt3_O2kel1eU9rMCr2dYrww=)_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/JPoFBaFYDSYRKFv9qb1FT3zG_RhkxyJWhncWbN5TjKQ=/PtbqHXiCYs6YNmwofeyZmm25cR3Ket-5B-rkwRjK0m8=)

To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/JPoFBaFYDSYRKFv9qb1FT3zG_RhkxyJWhncWbN5TjKQ=/9zEAUB1GASgtTjpukuI34dGBGBlYgx_sC0OWJ6tcRD0= "https://act.myngp.com/el/JPoFBaFYDSYRKFv9qb1FT3zG_RhkxyJWhncWbN5TjKQ=/9zEAUB1GASgtTjpukuI34dGBGBlYgx_sC0OWJ6tcRD0=").

Taking the Hill PAC

Bristol, PA 19007

Friend,

**Ensuring our children’s safety at school should be our top priority no matter what our political leanings are.**

It is for this reason that one of my top priorities this session is to place Student Resource Officers (SRO) in every public school across our great Commonwealth. This would not only ensure the safety of our students but would also create new law enforcement jobs across our Commonwealth.

At a time when the Radical Left wants to create a narrative that our men and women in blue are villains, this initiative would create a positive narrative around our law enforcement officers by showing our children that they are there to protect them.

[**Chip in now to help me put an SRO in every school across the Commonwealth.**](http://links.mcguireforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=1646ee1789c746fa925af25ab7afd241&_m=f19c5516ca9e47b7880bbec5a8a51d39&_e=u5i3uZtN4k-2vLR7sg-eYbCMEm5ndelk_tiC_hkXqM3JKexn3x18vp9cCk8NowYZ658mgbwj8VRZX7MhEqxLhJaJ-dpthq3TgFZbwQLs8kbKxsvo5BZ0Xwld99KneUffB6ak1rSG2Va9Jv4LVqYCKLl_Ilpisw_6JOOFtG9khG5NLnN44WIguCKl877wCFnjPGbcJNTOFgXTXkM9s3ZsHGRE8fPjoZU8Yva6om0cQoI8Vve0rVS4yKl6_vnKgOh06kcxGeOKHYpZb4B1FRiKZKm6hsaNFTjC1xj8m6Lcez-4hSpOsCJAXM37usZ-UXckTI1vAaAx6OzBeiCZi3RA0EMfz0kHwd5bbTJbe4Hen1zP8hzYr2KGA5wnDoH9sul_vTcqNhg3jHuCrMtUTD9_YMrzRCBqQRfHlipxT-4MhzwxOPmGBUWKM7lbm4Ag9oe9tdc--zyZ6ZSXQFM9rfCPtc4z4fKu0WnVl8CzHInAq_mVPrqdiR3pSEKHA9h4YdSe) [**$10 TO PROTECT OUR CHILDREN**](http://links.mcguireforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=1646ee1789c746fa925af25ab7afd241&_m=f19c5516ca9e47b7880bbec5a8a51d39&_e=u5i3uZtN4k-2vLR7sg-eYbCMEm5ndelk_tiC_hkXqM3JKexn3x18vp9cCk8NowYZ658mgbwj8VRZX7MhEqxLhJaJ-dpthq3TgFZbwQLs8kbKxsvo5BZ0Xwld99KneUffB6ak1rSG2Va9Jv4LVqYCKLl_Ilpisw_6JOOFtG9khG5NLnN44WIguCKl877wCFnjPGbcJNTOFgXTXkM9s3ZsHGRE8fPjoZU8Yva6om0cQoI8Vve0rVS4yKl6_vnKgOh06kcxGeOKHYpZb4B1FRiKZKm6hsaNFTjC1xj8m6Lcez8s2ay9rCnZlcUVDARHqV3iP-lQEchUuR583R7N_u8wMy-KW97AI_r0vmeNAvlDpo3NyMhXhh7u8dna0d6Lo3V2BhtwcHdhavkPa7qPmU9QMtlYTzP4x9faAgehDJgV0Ps33hBpOA5d16ZFwLBDLLCZIvLf84fTuqXp7bF8bYCSu3BmvB6X5QXKJjz-r9q4xFzRDB0-exvZnvtS7aRs6UHw)

Last year I introduced similar legislation that aimed to protect our teachers and students, but the Democrat majority in Richmond shot it down before it ever left the committee. **Now we have the majority, and I am committed to fighting tooth and nail until this legislation passes.**

_Our children are our future and should never feel unsafe while they are learning the necessary skills for life._ That’s why I am reaching out to you to help this legislation get the necessary momentum in order to keep our children safe in school.

clean_body: we must protect them | | | | | | | | | Friend, Ensuring our children’s safety at school should be our top priority no matter what our political leanings are. It is for this reason that one of my top priorities this session is to place Student Resource Officers (SRO) in every public school across our great Commonwealth. This would not only ensure the safety of our students but would also create new law enforcement jobs across our Commonwealth. At a time when the Radical Left wants to create a narrative that our men and women in blue are villains, this initiative would create a positive narrative around our law enforcement officers by showing our children that they are there to protect them. Last year I introduced similar legislation that aimed to protect our teachers and students, but the Democrat majority in Richmond shot it down before it ever left the committee. Now we have the majority, and I am committed to fighting tooth and nail until this legislation passes. Our children are our future and should never feel unsafe while they are learning the necessary skills for life. That’s why I am reaching out to you to help this legislation get the necessary momentum in order to keep our children safe in school. Del. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Want to know something incredible?
disclaimer_text: paid for by the highest bidder
body:
We’ve been preparing for this since John kicked off his campaign.
#
Want to know something incredible?
Last quarter, the average donation to our campaign was: **$22.30**. Yet we raised waaay more than any other candidate in the Pennsylvania Senate race, Democrat or Republican.
_THAT is what real grassroots momentum from working people looks like!_
But here's the cold, hard, mathematical reality about running a campaign the right way — the grassroots way — when we’re up against ultra-rich dudes like Dr. Oz: For us to spend $10,000 on a TV ad, we need _hundreds_ of our grassroots donors to pitch in. **Oz? He just has to pull out his checkbook and sign.**
Thankfully, we’ve been preparing for this since John kicked off his campaign — by building a powerful movement of hundreds of thousands of working folks from across Pennsylvania that can take on celebrity millionaires, GOP super PACS, and anyone who think they can buy this Senate seat.
**[Will you show you’re a part of this movement right now by pitching in $22.30 (our average gift last quarter) or any amount that feels right today?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38457?refcode=em20211216-3859&t=1&akid=3859%2E434096%2EiOTjQF)** _If one in three people reading this email donate, we’ll have a MAJOR surge to show on our final FEC report of 2021. Even a few dollars makes a difference!_
**[Contribute $22.30](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38463?refcode=em20211216-3859&t=8&akid=3859%2E434096%2EiOTjQF)**
**[Contribute other amount](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38457?refcode=em20211216-3859&t=9&akid=3859%2E434096%2EiOTjQF)**
Supporters like you are making sure Pennsylvania will *not* be bought and paid for by the highest bidder. That’s pretty freaking cool, Derek.
Thank you for being on this team, 🙏
—Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211216-3859-footer&t=10&refcode2=3859_434096_iOTjQF&akid=3859%2E434096%2EiOTjQF)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=11&akid=3859%2E434096%2EiOTjQF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3859%2E434096%2EiOTjQF)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: The whistleblower's letter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Wait till you see this |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f6d208758b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the only Secretary of State Candidate who has fought for ballot protection measures and fraud-proof watermarking on ballots. And this is exactly what Arizona needs.

[**We are less than two weeks away from the end of the quarter, where we need to hit our critical fundraising deadline. We have just $37,800 left to raise by the end of the month.**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5543f03e9c&e=44b8c466b0)

[_Every donation counts! Can you support my campaign for Arizona Secretary of State with a donation of $50, $100, $250 or more today?_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e4724bb9d9&e=44b8c466b0)

We are making tremendous end-of-year strides for election integrity. Just this last Monday, we held an election integrity hearing in Pima County, Arizona’s second-largest county.

**I made headlines by reading a disturbing letter from a Democrat Whistleblower in the hearing:**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=46cbfdafa5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| An excerpt from this whistleblower’s letter reads:

_Please be advised the Pima County Recorder, located at 240 N. Stone Avenue in Tucson, Arizona, 85701 in Pima County, Arizona, and the Democrat Party added fraud votes. In the initial count of the vote by mail (VBM) totals released at 8 pm on November 3, 2020, There are approximately 35,000 fraud votes added to each Democrat candidates’ vote totals. Candidates impacted include County, State, and Federal Election candidates. Through the utilization of the automated ballot count machines in Pima County Elections, My understanding is that 35,000 was embedded into each Democrat candidates’ total votes. Below are the meeting notes._

35,000 votes! This is not only unacceptable, fraudulent, and criminal, but more than the margin of error!

**And this is exactly what we will dive into in our Pima County Audit.**

Additionally, new information was uncovered:

There were several locations noted with an obscenely high voter turnout. How his is obscene?

_Over 100%._
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=bdd559796d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Sells, Arizona is just one of many locations where we saw the exact same thing. Mathematically impossible voter turnout numbers.

You don’t need to be a mathematician to know you can’t go over 100%, folks.
**What’s Next**
So here’s what we need to do next. We need to launch a full forensic audit of Pima County, Arizona.

**This will build up a huge body of evidence which we will then use to pressure AG Mark Brnovich’s office to do his job and lock up those responsible.**

_Then, we must make sure this never happens again. We do this by one, getting rid of the perpetrators of fraud in the first place and by two, installing safeguards such as watermarked ballots that cannot be counterfeited while also cleaning up the voter rolls._

**Yes, this sounds simple. But no, it is not easy. And this is why I must once again ask for your urgent support. We must raise an additional $37,800 by the end of this month to ensure that Election Integrity is protected.**

_These steps are crucial, but expensive._

**_[Please support whatever you can today, it is crucial we maximize our war chest by the end of this year.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=05d1aafdc6&e=44b8c466b0) If we do not, we will be handing the Democrats an easy victory. We can’t let that happen!_**

[**_Donate as much as you can and we can once again make sure our elections are safe!_**

Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4e550e3f7e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6c8ce7595c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b594432e33&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=bc2d99e55d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=bc2d99e55d).
---

subject: Jeff CALLS OUT an opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bartos for US Senate |
body:

body:

| | |

We've got a MAJOR problem in Georgia, team.

Stacey Abrams called her state's new voting law "Jim Crow 2.0," and now Republicans are reportedly using it to **purge** Black Democratic members of key county election boards and replace them with far-right conspiracy theorists and promoters of Trump's Big Lie.

This is a MAJOR voter suppression threat in a must-win swing state, which is why we've launched a **massive petition to defend voting rights -- but we need 50,000 signatures by midnight TONIGHT, and we’re missing your name!**

**[Add your name by 11:59 P.M. to say you'll DEFEND voting rights and stop Trump’s cronies from threatening our elections>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/5981?ask=5&t=17&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211216-Alert-GAElectionBoards-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211216-Alert-GAElectionBoards-ETG-sl1&akid=2332%2E9716520%2E2Nf90p)**

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I didn’t want to believe it…but now I do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I know you’re busy with your holiday festivities and to be honest, I really really don’t like sending messages like this so I’ll keep it short. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?337g7--fgxr-4qqlpo4&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative I know you’re busy with your holiday festivities and to be honest, I really really don’t like sending messages like this, so I’ll keep it short.

We are only a few days away from OUR LAST DEADLINE before our End of Year fundraising deadline...and our numbers are not looking good. This is our last deadline before the quarter, month, and year expire and we can't afford to fail.

When I was named one of the most vulnerable Republican Senators up for reelection, I didn’t want to believe it. But now I do. Democrats are just pummeling Florida with their radical cash and we are having a hard time keeping up. I knew my opponent and I were virtually tied, and I knew this was going to be a tough and expensive race, but we are really in the thick of it right now.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-337g7-1pniv-4qqlpo4/)
---

**[ I’m not asking for much. I actually just need $18 from you today to know that you are a part of this team. Do you think you’re able to donate that in the next hour so my team and I are able to fight back against the MILLIONS my opponent is raising?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-337g7-1pniw-4qqlpo5/ "I’m not asking for much. I actually just need $18 from you today to know that you are a part of this team. Do you think you’re able to donate that in the next hour so my team and I are able to fight back against the MILLIONS my opponent is raising? ")**
---
| | | [DONATE $18 >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-337g7-1pnix-4qqlpo6/ "DONATE $18")
---
Thanks so much,
Marco

---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-337g7-1pniy-4qqlpo7/ "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Fellow Conservative, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-337g7-1pniz-4qqlpo8/ "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

Democrats are just pummeling Florida with their radical cash and we are having a hard time keeping up. I knew my opponent and I were virtually tied, and I knew this was going to be a tough and expensive race, but we are really in the thick of it right now. | "I’m not asking for much. I actually just need $18 from you today to know that you are a part of this team. Do you think you’re able to donate that in the next hour so my team and I are able to fight back against the MILLIONS my opponent is raising? " | | | "DONATE $18" Thanks so much, Marco | | | | "MarcoRubioFooter" | Personal note from Marco Rubio: Fellow Conservative, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again. Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate. If you stand with me, "please click here to donate now"**. Thank you for everything you do, Marco Rubio | | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate P.O. Box 661537 Miami, FL 33266 6890 E. Sunrise Dr. Suite 120-137 Tucson Arizona 85750 United States You are subscribed to this email as dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to modify your or .

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: The time has come to change the Senate rules to protect our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Please: add your name | | |
---
Folks – I just got off the Senate floor where I spoke about the systematic undermining of our elections, and in turn, our democracy, and I wanted to share that message with you. Across the country, partisan politicians are attacking the sacred American right of free, fair, and impartially administered elections. In Georgia, a new law enabled the legislature to seize control of the State Election Board, allowing elected legislators to install a partisan majority beholden to the legislature, with the ability to suspend and replace local election officials. And in Arizona, legislators have proposed a bill that would enable the state legislature to override an election certification with a simple majority vote. **These partisan efforts are a direct attack on the integrity of our election system, threatening individual liberty, stability and – most alarmingly – our very democracy.** We can no longer stand by as extreme politicians systematically undermine our elections. Congress has a responsibility to act. **The time has come for us to change the Senate rules to allow an up-or-down, majority vote to pass laws that will protect American democracy.** We can stop this threat to our democracy, but we must act now before it's too late. **[Will you join me in this fight by adding your name in support of protecting our democracy and the right to vote?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39757729/321294439/-1479490670?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDNkY2I0OC1kZTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyXl3FhZ0UzhZz7-VOsWnkQh1UiMOKffP_LvgrvGq_M=&emci=133dcb48-de5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=143dcb48-de5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5452893)** | | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39757730/321294440/-1479490670?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDNkY2I0OC1kZTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyXl3FhZ0UzhZz7-VOsWnkQh1UiMOKffP_LvgrvGq_M=&emci=133dcb48-de5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=143dcb48-de5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5452893)
---
Our country as we know it depends on free, fair, and impartially administered elections. Every aspect of our society, from our schools, to our economy, to our national security, depends on us protecting the foundation of our beloved democracy.
It’s time to change the Senate rules and pass legislation to uphold the integrity of our elections. Our country, and our democracy, depend on it.
Thank you for taking action.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: It’s not voting rights OR Build Back Better. It’s BOTH.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We heard some troubling news from the Senate yesterday about Build Back Better.
#
Peter,
Yesterday, reports surfaced that the Senate is considering delaying passage of the popular Build Back Better Act in order to focus on voting rights. This is a false choice.
Democrats control the House, Senate, and White House. Voters delivered us these majorities to solve the biggest problems in the country. We can’t pit two crises against one another, and say Democrats can only do one or the other. The Senate can and must pass both voting rights protections AND the Build Back Better Act.
The Senate has less than two weeks to pass Build Back Better, or families won’t receive their next monthly Child Tax Credit payment. That means millions of families would instantly see their income reduced by hundreds of dollars. Many would fall into poverty to begin the new year.
**My message to the Senate is this: Millions of working people and families across America are depending on us. Don’t leave them behind. It’s time to deliver.**
And it’s not just the Child Tax Credit that we’d lose if the Senate further delays. Build Back Better is a historic investment in fighting climate change. It’s universal pre-K, paid family and medical leave, affordable child care, and Medicare expansion. It’s an investment in affordable housing, health care, home care, and immigration reform. The Senate can’t turn its back on these urgent issues.
[**We are all in, continuing our urgent fight for Build Back Better AND voting rights. Can you chip in $3 towards our fight for what the people, our families, and our communities desperately need?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9033?refcode=em20211216-883&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=883%2E420207%2EaX1aZm) _Each donation before midnight will help us reach our mid-month 300 contribution goal._
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9033?refcode=em20211216-883&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=883%2E420207%2EaX1aZm)**
In this fight with you all the way,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211216-883-footer&t=21&refcode2=883_420207_aX1aZm&akid=883%2E420207%2EaX1aZm)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: SarahforWisconsin.com
subject: Before you log off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Hey, folks!

With the holiday season in full swing and New Year's around the corner, it's normal to tune out around this time and think "I'll get to that next year" — we’ve all been there!

But here's the thing: Our race will be the tipping point for Senate control and right now, polls show we’re the only Democratic campaign ahead of Ron Johnson in a head-to-head match up. That puts a target on our back as we head into 2022.

If we make our fundraising a January problem, we run the risk of losing the momentum we've worked so hard to gain — especially now that we’re hearing Ron Johnson will announce his re-election decision at any moment. Attacks from outside groups will soon follow. We need your help to get ahead of them.

[**This is the final FEC deadline month of the year, which is why we're pushing so hard to reach our online fundraising goals. So before you log off for the holidays, will you dig a little deeper and chip in $5 or more today? It would mean a lot to Sarah to know she can count on your support at this critical time.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39757743/321294592/-1116050000?refcode=em21_211216_mm8_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211216_mm8_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTFmZjE3Zi1lMDVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tcvozy5Dba9shsCeKST-E2r_SRC5HsOUz5WLAYtaSLA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39757744/321294593/-1116050000?refcode=em21_211216_mm8_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211216_mm8_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTFmZjE3Zi1lMDVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tcvozy5Dba9shsCeKST-E2r_SRC5HsOUz5WLAYtaSLA=)

clean_body: Hey, folks! With the holiday season in full swing and New Year's around the corner, it's normal to tune out around this time and think "I'll get to that next year" — we’ve all been there! But here's the thing: Our race will be the tipping point for Senate control and right now, polls show we’re the only Democratic campaign ahead of Ron Johnson in a head-to-head match up. That puts a target on our back as we head into 2022. If we make our fundraising a January problem, we run the risk of losing the momentum we've worked so hard to gain — especially now that we’re hearing Ron Johnson will announce his re-election decision at any moment. Attacks from outside groups will soon follow. We need your help to get ahead of them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Unlike Ron Johnson, Sarah has never taken a dime from corporate PACs — and she never will. clean_body: I’ll jump right to the point. | Peter, I apologize for the hasty email from my phone, but we’re alarmingly close to MISSING the final mid-month deadline of 2021. As things stand, we need to raise another $8,880 by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to hit our goal. That means we only have a few short hours left, Peter. I need you to step up and help me show Pelosi that my seat -- and the House majority -- can’t be bought. If we come up short at this pivotal moment, it would be catastrophic for my re-election chances in November. Thank you for your support! \- María Sent from my iPhone \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Maria Elvira Salazar Date: Wed, Dec 15, 2021 Subject: Final Deadline To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, I’ve got good news and bad news to share with you. First, the good: A new poll just showed that conservatives now have a historic lead in the battle for control of the House, with a 10-point advantage over Pelosi and the Democrats. But now, the bad: My grassroots campaign is still $16,325 behind our final mid-month goal for 2021 -- and if we lose this seat, we’ll lose our shot at FLIPPING the majority. I’m counting on my biggest supporters like YOU to come through for me so that doesn’t happen. Nancy Pelosi is watching our fundraising numbers closely, Peter. She’s already run lying attack ads against me -- and if we come up short, she’ll see it as a sign of weakness and launch a fresh barrage of attacks against us. But if we hit this target and stay on budget, I’m confident we can build an insurmountable lead that Pelosi won’t be able to overcome, no matter how much she spends. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

It’s no surprise that the Democrats have made defeating us their number one priority this election cycle. | Fellow Conservative, We’ve been excited to see an outpouring of support from conservatives standing with us to turn Georgia RED and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority. But Fellow Conservative, the Democrats have responded by making Georgia their number one priority. They’re raising tens of millions of dollars to accomplish their goal. Our country is hurting, but the Democrats have been more worried about keeping their majority than leading. Our conservative campaign to give power back to the people has caught the attention of National Democrats. They see the crowds we’re attracting and the momentum that is building - including from people who aren’t normally involved in politics. The Democrats are raising a record amount of cash to defeat our campaign, so we need your help to win. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: =?utf-8?q?=F0=9F=92=8C_A_Letter_for_President_Biden_=28protectvoting=2Eorg?= =?utf-8?q?=29?=
subject: To Joe Biden, on your eleven month anniversary in office:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Add your name >>
| Team, it has been ELEVEN MONTHS since President Biden was sworn into office — we can’t believe it!

_So we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!_ [SPACE IS LIMITED, ADD YOUR NAME TO THE CARD NOW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4439?t=6&akid=1022%2E878179%2EMw1wNW) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4439?t=7&akid=1022%2E878179%2EMw1wNW) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE CARD](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4440?t=8&akid=1022%2E878179%2EMw1wNW)
---
**TO:** President Joseph Robinette Biden
**FROM:** A Proud American
**DATE:** December 16, 2021
**ADDRESS:** 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, Washington, DC 20500

**Dear President Joe Biden,**

Over the past four years, our nation has faced unprecedented hardships at the hands of Donald Trump.

But in just months, I’ve watched you steady the ship and bring us out of the worst economic crisis of our lifetimes, **and I couldn’t be prouder to call you my president!**

[I know your work is just beginning, Mr. President, which is why I’m donating $2 right now to VPP to elect Congressional Democrats who will fight for your agenda »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4439?t=9&akid=1022%2E878179%2EMw1wNW) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE CARD »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4440?t=10&akid=1022%2E878179%2EMw1wNW)
---
I know how important it is to keep the House, Mr. President.

**I still remember what happened when Republicans won the midterms in 2010 -- they stonewalled the entirety of President Obama’s agenda!**

We know better now, though, which is why I know we need to start our fight immediately.

[So I’m rushing $2 to PROTECT and EXPAND the Majority and help you accomplish your historic agenda »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4440?t=11&akid=1022%2E878179%2EMw1wNW)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE CARD »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4440?t=12&akid=1022%2E878179%2EMw1wNW)
---
Congrats on a successful first eleven months – I can’t wait to see what’s to come.

**_xx A Proud American_**
**!! SIGNATURE PENDING $2 DONATION!!**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1022%2E878179%2EMw1wNW). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1022%2E878179%2EMw1wNW).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1022%2E878179%2EMw1wNW) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=1022%2E878179%2EMw1wNW). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1022%2E878179%2EMw1wNW)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1022%2E878179%2EMw1wNW)

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Faith
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Republicans have just gerrymandered North Carolina’s 2nd Congressional
District in an attempt to steal this seat.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/30248?t=1001&akid=694%2E3698%2E2fBVW7 ]Can you donate to Erica Smith right now so we have the funds to fight
back against Republican disenfranchisement and protect NC-02?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/30469?refcode=em20211216-694&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=694%2E3698%2E2fBVW7 ]Donate $5

Our campaign is powered by folks just like you. And that’s why we wanted to share a little
bit more about why Erica is in this race:

Erica joined this race because this district is her home — and her home is
under threat from Republican gerrymandering.

Erica has devoted her life to service and faith. She grew up on her family
farm picking cucumbers and corn with her siblings and became an engineer,
an educator, a minister, a state senator, and a mother of four sons.

Struggling to make ends meet due to astronomical medication prices, rising
rent costs, and a broken healthcare system is all too familiar to Erica.
This struggle is causing North Carolinians to have to keep hope in the
dark.

We think it’s about time we shed some light on North Carolina and have a
champion for working people in the U.S. House.

This is about winning real progress for working people — who’ve been cast
aside and ignored for far too long in the name of corporate interests.

Erica has run in a racially gerrymandered district before — and won. She’s
represented more than half of the counties in NC-02 in the state senate,
and she’s never lost an election here. Erica’s faith has shown her that
this is the best way she can serve her home and community. And she’s the
only candidate in this race who has the grit, experience, and expertise
it’ll take to protect this seat.

Our campaign is less than a month old, so we’ve got a lot of ground to
make up before we can beat Republican attempts to steal this seat. But
thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we’re making up for lost time.

We’re building power directly from the people because that’s exactly what
our campaign is all about — and it’s going to take a grassroots, diverse
coalition to defeat corporate Republican interests. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/30248?t=1003&akid=694%2E3698%2E2fBVW7 ]If you’re able to
spare anything, can you make a contribution today to help ensure we have
the resources we need to have the strongest campaign possible?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/30469?refcode=em20211216-694&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=694%2E3698%2E2fBVW7 ]Donate $5

Together,

Erica Smith HQ

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211216-694-footer&t=1023&refcode2=694_3698_2fBVW7&akid=694%2E3698%2E2fBVW7

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=694%2E3698%2E2fBVW7

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

| Dear Friend, As snow piles up outside our windows, I think of cuddling up with warm cookies and hot chocolate or giving gifts to friends and family during this holiday season. I also think about how **we can give Utah the gift of better representation in the U.S. Senate** this next election year.

With your help, I know we can. Our campaign is gearing up for the Republican primary, and for that to happen, we start gathering signatures in January. **Can you help us reach more Utahns **by donating to our campaign?

body:

She has been telling me that donations are slowing down, and this is the worst time to be falling short because our end-of-year FEC deadline is right around the corner. [**Can you please donate as much as you can right now to help us catch up?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/EaPW0xb9DRsYJkPI6I88ocHK_O5dEJ36GOMQc7JUOt0=/DIXaVmp-5-ScSQgHtbiUbeUrrDkQ0Aw-9MFl4qoXA0Q=?refcode=E12996-20211216-MidMonth2-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) Thanks!

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Just got off the air with Rachel Maddow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
I know it's late, friend, but I just got off the air with Rachel Maddow, and I need to share this important message. Right now, our democracy is under attack – extreme politicians are seeking to systematically undermine our election system in a dangerous attempt to stay in power. Without free and fair elections, the United States of America as we know it would not exist. **That is why I am calling on my colleagues to change the Senate rules to allow a majority vote to pass laws that will protect American democracy.** With so much at stake, we cannot afford to lose the Senate. Our democracy is at risk – if Mitch McConnell succeeds in flipping the Senate, far-right Republicans could strip away the right to vote, undermine our elections, and dismantle the fundamental framework of our country. If we lose here in New Hampshire, we could lose our fragile Senate majority. I’m no stranger to tough fights, but the GOP has deep pockets and nearly endless resources. Republican megadonors and dark money super PACs have already spent $7 million attacking me: more than they've spent against any other Democratic incumbent. **[That's why we set an emergency goal of $10,000. With all eyes on New Hampshire, we cannot afford to fall short in this critical moment. Can I count on you to chip in $5 before it's too late?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39757820/321294919/-913685435?refcode=e20211216_mwh-maddow&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjAwYmJlMC1lNTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZF0Y5ZGUFQKdSpIapftEp_0BVZQTb4PP7N09h3IIlQ0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Rush $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39757821/321294920/-913685435?refcode=e20211216_mwh-maddow&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjAwYmJlMC1lNTVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZF0Y5ZGUFQKdSpIapftEp_0BVZQTb4PP7N09h3IIlQ0=)

name: Rabine for Governor
subject: 12/16 Newsletter
body:
Last weekend, multiple tornados touched down in Illinois, Kentucky, Tennessee, Missouri, and Arkansas, killing more than 100 people.

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_16_newsletter&n=1) | |
---|---|---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_16_newsletter&n=2) Dear Peter -- Last weekend, multiple tornados touched down in Illinois, Kentucky, Tennessee, Missouri, and Arkansas, killing more than 100 people. My prayers go out to the families of loved ones lost due to these violent storms and I pray for a speedy recovery for those injured. This past weekend should serve as a reminder of what is truly important in life. It is easy to get caught up in things like social media and the many other distractions demanding our attention, but it is our family, our friendships and our communities that really matter. As we approach the Christmas season, I pray you can find time to slow down and spend time with the people who matter in your life. I wish you and your family a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year! Best Regards, Gary Rabine **Will you join our growing movement to defeat JB Pritzker?****** Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker and help turn our state around! | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_16_newsletter&n=3 "Join Team Rabine") [Join Team Rabine](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_16_newsletter&n=3)
---
* * *
### **Lawmaker pulls proposal to require unvaccinated patients to pay for COVID-19 treatments **
The sponsor of controversial legislation aimed at penalizing unvaccinated COVID-19 patients has pulled his bill from consideration.
He claims there have been violent threats against him and his family. Violent threats are wrong and have no place in the public policy arena.
However, I am certainly relieved this legislation has been pulled. We have a long-standing tradition of requiring patients to be treated regardless of their ability to pay. The COVID-19 pandemic should not be an excuse to erase what has been standard healthcare practice for decades. Requiring unvaccinated patients to pay out of pocket for COVID-19 treatments would be a gross overreach of state authority. It is not the role of government to play doctor. We must respect the rights of individuals to make their own healthcare decisions and we must not get to a place where the availability of healthcare hinges on personal preferences and personal choices.
Thankfully, for the moment, this terrible legislation is not going anywAhere.
### Government programs won’t stop violence
Wherever there is a problem, Democrats have a government program to provide a “solution”.
The latest is a new law creating the Office of Firearm Violence Prevention in Illinois because we all know that the best way to stop a criminal with a firearm is a government program...
The program was created to provide a “holistic” approach to the rise in violent crime. In 2020, there were 1,151 murders in Illinois which represents a 38 percent spike in violent crime.
We don’t need more government agencies to tackle the rise in violent crime. We need to put money back into police departments. We need to increase patrols and we need to create an environment that promotes heathy families. The root cause of the rise in violence is the war on families. We won’t stop the senseless violence we see on the streets until we address the root cause. It is time to focus on families. Any other approach to violent crime is just window dressing.
### **Education review panel wants Illinois schools to go woke...and wants you to pay for it**
Instead of focusing on the basic tools students need to think critically, the Illinois State Board of Education Professional Review Panel is recommending lawmakers focus on promoting “racial equity and eliminate structural racism within schools.”
Oh, and they want the Legislature to increase the annual funding of the evidence-based funding model to a whopping $527 million, rather than the current $300 million figure.
Translation: Far-left political insiders want our schools to go woke and they want to reach into our pockets even more to pay for their radical agenda. The citizens of Illinois do not want this propaganda taught to their kids but the political elites in Illinois do not care what the people want. The only way to stop this radical agenda from becoming a reality is to change our state’s leadership. The 2022 election is a battle for the future of our state, and it is a battle we must win.
* * *
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_16_newsletter&n=4)
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_16_newsletter&n=5)
---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_16_newsletter&n=6)
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/join?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_16_newsletter&n=7)
* * *
|
Paid for by Rabine for Governor | PO Box 59183, Schaumburg, IL 60159 A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the Board’s official website (www.elections.il.gov) or for purchase from the State Board of Elections, Springfield, Illinois.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_16_newsletter&n=8).
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6t84VcLDAztZ7gNMCtVnC4HtpWQk6Xt7pTvj7avz1DYf&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_16_newsletter&n=9) [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y3owDXItF8Fxepzm0P3FcLQliFyUmYOOEoz3DQt6cVpu&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_16_newsletter&n=10) [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TpvcEbp0GzIdVh11H7oShmM&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_16_newsletter&n=11)
Thank you and God bless.

The 2022 election is a battle for the future of our state, and it is a battle we must win. | Paid for by Rabine for Governor | PO Box 59183, Schaumburg, IL 60159 A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the Board’s official website (www.elections.il.gov) or for purchase from the State Board of Elections, Springfield, Illinois.

body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Crucial Fundraising Deadline
---
| Hey Friends,
Good news . . . we've raised $20,002 toward our $50,000 end of year, quarterly goal. Most of it came from fellow homeschool moms! Although we are gaining ground, we're not quite there so I'm asking you to chip in at least $17.76 to help us meet this goal.
Your campaign contribution will help me become the first-ever homeschool mom of seven to serve in Congress! Thank you for your support!
For Liberty!

body:
Our work is just getting started. | | |
---
Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. clean_body: Our work is just getting started. | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | Dr. Raul Ruiz is working hard to make sure our most vulnerable populations are cared for. But in order to keep fighting for frontline workers, he needs your help to hit his daily fundraising goal. | | | | I might be a Congressman, but I’ll always be a Doctor first. I’m proud of the accomplishments we’ve made this year. We’ve passed incredible legislation and provided relief to millions. I’ll be the first to acknowledge how tough COVID-19 has been on our communities. Too many of us have had to grieve the loss of loved ones, jobs, and critical care. I know how tough it is, and we couldn’t have made it without the work of our front-line workers. When voters entrusted Democrats to protect them, they gave Democrats like me a duty to work everyday on their behalf. | | | | | | | Thank you, Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. | Dear Peter,
My friend and colleague Congressman Gosar is one of my strongest allies in Congress and he is at the top of the list now to be targeted by the democrats. The country saw the ridiculous lengths the far left will go to to destroy a patriotic family man. The liberals not just censured Rep. Gosar for a cartoon—they are censoring his message to America. Everyone who actually saw the cartoon knows that is was described as “silly” or “funny” but no one seriously saw any “threat” in the cartoon. That won’t stop the leftist loons from shrieking however. I stood on the floor of the House in solidarity with Paul. He is my friend and a proven America First fighter. He has a 100% NRA, GOA second amendment record. He has a 100% National Right to Life rating. He has never voted for a tax increase, and fights to reduce spending every chance he gets. He is one of us. President Trump called him the day after the leftists attacked him and said: **_"Congressman Paul Gosar has been a loyal supporter of our America First agenda, and even more importantly the USA. Paul is Congressman who is highly respected in Arizona, strong on crime, borders, our military, and our veterans. He continually fights for lower taxes, less regulation, and our great, but under siege Second Amendment."_** **_"Paul Gosar has my complete and total endorsement."_** **_\- President Donald J. Trump, November 18, 2021_** [I am asking you to stand with him as well. He is under sustained attack and the democrat socialists want to keep him out of of Congress](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=6dae8d8843&e=645b3b1338). Please donate what you can to keep this patriot in Congress: [https://secure.anedot.com/paul-gosar-for-congress/donate](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=019ac1c2bb&e=645b3b1338) Thank you! **Rep. Lauren Boebert** P.S. [I wish we had 100 more members in Congress like Congressman Gosar. He is winner and a keeper. Please help me help him stay in office](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=3fc2cf4b2a&e=645b3b1338).

name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] Support the African American History Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
The truth about our history and our country is what challenges us to imagine a bolder future.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211216-458-footer-ak&t=2&akid=458%2E90090%2EpH1xms)
We're honored to stand with Jamaal Bowman and other progressive leaders to support the African American History Act today.
Education and literacy play key roles in ensuring all of us have access to high quality and historically accurate information. A multiracial democracy ensures that the social, economic, and political rights of all in the United States are respected and uplifted. **And that requires us to tell the full truth about our country’s history.**
**The truth should always be available to all so it can inspire us to move towards the direction and knowledge of a true democracy.** Investing and supporting African American history to fight back against those who villainize the truth is the antidote to organized ignorance, which in turn will support our work to build a multiracial democracy.
[**_If you’re with us can you add your name right now to support the African American History Act today?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18391?t=3&akid=458%2E90090%2EpH1xms)
**[Add your name »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18391?t=4&akid=458%2E90090%2EpH1xms)**
The African American History Act invests**$10 million over 5 years** in the National Museum of African American History and Culture (NMAAHC) to support African American history education programs that are voluntarily available for students, parents, and educators.
[**_Please add your name to co-sign the African American History Act right now._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18391?t=5&akid=458%2E90090%2EpH1xms)
**[Add your name »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18391?t=6&akid=458%2E90090%2EpH1xms)**
In solidarity,
Morgan Harper HQ
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211216-458-footer&t=7&refcode2=458_90090_pH1xms&akid=458%2E90090%2EpH1xms)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=458%2E90090%2EpH1xms)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: “Islamophobia is not real . . . ”
body:
Yesterday, the House of Representatives passed the “Combating International Islamophobia Act”, sponsored by none-other than Jew-hating, Anti-American, Anti-White, Radical Muslim, and racist-in-chief, Ilhan Omar!
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2fnw763c763vin8qY02TTiXP1g/dPzHoL8929dJhg2PvsEKaBlw) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Laura Loomer for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2fnw763c763vin8qY02TTiXP1g/dPzHoL8929dJhg2PvsEKaBlw)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2fnw763c763vin8qY02TTiXP1g/dPzHoL8929dJhg2PvsEKaBlw)
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2fnw763c763vin8qY02TTiXP1g/dPzHoL8929dJhg2PvsEKaBlw) Patriot,

Yesterday, the House of Representatives passed the "Combating International Islamophobia Act", sponsored by none-other than Jew-hating, Anti-American, Anti-White, Radical Muslim, and racist-in-chief, Ilhan Omar!

**The act establishes a special envoy in the Department of State to monitor and report on "Islamophobia" WORLDWIDE!**

I can save taxpayers several millions of dollars and write up that report in four words:
**ISLAMOPHOBIA IS NOT REAL!**
[**Help me tell that truth by backing my congressional campaign today!**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2fnw763c763vin8qY02TTiXP1g/dPzHoL8929dJhg2PvsEKaBlw)

That's right. A phobia is defined as an "IRRATIONAL fear" of something. And you know what? We have EVERY reason to fear terrorism, murder and the hatred that is perpetuated in the Quran by Radical Muslims!

Want proof?
> _Just ask the 307 family members of Marines killed in the Beirut barracks bombing in 1983.
>
> Ask the survivors of the U.S. Embassy bombings in Tanzania and Kenya that killed 224 people in 1998.
>
> Ask the families of the Bali bombings or Madrid train bombings that killed 298 total.
>
> Look into the eyes of the mothers and fathers of the 186 children lost in the Beslan school siege by Islamic terrorists!
>
> **Ask the wives, husbands, mothers and fathers of the 2,996 lives lost on 9/11!**_
**TENS OF THOUSANDS** of men, women and children have been slaughtered in terrorist attacks in the name of Islam in 309 recognized attacks - **and that 's only counting the attacks that have been DECLARED as being tied to Islamic Terrorism!**

There are thousands of more attacks that go unreported every single year!

[**Help me stand for truth in Congress and back my campaign today.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2fnw763c763vin8qY02TTiXP1g/dPzHoL8929dJhg2PvsEKaBlw)

Do you know how many people have died in confirmed "Islamophobic attacks" in America? Four - three of which occurred in the emotional days following 9/11!

In fact, ten times more people have died due to Post Office Workers "going postal" than those who have been killed as a result of alleged acts of "Islamophobia."

Yet, Ilhan Omar managed to get her way once again, and yesterday she used her perpetual state of victimhood to get Congress to pass a law about an epidemic that only exists in her imagination.

**We need strong leaders in Congress who are willing to TELL THE TRUTH and confront the insanity of the Left, and the full-blown Jihadists like Ilhan Omar who have infiltrated our government. THAT LEADER IS ME!**

[**Back my run for Congress today, and help me do just that.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2fnw763c763vin8qY02TTiXP1g/dPzHoL8929dJhg2PvsEKaBlw)

With the End-of-Year fundraising deadline approaching, I need every dollar you can spare to help me win so I can compete against a Do-Nothing RINO who has been in Congress for way too long.

Thanks so much for all that you do, and [**please support my campaign**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2fnw763c763vin8qY02TTiXP1g/dPzHoL8929dJhg2PvsEKaBlw).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

I can save taxpayers several millions of dollars and write up that report in four words: ISLAMOPHOBIA IS NOT REAL! That's right. A phobia is defined as an "IRRATIONAL fear" of something. And you know what? We have EVERY reason to fear terrorism, murder and the hatred that is perpetuated in the Quran by Radical Muslims! Want proof? Just ask the 307 family members of Marines killed in the Beirut barracks bombing in 1983. Ask the survivors of the U.S. Embassy bombings in Tanzania and Kenya that killed 224 people in 1998. Ask the families of the Bali bombings or Madrid train bombings that killed 298 total. Look into the eyes of the mothers and fathers of the 186 children lost in the Beslan school siege by Islamic terrorists! Ask the wives, husbands, mothers and fathers of the 2,996 lives lost on 9/11! TENS OF THOUSANDS of men, women and children have been slaughtered in terrorist attacks in the name of Islam in 309 recognized attacks - and that 's only counting the attacks that have been DECLARED as being tied to Islamic Terrorism! There are thousands of more attacks that go unreported every single year! Do you know how many people have died in confirmed "Islamophobic attacks" in America? Four - three of which occurred in the emotional days following 9/11! In fact, ten times more people have died due to Post Office Workers "going postal" than those who have been killed as a result of alleged acts of "Islamophobia." Yet, Ilhan Omar managed to get her way once again, and yesterday she used her perpetual state of victimhood to get Congress to pass a law about an epidemic that only exists in her imagination. We need strong leaders in Congress who are willing to TELL THE TRUTH and confront the insanity of the Left, and the full-blown Jihadists like Ilhan Omar who have infiltrated our government. THAT LEADER IS ME! With the End-of-Year fundraising deadline approaching, I need every dollar you can spare to help me win so I can compete against a Do-Nothing RINO who has been in Congress for way too long. Thanks so much for all that you do, and . | Dear Fellow Patriot, I’m reaching out to tell you about a critical upcoming deadline. My America First campaign has less than 15 days before the end of the quarter. All my opponents are RINOs, and that's why they continue to lose to the far-left Democrat Elaine Luria in the General Election. _We can’t lose this red seat again - it will decide the balance of power in our Capitol_. **[In order to win, we need to spread my America First message far and wide, and I can’t do that without your help today](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=9e5ba53e8a&e=af4b86f5c6).** **[So chip in $10, $25, $50, $100, or anything that you can afford today up to $2800 and make sure Virginians and the rest of America know who the best option is to represent them in Washington](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=91118a9580&e=af4b86f5c6).** Thank you in advance for your kind contributions. [**In these critical 15 days, I’m asking you to chip in $50, $75 $100, $250, or anything you can to my campaign right away, and help me finish strong in this heated race to Take Back Congress for Conservatives.**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=7be3d78333&e=af4b86f5c6) Thank you in advance for your generosity. ******Chief Jarome Bell**

---
| | A Christmas Contribution to our campaign of $12.25 (or more) helps us register more voters, reach more voters, and close Gaetz' shrinking six-point lead over Rebekah. Redistricting plans cut out the two most conservative counties in Florida's 1st Congressional District (Walton and Holmes), putting Rebekah AHEAD of Gaetz in both Escambia and Okaloosa counties. We need to make up the gap in Santa Rosa- the only other county in the newly-drawn district! Our current return-on-investment, based on recent polling, shows that $12.25 gets us 40 votes closer to topping Gaetz. $100 would help us reach more than 300 voters. $1,000 = 3,225, and so on...

name: Cynthia Cano, Beto for Texas
subject: Gaining ground
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Hi, my name is Cynthia.

I’m part of the team that just traveled with Beto to 18 cities and towns
across Texas — I’ve been by his side since his historic campaign for U.S.
Senate in 2018. And I’m writing this email to tell you nothing makes me
more hopeful about Beto serving as our next Governor than all the amazing
people that show up and are a part of this Texas-sized effort.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50516?refcode=ema20211216-167261&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=167261%2E444211%2EcA_iek ]Beto meeting Texans

A lot of politicians like to talk. Beto listens. Even at our most crowded
rallies, he spent hours hearing people out, one-on-one, about the issues
that make them want to change who’s in charge in Texas.

In Texarkana, a small town bordering Arkansas, he heard what it’s like to
live just blocks away from a state with expanded Medicaid and more
affordable care.

In West Texas, he heard the frustration of dealing with jacked-up utility
bills, thanks to Greg Abbott siding with energy companies instead of rural
communities.

And up in the Panhandle, he heard about the need for more jobs across
Texas — not just in our big cities.

When Beto talks about building a vision for Texas that’s big enough for
everyone, he really means it. Every day we spend on the road traveling to
every corner of this state, we’re bringing more and more folks into that
vision.

Texans are ready for a Governor who cares about their health, their
livelihoods, and their families. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50516?refcode=ema20211216-167261&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=167261%2E444211%2EcA_iek ]But we need YOUR help to elect him.
Will you chip in right now to help Beto hit the road again as soon as we
start the new year? Every dollar will go directly to fund future campaign
events with Beto and Texas voters.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50516?refcode=ema20211216-167261&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=167261%2E444211%2EcA_iek ]Contribute $3

You and your fellow supporters made this recent round of campaign stops
possible — and you’re the ones who will decide whether we can keep this
momentum going. Thank you for anything you can pitch in today.

Hope to see you on the road soon,

Cynthia Cano
Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=167261%2E444211%2EcA_iek

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.
